## Archon Continuity
**Rarity:** Legendary | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** WARFRAME | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 10

### Acquisition
Archon Continuity is available from Chipper of Kahl's Garrison for 40 Stock (Kahl), requiring players to be at Rank 3 - Fort to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +5% Ability Duration, Abilities that inflict a Toxin status effect will also apply a Corrosive status effect.
- **Rank 1:** +10% Ability Duration, Abilities that inflict a Toxin status effect will also apply a Corrosive status effect.
- **Rank 2:** +15% Ability Duration, Abilities that inflict a Toxin status effect will also apply a Corrosive status effect.
- **Rank 3:** +20% Ability Duration, Abilities that inflict a Toxin status effect will also apply a Corrosive status effect.
- **Rank 4:** +25% Ability Duration, Abilities that inflict a Toxin status effect will also apply a Corrosive status effect.
- **Rank 5:** +30% Ability Duration, Abilities that inflict a Toxin status effect will also apply a Corrosive status effect.
- **Rank 6:** +35% Ability Duration, Abilities that inflict a Toxin status effect will also apply a Corrosive status effect.
- **Rank 7:** +40% Ability Duration, Abilities that inflict a Toxin status effect will also apply a Corrosive status effect.
- **Rank 8:** +45% Ability Duration, Abilities that inflict a Toxin status effect will also apply a Corrosive status effect.
- **Rank 9:** +50% Ability Duration, Abilities that inflict a Toxin status effect will also apply a Corrosive status effect.
- **Rank 10:** +55% Ability Duration, Abilities that inflict a Toxin status effect will also apply a Corrosive status effect.

### Drop Locations
- Kahl's Garrison (Chipper), Fort — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Archon Continuity is an Archon mod for Warframes that increases Ability Duration and causes Toxin-proccing abilities to also proc Corrosive.
**Notes:**
Abilities that proc a Toxin status effect will also proc a Corrosive status proc.
Effect does not scale with mod rank. The mod can optionally be left unranked to save capacity.
Only some Warframes can inflict Toxin procs with abilities.
Chroma's Spectral Scream, and Elemental Ward which can be transferred via Helminth. Note that if only using Elemental Ward, because it will not reapply its Toxin procs while an enemy is still affected, this mod has little value.
Citrine's Prismatic Gem.
Dante's Final Verse's Wordwarden Noctua copies can proc Toxin status provided that Noctua itself is modded for Toxin.
Grendel's Feast and Regurgitate
Inaros's Sandstorm with Elemental Sandstorm with modded Toxin on a melee weapon.
Koumei's Kumihimo and Bunraku.
Lavos's Ophidian Bite can imbue Toxin to all other abilities.

## Archon Flow
**Rarity:** Legendary | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** WARFRAME | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 10

### Acquisition
Archon Flow is available from Chipper of Kahl's Garrison for 40 Stock (Kahl), requiring players to be at Rank 3 - Fort to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +17% Energy Max, Enemies killed by Cold Abilities have 10% chance to drop an Energy Orb. Cooldown: 10s
- **Rank 1:** +34% Energy Max, Enemies killed by Cold Abilities have 10% chance to drop an Energy Orb. Cooldown: 10s
- **Rank 2:** +50% Energy Max, Enemies killed by Cold Abilities have 10% chance to drop an Energy Orb. Cooldown: 10s
- **Rank 3:** +67% Energy Max, Enemies killed by Cold Abilities have 10% chance to drop an Energy Orb. Cooldown: 10s
- **Rank 4:** +84% Energy Max, Enemies killed by Cold Abilities have 10% chance to drop an Energy Orb. Cooldown: 10s
- **Rank 5:** +101% Energy Max, Enemies killed by Cold Abilities have 10% chance to drop an Energy Orb. Cooldown: 10s
- **Rank 6:** +118% Energy Max, Enemies killed by Cold Abilities have 10% chance to drop an Energy Orb. Cooldown: 10s
- **Rank 7:** +135% Energy Max, Enemies killed by Cold Abilities have 10% chance to drop an Energy Orb. Cooldown: 10s
- **Rank 8:** +151% Energy Max, Enemies killed by Cold Abilities have 10% chance to drop an Energy Orb. Cooldown: 10s
- **Rank 9:** +168% Energy Max, Enemies killed by Cold Abilities have 10% chance to drop an Energy Orb. Cooldown: 10s
- **Rank 10:** +185% Energy Max, Enemies killed by Cold Abilities have 10% chance to drop an Energy Orb. Cooldown: 10s

### Drop Locations
- Kahl's Garrison (Chipper), Fort — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Archon Flow is an Archon mod for Warframes that increases Energy Capacity and has a chance to produce a Large Energy Orb when an enemy is killed with an ability dealing Cold damage.
**Notes:**
Produces a Large Energy Orb that restores 50 energy, similar to Energy Orbs dropped by lockers and crates.
Abilities that kill an enemy with Cold damage have a 10% chance to produce an Energy Orb every 10 seconds.
Effect does not scale with mod rank. The mod can optionally be left unranked to save capacity.
Only some Warframes can deal Cold damage with abilities.
Chroma's Spectral Scream. Elemental Ward, which can be transferred via Helminth, can not activate the effect.
Citrine's Prismatic Gem
Frost's Freeze, Ice Wave, Snow Globe, and Avalanche all deal cold damage
Gauss's Thermal Sunder, which can be transferred via Helminth.
Inaros's Sandstorm with Elemental Sandstorm with modded Cold on a melee weapon, however enemies may die to damage-over-time procs such as Slash.
Mirage's Sleight of Hand with Explosive Legerdemain.
Wukong's Celestial Twin when equipped with Primal Fury modded for Cold.
Yareli's Sea Snares and Riptide.
Zephyr's Tornado will adopt weapon elements when damaged.
While Lavos can kill with Cold, enemies must die after an ability's initial damage and before its damage-over-time which can be inconsistent. Lavos also does not use Energy to power abilities, though he can still opt to use the mod to generate Energy Orbs for allies or to power his Valence Block.
All Exalted Weapons when modded with Cold.

## Archon Intensify
**Rarity:** Legendary | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** WARFRAME | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 10

### Acquisition
Archon Intensify is available from Chipper of Kahl's Garrison for 40 Stock (Kahl), requiring players to be at Rank 3 - Fort to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +2.7% Ability Strength, Restoring health with abilities grants +30% Ability Strength for 10s.
- **Rank 1:** +5.5% Ability Strength, Restoring health with abilities grants +30% Ability Strength for 10s.
- **Rank 2:** +8.2% Ability Strength, Restoring health with abilities grants +30% Ability Strength for 10s.
- **Rank 3:** +10.9% Ability Strength, Restoring health with abilities grants +30% Ability Strength for 10s.
- **Rank 4:** +13.6% Ability Strength, Restoring health with abilities grants +30% Ability Strength for 10s.
- **Rank 5:** +16.4% Ability Strength, Restoring health with abilities grants +30% Ability Strength for 10s.
- **Rank 6:** +19.1% Ability Strength, Restoring health with abilities grants +30% Ability Strength for 10s.
- **Rank 7:** +21.8% Ability Strength, Restoring health with abilities grants +30% Ability Strength for 10s.
- **Rank 8:** +24.5% Ability Strength, Restoring health with abilities grants +30% Ability Strength for 10s.
- **Rank 9:** +27.3% Ability Strength, Restoring health with abilities grants +30% Ability Strength for 10s.
- **Rank 10:** +30% Ability Strength, Restoring health with abilities grants +30% Ability Strength for 10s.

### Drop Locations
- Kahl's Garrison (Chipper), Fort — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Archon Intensify is an Archon mod for Warframes that increases Ability Strength and briefly grants additional Ability Strength when an ability restores Health.
**Notes:**
Abilities that restore Health briefly grant additional +30% Ability Strength.
Buff is not refreshed upon additional healing; it must first expire, for a new instance to take effect.
Health must actually be restored for the effect to work, which demands that the player first take damage.
Restoring Health of ally Warframes or Companions will also grant the bonus.
Bonus does not scale with mod rank. The mod can optionally be left unranked to save capacity.
Only the following abilities trigger the mod:
The mod does NOT activate on the following abilities/passives.
Citrine's Passive.
Limbo's Banish with Rift Haven.
Nekros' Passive.
Nidus' passive health regeneration.
Sevagoth's Gloom.
Exalted Weapons when modded for healing directly via Life Strike and Healing Return.
Abilities that spawn Health Orbs, such as Citrine's Fractured Blast, Nekros's Desecrate, Nezha's Blazing Chakram and Reaping Chakram, Oberon's Reckoning, Protea's Dispensary, Trinity's Pool of Life, or Voruna's Lycath's Hunt.
Abilities that increase Health pool, such as Chroma's Heat Elemental Ward, or Titania's "Full Moon" Tribute.
Healing caused by ability casts when Molt Reconstruct is equipped.
Some abilities transferred via Helminth such as; Grendel's Nourish, which, while transferrable via Helminth, are altered to remove the self-heal.

## Archon Stretch
**Rarity:** Legendary | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** WARFRAME | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 10

### Acquisition
Archon Stretch is available from Chipper of Kahl's Garrison for 40 Stock (Kahl), requiring players to be at Rank 3 - Fort to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +4.1% Ability Range, Abilities that deal Electricity Damage restore +2 Energy/s over 5s.
- **Rank 1:** +8.2% Ability Range, Abilities that deal Electricity Damage restore +2 Energy/s over 5s.
- **Rank 2:** +12.3% Ability Range, Abilities that deal Electricity Damage restore +2 Energy/s over 5s.
- **Rank 3:** +16.4% Ability Range, Abilities that deal Electricity Damage restore +2 Energy/s over 5s.
- **Rank 4:** +20.5% Ability Range, Abilities that deal Electricity Damage restore +2 Energy/s over 5s.
- **Rank 5:** +24.5% Ability Range, Abilities that deal Electricity Damage restore +2 Energy/s over 5s.
- **Rank 6:** +28.6% Ability Range, Abilities that deal Electricity Damage restore +2 Energy/s over 5s.
- **Rank 7:** +32.7% Ability Range, Abilities that deal Electricity Damage restore +2 Energy/s over 5s.
- **Rank 8:** +36.8% Ability Range, Abilities that deal Electricity Damage restore +2 Energy/s over 5s.
- **Rank 9:** +40.9% Ability Range, Abilities that deal Electricity Damage restore +2 Energy/s over 5s.
- **Rank 10:** +45% Ability Range, Abilities that deal Electricity Damage restore +2 Energy/s over 5s.

### Drop Locations
- Kahl's Garrison (Chipper), Fort — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Archon Stretch is an Archon mod for Warframes that increases Ability Range and briefly grants Energy Regeneration when an ability deals Electricity damage.
**Notes:**
Abilities from Warframes or companions that deal Electricity damage will grant the Archon Stretch buff, regenerating 2 Energy per second for 5 seconds, for a total of 10 energy restored.
Does not stack or refresh; only 1 buff can be active at any time
Casting an ability will stop the energy generation for 1 second.
This includes abilities that activate the buff.
Channeled Abilities that drain energy over time, such as Immolation, Sound Quake, and Renewal will completely prevent energy generation for as long as they are active.
Does not scale with mod rank, so the mod can optionally be left unranked to save capacity
Electricity status effects from abilities can trigger the buff.
Including the forced Electricity status effect created from Magnetic status effects.
Warframe Abilities
The following Warframe abilities can trigger the buff:
Although Lavos and Hildryn's Balefire Charger can proc Electricity, they do not benefit from energy regeneration.
Mods
The following mods can trigger the buff:
**Trivia:**
Archon Stretch is currently the only Archon mod whose standard counterpart doesn't have a legendary variant (Primed or Umbra version). And similar to Archon Intensify, it takes its maxed stat from its standard counterpart rather than its legendary variant.

## Archon Vitality
**Rarity:** Legendary | **Polarity:** vazarin | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** WARFRAME | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 10

### Acquisition
Archon Vitality is available from Chipper of Kahl's Garrison for 40 Stock (Kahl), requiring players to be at Rank 3 - Fort to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +9% Health, Status Effects from abilities that deal Heat Damage will be applied twice.
- **Rank 1:** +18% Health, Status Effects from abilities that deal Heat Damage will be applied twice.
- **Rank 2:** +27% Health, Status Effects from abilities that deal Heat Damage will be applied twice.
- **Rank 3:** +36% Health, Status Effects from abilities that deal Heat Damage will be applied twice.
- **Rank 4:** +45% Health, Status Effects from abilities that deal Heat Damage will be applied twice.
- **Rank 5:** +55% Health, Status Effects from abilities that deal Heat Damage will be applied twice.
- **Rank 6:** +64% Health, Status Effects from abilities that deal Heat Damage will be applied twice.
- **Rank 7:** +73% Health, Status Effects from abilities that deal Heat Damage will be applied twice.
- **Rank 8:** +82% Health, Status Effects from abilities that deal Heat Damage will be applied twice.
- **Rank 9:** +91% Health, Status Effects from abilities that deal Heat Damage will be applied twice.
- **Rank 10:** +100% Health, Status Effects from abilities that deal Heat Damage will be applied twice.

### Drop Locations
- Kahl's Garrison (Chipper), Fort — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Archon Vitality is an Archon mod for Warframes that increases Health and applies an extra Heat proc for abilities that can inflict them.
**Notes:**
Abilities that inflict Heat status proc(s) will inflict one additional Heat proc that deals the same damage.
Effect does not scale with mod rank. The mod can optionally be left unranked to save capacity.
Can be triggered through Melee Afflictions (from +6 to +7).
Only some Warframes inflict Heat status procs:
Chroma's Spectral Scream and Elemental Ward, which can be transferred via Helminth.
Citrine's Prismatic Gem.
Ember's Fireball, part of Inferno, as well as Fire Blast, which can be transferred via Helminth.
Gauss's Thermal Sunder, which can be transferred via Helminth.
Hildryn's Pillage with Blazing Pillage.
Jade's Light's Judgment, Ophanim Eyes, which can be transferred via Helminth, and Glory on High.
Lavos's Catalyze can imbue Heat to all other abilities excluding ones transferred via Helminth.
Inaros's Sandstorm with Elemental Sandstorm with heat on a melee weapon.
Koumei's Kumihimo and Bunraku.
Mirage's Sleight of Hand with Explosive Legerdemain.
Nezha's Fire Walker, which can be transferred via Helminth, Blazing Chakram, and Warding Halo.
Nova's Null Star with Neutron Star, which can be transferred via Helminth.
Protea's Blaze Artillery.
Temple's Pyrotechnics, which can be transferred via Helminth, and Overdrive.
Trinity's Link will add an additional Heat proc whenever a Heat status effect is redirected to linked enemies.
Voruna's Fangs of Raksh, though only 1 extra heat status effect will be added, despite the ability adding 10.
Wisp's Sol Gate.
Wukong's Celestial Twin when equipped with Primal Fury modded for Heat.
Zephyr's Tornado after absorbing Heat damage.
Uriel's Infernalis, Demonium and Brimstone as well as effects from Passive Demons.
All Exalted Weapon

## Argon Scope
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Rifle | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Headshot: +22.5% Critical Chance when Aiming for 2s
- **Rank 1:** On Headshot: +45% Critical Chance when Aiming for 3s
- **Rank 2:** On Headshot: +67.5% Critical Chance when Aiming for 5s
- **Rank 3:** On Headshot: +90% Critical Chance when Aiming for 6s
- **Rank 4:** On Headshot: +112.5% Critical Chance when Aiming for 8s
- **Rank 5:** On Headshot: +135% Critical Chance when Aiming for 9s

### Drop Locations
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 6 (Normal) — Rare (1.03%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 4 (Normal) — Rare (1.49%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation A — Uncommon (21.51%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation A — Common (37.74%)

### Wiki
Argon Scope is a rare rifle mod that increases critical chance while aiming for a brief time upon a headshot.
**Notes:**
Argon Scope is additive with similar mods. For example, a Snipetron with a max rank Argon Scope and Point Strike will have a 30% (1 + 135% + 150%) critical chance.
Argon Scope will trigger upon headshots, i.e. any weapon hit to an enemy's head, whether the target survives or not.
Headshots will refresh Argon Scope's timer.
The headshot that triggers Argon Scope will not benefit from the buff itself (unless the buff was already active).
Only hitting the head body part counts as headshot. Hitting other weak spots (such as Moa's backpacks) does not give the buff.
If activated, Argon Scope will display an icon timer beside the player's health UI, and the Warframe will be briefly surrounded by a flashing energy ribbon.
This icon is the same as Hydraulic Crosshairs and Cat's Eye and features the Critical Chance four-leaf clover.
Can be installed alongside Point Strike or Critical Delay in order to further increase the critical chance.

### Wiki
Arrow Mutation is a bow mod that converts any unused Secondary Ammo into Arrows, though does not affect their ammo capacity. The affected bow will only convert ammo while equipped, and will not convert any ammo type used by holstered secondary weapons until their own ammo is full.
Converted ammo is denoted by a Mutate symbol. The final amount of ammo restored is rounded to the nearest integer.
**Tips:**
Functions well with Sentinel's Vacuum or Chesa Kubrow's Retrieve, which automatically collect unused ammo as needed.

### Wiki
Assault Mode is a mod that allows Sentinels to attack the first visible enemy in range.
Acqusition
Assault Mode is automatically acquired upon obtaining any Sentinel.
**Notes:**
After Update 24.0, all Sentinels now come with Assault Mode instead of their specific attack precepts.
Without this mod equipped, the Sentinel's equipped weapon will not attack.
It cannot be equipped at the same time as other, Sentinel-specific, weapon attack precepts.
Range
Sentinels' target acquisition range can be increased by +% Zoom mods equipped on their sentinel weapon.
* See: Eagle Eye/Bugs.
** Unobtainable, superseded by Assault Mode.
Reach and other melee range increasing mods may also increase the target acquisition for some melee robotic weapons (Deconstructor).
**Trivia:**
Assault Mode is the first universal Sentinel attack precept.
The Sentinel shown in the Mod card is Oxylus.
When changing from the original Swift Deth, the word "the" was lost in the description.

## Assimilate
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Nyx | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
Can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under the Arbiters of Hexis, or the rank of Flawless under New Loka, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.
This mod can periodically be acquired from The Circuit.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Absorb Augment: Nyx can use weapons during Absorb and its duration is infinite, but it consumes 11 Energy/s and its area of effect is halved.
- **Rank 1:** Absorb Augment: Nyx can use weapons during Absorb and its duration is infinite, but it consumes 9.5 Energy/s and its area of effect is halved.
- **Rank 2:** Absorb Augment: Nyx can use weapons during Absorb and its duration is infinite, but it consumes 8 Energy/s and its area of effect is halved.
- **Rank 3:** Absorb Augment: Nyx can use weapons during Absorb and its duration is infinite, but it consumes 6.5 Energy/s and its area of effect is halved.

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Maxim — Common (100.00%)
- New Loka, Flawless — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Assimilate is a Warframe Augment Mod for Nyx that changes Absorb into a channeled ability and allows use of weapons and basic maneuvers like rolling, at the cost of reducing Absorb's radius by half..
**Notes:**
Players can perform the revive action, fire primary/secondary weapons, melee attacks, jump, and interact with objects (hacking terminals, power cells, etc.) during Assimilate.
Self-stagger from explosive weapons like the Lenz or Ogris will not apply when this augment is active.
Assimilate will end if Nyx runs out of energy, or if deactivated by pressing the ability key again (default 4).
Nyx cannot replenish energy using Energy Vampire, Rally Point, Rift Plane's innate energy regeneration, Squad Energy Restores, Energy Siphon, Energy Nexus, Dreamer's Bond, Wellspring, Rage, and/or Hunter Adrenaline while Assimilate is active.
The energy drain from Assimilate will not be converted to Shields by Brief Respite or the Augur Mods.
Energy can be replenished by Energy Orbs, Orokin Void Death Orb's energy restores, Equilibrium, Spellbound Harvest, Arcane Energize, and Emergence Dissipate's Energy Motes while the ability is active.
Allows ally bullets and projectiles to pass through Absorb.
Ally bullets and projectiles that passed through Absorb with Assimilate have their Critical Damage doubled, similar to Electric Shield.
Critical damage bonus doesn't stack with Electric Shield.
Doesn't apply to Nyx' own attacks.

## Astral Autopsy
Fatal strikes against an enemy also perform a Codex Scan. Scans require an equipped Codex Scanner and an available charge.
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** vazarin | **Drain:** 10 | **Compatible:** Archmelee | **Max Rank:** 0

### Drop Locations
- Kosma Gokstad Officer — Rare (0.10%)
- Kosma Gokstad Pilot — Rare (0.10%)
- Cephalon Simaris, Astral Autopsy
 — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Astral Autopsy is an Archwing melee mod that allows melee kills to count as scans for the Codex, assuming Codex Scanner charges are available.
This mod can be bought from Cephalon Simaris for 100,000 Standing.
Also works with Synthesis Scanner charges. If you have purchased the 'Sol-Battery Widget' for the Scanner, it does not consume charges.
**Trivia:**
This is the fifth mod that has no ranks; the first being Coolant Leak (prior to a rework), the second being the Legendary Core (which does not function as a mod, more as a consumable upgrade), the third being Shrapnel Rounds, and the fourth being Precision Munition.

## Astral Bond
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** COMPANION | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
The mod can be bought from The Business for 20,000 Standing after reaching Rank 3 - Doer with Solaris United.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Damage dealt by Operator or Drifter grants 10% damage and 5% Void Damage to your Companion's attacks for 10s. Companion Void Damage adds +5% Amp and Energy Efficiency to Operator or Drifter for 5s.
- **Rank 1:** Damage dealt by Operator or Drifter grants 20% damage and 10% Void Damage to your Companion's attacks for 10s. Companion Void Damage adds +10% Amp and Energy Efficiency to Operator or Drifter for 5s.
- **Rank 2:** Damage dealt by Operator or Drifter grants 30% damage and 15% Void Damage to your Companion's attacks for 10s. Companion Void Damage adds +15% Amp and Energy Efficiency to Operator or Drifter for 5s.
- **Rank 3:** Damage dealt by Operator or Drifter grants 40% damage and 20% Void Damage to your Companion's attacks for 10s. Companion Void Damage adds +20% Amp and Energy Efficiency to Operator or Drifter for 5s.
- **Rank 4:** Damage dealt by Operator or Drifter grants 50% damage and 25% Void Damage to your Companion's attacks for 10s. Companion Void Damage adds +25% Amp and Energy Efficiency to Operator or Drifter for 5s.
- **Rank 5:** Damage dealt by Operator or Drifter grants 60% damage and 30% Void Damage to your Companion's attacks for 10s. Companion Void Damage adds +30% Amp and Energy Efficiency to Operator or Drifter for 5s.

### Wiki
Astral Bond is a Companion mod that adds damage and Void damage to the companion for 10 seconds when dealing damage with an Amp. In return, when the companion deals Void damage, Amp and Transference efficiency is granted for 5 seconds.
**Notes:**
Can be triggered by damage dealt with Void Sling.
The added Void damage to the Companion's weapon allows Manifold Bond to proc Void status on their Precept mods.
Stacks with other sources of amp ammo efficiency, such as the amp arcane Eternal Logistics. Combining the two allows the amp to gain 100% ammo efficiency, granting it infinite ammo.
Unlike Xata's Whisper it allows companions to deal damage to Eidolon shields and kill Thrax Centurion's and Thrax Legatus' spectral forms.

### Wiki
Astral Twilight is a stance mod for Glaive-type weapons, featuring highly mobile spins and sweeping slashes.
**Notes:**
Many of the attacks have physical damage multipliers, i.e. Impact, Puncture, and Slash damage.
The second and third attacks of Morning Sun have a 1.25x physical damage multiplier.
Every attack of Midnight Cloud has a 1.25x physical damage multiplier.
Every attack of Falling Star has a 1.25x physical damage multiplier.
The last attack of Rising Moon has a 1.25x physical damage multiplier.
**Trivia:**
The existence of this mod was leaked in Update 15, when it made appearances in the loading screen and the Codex. It was also available from mod packs and transmutation for a short time before it was patched in Update 15.5.2. Astral Twilight was formally introduced in Update 15.11.
Astral Twilight was initially offered as a reward from completing the Overtake Tactical Alert, which was active from January 22, 2015 to January 26, 2015.
This was the first Stance mod that did not drop from enemy units, but instead rewarded from a Tactical Alert.

## Atlantis Vulcan
Rapid strikes, deceptive movements.
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** vazarin | **Drain:** -2 | **Compatible:** Nunchaku | **Max Rank:** 3

### Drop Locations
- Aurax Baculus — Rare (0.11%)

### Wiki
Atlantis Vulcan is a stance mod for Nunchaku-type weapons, specializing in fast, multi-hit whirling strikes.
Atlantis is a mythological island nation that, according to legend, sank into the Atlantic Ocean. Vulcan is the Roman god of fire and heat. All of the Atlantis Vulcan combos incorporate both a weather event involving water and a synonym for fire in their names.

## Auger Strike
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Melee | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
This mod was previously acquired by surviving for 30 minutes or longer in the Operation: Mutalist Incursions Event, and again later in the Divine Will Tactical Alert as a rare drop from completing its Razorback assassination mission.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +20% Puncture
- **Rank 1:** +40% Puncture
- **Rank 2:** +60% Puncture
- **Rank 3:** +80% Puncture
- **Rank 4:** +100% Puncture
- **Rank 5:** +120% Puncture

### Drop Locations
- Eidolon Gantulyst — Legendary (0.84%)
- Razorback — Rare (5.53%)

### Wiki
The Auger Strike mod increases Puncture damage of a melee weapon by 20% per rank for a maximum of 120% at rank 5.
**Notes:**
Can be combined with Sundering Strike and Rending Strike to provide a 290% increase to Puncture damage.
Compared to a base elemental mod (+90%) in terms of raw damage, Auger Strike becomes more effective when a weapon's Puncture damage exceeds 75% of total weapon damage. This does not take damage type multipliers into consideration.
**Trivia:**
Auger Strike is the first in a three-member series of 120% melee physical damage mods in which the first letter of each mod forms the series "A-B-C".
It is the only mod in this series not to be offered as a periodic sale item by Baro Ki'Teer.
Similar to its cousins, this mod's artwork depicts its modeling Warframe, Nyx, with her Immortal body skin.

## Augur Secrets
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** WARFRAME | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +4% Ability Strength
- **Rank 1:** +8% Ability Strength
- **Rank 2:** +12% Ability Strength
- **Rank 3:** +16% Ability Strength
- **Rank 4:** +20% Ability Strength
- **Rank 5:** +24% Ability Strength

### Drop Locations
- Recon Commander — Legendary (0.50%)
- Narmer Thumper Bull — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Narmer Thumper Doma — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Narmer Thumper — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Tusk Thumper Bull — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Tusk Thumper Doma — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Tusk Thumper — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Earth/Cetus (Level 30 - 50 Cetus Bounty), Rotation B — Rare (2.20%)
- Earth/Cetus (Level 30 - 50 Cetus Bounty), Rotation B — Rare (5.41%)

### Wiki
Augur Secrets is a set mod that increases the Ability Strength of a Warframe.
**Notes:**
Stacks with Intensify, Blind Rage, Transient Fortitude, Power Drift, Energy Conversion and Growing Power for a total of +298% Ability Strength (when 4 Growing Power are active +373% Ability Strength).
Replacing Intensify with Umbral Intensify, Umbral Vitality, and Umbral Fiber will grant a total of +334% Ability Strength, or +409% Ability Strength when 4 Growing Power are active.
Seems like the best way to farm Augur Secrets is to play the level 30-50 Cetus Bounty. This requires Mastery Rank 3 or higher. The mission's 4th and 5th stages have a 2.20% and 5.41% chance of dropping respectively during Pool B (this refreshes every cycle or 2.5 hours). If you do not see it in the level 30-50 rare drop, you will want to wait for another cycle to attain this mod. Whilst it can drop from the Recon Commander, the drop chance of 0.5% is less than ideal.

## Augur Seeker
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Pistol | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +15% Status Duration
- **Rank 1:** +30% Status Duration
- **Rank 2:** +45% Status Duration
- **Rank 3:** +60% Status Duration
- **Rank 4:** +75% Status Duration
- **Rank 5:** +90% Status Duration

### Drop Locations
- Recon Commander — Legendary (0.50%)
- Narmer Thumper Bull — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Narmer Thumper Doma — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Narmer Thumper — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Tusk Thumper Bull — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Tusk Thumper Doma — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Tusk Thumper — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Earth/Cetus (Level 20 - 40 Cetus Bounty), Rotation B — Rare (2.27%)
- Earth/Cetus (Level 20 - 40 Cetus Bounty), Rotation B — Rare (5.88%)

### Wiki
Augur Seeker is a set mod that increases the duration of Status Effects of secondary weapons.
**Notes:**
Stack with Perpetual Agony for a total of +180% Status Duration.
For Acrid, stacks with Toxic Sequence for a total of +290% Status Duration.
Augur Seeker's effects are only visible on Status Effects with an associated duration, either increasing the duration of the associated debuff (Puncture, Cold, Magnetic, Corrosive, Radiation, and Viral), or the number of ticks associated with DoT effects (Slash, Toxin, Gas, and Heat).
This mod will not affect the duration of crowd control effects generated by Status Effects (staggers from Impact, the panic duration of Heat, and the stun animation caused by Electricity).
Increased Status Duration will slow down the Armor Strip effect of Heat. For example, with +100% status duration, the armor strip will occur every second instead of every half second. As a result, the full 50% armor strip will only be achieved after 4 seconds.
Status Effects from the radial blasts of Syndicate Weapon Augments and Syndicate Weapons are not affected by this mod.

## Augursetmod

## Auto Breach
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** universal | **Drain:** 0 | **Compatible:** Parazon | **Max Rank:** 0

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +30% chance to auto complete Hacking

### Drop Locations
- Eris/Cyath (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Eris/Gnathos (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Neptune/Nereid (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Pluto/Oceanum (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Sedna/Kelpie (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Sedna/Tikoloshe (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Uranus/Rosalind (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)

### Wiki
Auto Breach is a Parazon mod that gives a 30% chance of automatically completing a Hacking console.
**Notes:**
When Auto Breach triggers, the hacking screen will appear without puzzle and an "Auto Breach" message pops up later.
Works for consoles in Terminal Hacking Mastery Test at Rank 5 and Data Vaults in Spy missions.
Failing or canceling a hack will prevent Auto Breach from being used for that terminal again.
Has a short activation delay of 0.3s, if a Cipher is used instantly after initiating a hack then Auto Breach can't trigger.
Does not interfere with the Nightwave challenge "Machine Interference".
Does function on the Razorback Door Console. However, the Razorback Cipher will still be consumed.

- **Rank 3:** Nautilus has 68% chance to repair nearby Railjack hull damages and extinguishes fires on Railjack. Cooldown: 20s.
- **Rank 4:** Nautilus has 85% chance to repair nearby Railjack hull damages and extinguishes fires on Railjack. Cooldown: 20s.
- **Rank 5:** Nautilus has 100% chance to repair nearby Railjack hull damages and extinguishes fires on Railjack. Cooldown: 20s.

### Wiki
Auto Omni is a precept mod for Nautilus and Nautilus Prime that grants it a chance to repair Railjack hull damages and extinguish fires. It has a 20-second cooldown for every use.
**Notes:**
Does not consume the owner's Revolite.

## Avenging Truth
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Silva & Aegis | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod is acquired by attaining the rank of Crusader with the Arbiters of Hexis, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.
Purchased from Ergo Glast during Operation: Ambulas Reborn for 75 Animo Beacons.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Blocking absorbs 20% of incoming damage, stored as Extra Damage for the next charge attack., +0.3 'Truth'
- **Rank 1:** Blocking absorbs 30% of incoming damage, stored as Extra Damage for the next charge attack., +0.5 'Truth'
- **Rank 2:** Blocking absorbs 40% of incoming damage, stored as Extra Damage for the next charge attack., +0.8 'Truth'
- **Rank 3:** Blocking absorbs 50% of incoming damage, stored as Extra Damage for the next charge attack., +1 'Truth'

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Crusader — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Avenging Truth is a Weapon Augment Mod exclusive to the Silva & Aegis and Silva & Aegis Prime that allows them to absorb a percentage of incoming damage while blocking which will power up the next heavy attack, and adds a Truth effect.
**Notes:**
The damage stored is added to the Heavy Attack damage after base damage mods like Pressure Point and is affected by the Combo Multiplier.
Bonus damage is applied after base damage bonuses but before elemental damage bonuses.
As an example, when using a Silva & Aegis Prime with a rank 5 Pressure Point and a rank 5 Shocking Touch with a Combo Multiplier of 4.0x after storing 3000 damage, the final damage would be [ (1590 (1 + 120%) ) + 3000] (1 + 90%) 4.
**Trivia:**
Blocking behavior has changed dramatically with the Update 26, causing all melee weapons to block 100% damage in a frontal cone, which has given this mod a different tactical feel.

## Aviator
**Rarity:** Common | **Polarity:** vazarin | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** WARFRAME | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This was originally rewarded to players who collected at least 50 units of Oxium during Operation Oxium Espionage.
Was previously obtainable from Ergo Glast in a Relay for 75 Animo Beacons during Operation: Ambulas Reborn.
Currently drops from the Grineer Nox unit.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Reduced damage by 10% while airborne
- **Rank 1:** Reduced damage by 20% while airborne
- **Rank 2:** Reduced damage by 30% while airborne
- **Rank 3:** Reduced damage by 40% while airborne

### Drop Locations
- Nox — Uncommon (0.58%)
- Kuva Trokarian — Uncommon (0.76%)
- Operation: Orphix Venom, Rotation C — Uncommon (14.29%)
- Deimos Jugulus Rex — Uncommon (18.97%)
- Operation: Orphix Venom, Rotation A — Rare (4.55%)
- Anu Brachiolyst — Common (6.05%)
- Anu Mantalyst — Common (6.05%)
- Anu Pyrolyst — Common (6.05%)
- Anu Symbilyst — Common (6.05%)
- Operation: Orphix Venom, Rotation A — Rare (6.52%)

### Wiki
Aviator is an Exilus mod that reduces damage taken while airborne.
**Notes:**
Airborne damage reduction affects Titania's Razorwing, Hildryn's Aegis Storm, Jade's Glory on High, and Oraxia while walllatching with her Silken Stride active.
Can be used with Agility Drift to grant a 1 - [ (1 - Aviator) * (1 - Agility Drift) ] damage reduction while airborne. In addition, can be used with Agility Drift and Aerodynamic to grant 1 - [ (1 - Aviator) * (1 - Agility Drift) * (1 - Aerodynamic) ] damage reduction while airborne.
Can be used in conjunction with rolling in the air for an even greater damage reduction.
This mod cannot be used simultaneously with Ironclad Flight on Titania.
Zephyr was introduced shortly after Operation Oxium Espionage concluded, making this the first mod hinting at upcoming content.
Originally this mod only provided 5% damage reduction at base rank, up to 20% when fully ranked. Operation: Ambulas Reborn saw the return of this mod as well as its damage reduction doubled at all mod levels.

## Axios Javelineers
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Styanax | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under Arbiters of Hexis, or the rank of Flawless under the New Loka, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Axios Javelin Augment: A pair of Styanax Specters spawn to throw javelins, creating vortexes on impact. Impale an enemy to increase vortex duration by 2s.
- **Rank 1:** Axios Javelin Augment: A pair of Styanax Specters spawn to throw javelins, creating vortexes on impact. Impale an enemy to increase vortex duration by 3s.
- **Rank 2:** Axios Javelin Augment: A pair of Styanax Specters spawn to throw javelins, creating vortexes on impact. Impale an enemy to increase vortex duration by 4s.
- **Rank 3:** Axios Javelin Augment: A pair of Styanax Specters spawn to throw javelins, creating vortexes on impact. Impale an enemy to increase vortex duration by 5s.

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Maxim — Common (100.00%)
- New Loka, Flawless — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Axios Javelineers is a Warframe Augment Mod for Styanax that allows Axios Javelin to spawn specters that throw two additional javelins, with a guaranteed chance to spawn a Vortex, while increasing vortex duration when directly striking enemies.
**Notes:**
Normally Axios Javelin only spawns a vortex if you directly strike an enemy with the ability while this augment throws three javelins each with a guaranteed vortex on throw.
When directly hitting enemies with any of the Javelins, the vortex duration is increased by an additional 5 seconds, affected by Ability Duration.
Vortex duration without this augment is set at 2 seconds, unaffected by mods.
Precise hits with high Ability Range allows the vortex to fully pull in enemies that are further away.

Balanced Posture is a Posture Mod for Beasts granting them full autonomy. Enemies that wander within the beast's path receive Stagger.

## Balefire Surge
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Hildryn | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Partner under The Perrin Sequence, or the rank of Genius under Cephalon Suda, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Balefire Augment: Fully charged direct hits restore 100 Shield to Hildryn. Impact with Nullifier Shields will destroy them and restore 300 Shield.
- **Rank 1:** Balefire Augment: Fully charged direct hits restore 150 Shield to Hildryn. Impact with Nullifier Shields will destroy them and restore 450 Shield.
- **Rank 2:** Balefire Augment: Fully charged direct hits restore 200 Shield to Hildryn. Impact with Nullifier Shields will destroy them and restore 600 Shield.
- **Rank 3:** Balefire Augment: Fully charged direct hits restore 250 Shield to Hildryn. Impact with Nullifier Shields will destroy them and restore 750 Shield.

### Drop Locations
- Cephalon Suda, Genius — Common (100.00%)
- The Perrin Sequence, Partner — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Balefire Surge is a Warframe Augment Mod for Hildryn's Balefire that allows it to restore shields on direct hits from fully charged shots, and giving the ability to instantly destroy nullifier shields.
**Notes:**
Shield restore is affected by Power Strength.
Direct hits from multishots will also restore shields.
Can grant overshields.
Punch Through will prevent direct hits (except for nullifier shields), negating much of the augment.
Does not destroy the nullifier shield on sortie hijack missions.

## Bane Of Corpus

### Stats by Rank

- **Rank 1:** x1.05 Damage to Corpus

### Wiki
Barrel Diffusion is a mod that increases the multishot of pistols. These additional rounds do not consume extra ammunition.
**Notes:**
The additional rounds do not consume additional ammunition.
At rank 4 or higher, this mod guarantees that at least 2 rounds will be fired for every 1 round of ammunition expended.
At maximum rank, this mod grants an 100% chance to fire one additional round (2 rounds/shot) and a 20% chance to fire two additional rounds (3 rounds/shot).
Equipping this mod and Lethal Torrent simultaneously will provide 180% multishot, giving the sidearm a 100% chance to fire one additional round (2 rounds/shot) and an 80% chance to fire two additional rounds (3 rounds/shot).
For weapons that fire multiple pellets (i.e. a Bronco) the pellet count is multiplied by the multishot value.
A Bronco with a rank 5 Barrel Diffusion will fire pellets, meaning it has a 100% chance to fire 15 pellets and a 40% chance to fire 1 extra pellet.
The in-game UI will consider any possible multishot capabilities when showing total damage numbers, and does not represent single-projectile damage.
Total damage displayed does not represent the actual damage per shot, but the expected average damage.
Equipping this mod increases the status chance of a weapon indirectly. This is due to the possibility of shooting more than one projectile.

**Notes:**
Also increases the distance/speed of rolls.
At max rank, Battering Maneuver adds a concussive effect that deals 160 Impact damage with a 200% status chance within a 3-meter radius as well as a guaranteed knockdown within a 0.75-meter radius from where a player initiates a Bullet Jump.
Visual effects added during Bullet Jumps will always be the same color, regardless of Warframe Energy or Emission colors.

## Berserker Fury
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Melee | **Max Rank:** 3

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Melee Kill: +5.8% Attack Speed for 10s. Stacks up to 2x.
- **Rank 1:** On Melee Kill: +11.7% Attack Speed for 10s. Stacks up to 2x.
- **Rank 2:** On Melee Kill: +17.5% Attack Speed for 10s. Stacks up to 2x.
- **Rank 3:** On Melee Kill: +23.3% Attack Speed for 10s. Stacks up to 2x.

### Drop Locations
- Corrupted Ancient — Rare (0.03%)
- Chroma — Uncommon (0.60%)
- Commandeered Ember Prime — Uncommon (0.60%)
- Commandeered Protea Prime — Uncommon (0.60%)
- Commandeered Trinity Prime — Uncommon (0.60%)
- Infested Mesa — Uncommon (0.60%)
- Tenno Specter — Uncommon (0.60%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 6 (Normal) — Rare (1.03%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 4 (Normal) — Rare (1.49%)

### Wiki
Berserker Fury is a mod that temporarily increases a melee weapon's attack speed for 10 to 20 seconds on killing an enemy, stacking up to two times.
**Notes:**
Cannot be equipped with Fury (Primed Fury).
The attack speed buff from Berserker Fury is additive with all other sources of attack speed, including mods and abilities.
For example, a full Berserker bonus in combination with Spoiled Strike will modify the weapon's attack speed to be 1.0 (1 - Spoiled Strike + Berserker Fury) of its base.
Stack duration fully refreshes upon killing and only expires one stack at a time, granting the mod an effective duration of 20 seconds.
**Tips:**
Berserker will match Fury and Gladiator Vice in effectiveness with just a single kill, and will surpass Primed Fury and Quickening with two stacks, making it potentially more valuable than other attack speed mods so long as you sustain the bonus.
More effective in missions with high kill rates. Less effective for some bosses where few weak enemies may spawn.
**Trivia:**
When it was first introduced, Berserker Fury was known simply as Berserker and increased attack speed on critical hits, even if they did not kill. This was changed in Update 30.5 as part of a series of nerfs to melee mods as a whole.
Prior to Update 13.8.1, Berserker would treat melee Stealth Finisher Damage as a critical hit, activating or refreshing the speed bonus. However, despite their damage numbers still displaying as yellow, finishing attacks are no longer automatically considered critical hits.
On April Fool's Day 2018, the mod card was changed to read out "MY LOVE FOR YOU IS LIKE A TRUCK!", in reference to the song Berserker by alternative rock band Love Among Freaks. The mod's effects were otherwise unchanged.

## Bhisaj-Bal
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Paris Prime | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
Bhisaj-Bal can be obtained by reaching Rank 4 - Friend with the Entrati and purchased for 20,000 Standing from Father.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Restore 50 Health for every 3 Status effects., +15% Status Chance
- **Rank 1:** Restore 100 Health for every 3 Status effects., +30% Status Chance
- **Rank 2:** Restore 150 Health for every 3 Status effects., +45% Status Chance
- **Rank 3:** Restore 200 Health for every 3 Status effects., +60% Status Chance
- **Rank 4:** Restore 250 Health for every 3 Status effects., +75% Status Chance
- **Rank 5:** Restore 300 Health for every 3 Status effects., +90% Status Chance

### Wiki
Bhisaj-Bal is a Weapon Augment Mod for Paris Prime that restores health every 3 Status Effects, and increases status chance.
**Notes:**
The number of status effects accumulated is shown as a buff.
Multiple status effects from Multishot or Punch Through will count towards the buff.
Multiple status effects in one hit, from having over 100% Status Chance, will only count as 1 effect for Bhisaj-Bal.
**Trivia:**
The name is likely of Sanskrit origin, with Bhisaj (भिषज्) meaning medicine, doctor, healer; or healing, curing as an adjective. Bal is possibly shortened from Bala (बल) meaning power or force, or Bali (बलि) meaning tax, or victim.

- **Rank 2:** On Weak Point Kill: +75% Viral and Magnetic Damage and Status Chance for 15s

### Wiki
Biotic Rounds is a Weapon Augment Mod for AX-52 that grants Viral and Magnetic damage and Status Chance for 15 seconds on weak point kills.
**Notes:**
At max rank, Biotic Rounds grants +150% Viral damage, +150% Magnetic damage, and +150% status chance. In other words, the bonus shown on the mod is the bonus for each effect, not the total.
Viral and Magnetic bonuses are additive to similar mods like Cryo Rounds and Magnetic Capacity.
Status chance bonus is additive to similar mods like Rifle Aptitude.
Additional weak point kills will refresh the effect duration.

## Biting Frost
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Frost | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of General under Steel Meridian, or the rank of Genius under Cephalon Suda, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Frost gains +|CHANCE|% Critical Chance and +|DAMAGE|% Critical Damage against frozen enemies.
- **Rank 1:** Frost gains +|CHANCE|% Critical Chance and +|DAMAGE|% Critical Damage against frozen enemies.
- **Rank 2:** Frost gains +|CHANCE|% Critical Chance and +|DAMAGE|% Critical Damage against frozen enemies.
- **Rank 3:** Frost gains +|CHANCE|% Critical Chance and +|DAMAGE|% Critical Damage against frozen enemies.

### Drop Locations
- Cephalon Suda, Genius — Common (100.00%)
- Steel Meridian, General — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Biting Frost is a Warframe Augment Mod for Frost's passive, gaining increased Critical Chance and Critical Damage on enemies frozen by 10 Cold status effects.
**Notes:**
Critical Chance and Multiplier bonuses apply to all weapon types, including primary, secondary, and melee.
Bonuses are not affected by Ability Strength.
Bonuses are additive to similar mods such as Point Strike and Vital Sense.
Effects that rapidly apply 10 Cold stacks include:
Frost's Freeze's direct hit
Frost's Snow Globe's activation while within its range
Frost's Avalanche
Gauss' Thermal Sunder double cast (Helminth subsumable) or with Redline active
Voruna's Fangs of Raksh (applies 5 random status effects which may include Cold)
Itzal's Cosmic Crush with Cold Snap augment
Cyte-09's Neutralizer's alternate fire grenade
Enemies are not "frozen" by:
Petrify
Condemn
Also affects abilities which are treated as weapons, such as Breach Surge sparks.
Most of these abilities have 0% base critical chance, meaning the critical chance buff has no effect.
The critical damage bonus can still be taken advantage of when combined with flat critical chance bonuses that affect abilities, such as Arcane Avenger and Covenant.
Enemies that have status caps, such as units with Overguard active or Acolytes will not be affected by Biting Frost as they cannot be frozen.

### Wiki
Blackout Pulse is a Plexus Battle Defensive mod. It launches an electromagnetic pulse in a straight line that, upon contact with a surface or pressing the ability button again (default 1), creates a field that temporarily disables enemy ships while dealing Electricity damage, then delivers additional pulses based on how many enemies hit. Initial pulse range is increased when manually detonated.
**Notes:**
Energy cost and duration are not affected by Reactors or Warframe mods.
Damage is affected by Ability Strength.
Range is affected by Ability Range.

## Blast Shield
**Rarity:** Common | **Polarity:** penjaga | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Moa | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
Blast Shield is automatically acquired upon obtaining a MOA built with the Nychus Model.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Overshields increased by +500. Leap at an enemy within 5m dealing 5 Impact Damage and knocking down other enemies within 2.5m and resets Overshields.
- **Rank 1:** Overshields increased by +1000. Leap at an enemy within 6m dealing 10 Impact Damage and knocking down other enemies within 3m and resets Overshields.
- **Rank 2:** Overshields increased by +1500. Leap at an enemy within 7m dealing 15 Impact Damage and knocking down other enemies within 3.5m and resets Overshields.
- **Rank 3:** Overshields increased by +2000. Leap at an enemy within 8m dealing 20 Impact Damage and knocking down other enemies within 4m and resets Overshields.
- **Rank 4:** Overshields increased by +2500. Leap at an enemy within 9m dealing 25 Impact Damage and knocking down other enemies within 4.5m and resets Overshields.
- **Rank 5:** Overshields increased by +3000. Leap at an enemy within 10m dealing 30 Impact Damage and knocking down other enemies within 5m and resets Overshields.

### Wiki
Blast Shield is a precept mod for MOAs that increases the MOA's Overshield capacity, and allows the MOA to jump at a target within range, dealing Impact damage, refilling the MOA's Shields, and releasing a shockwave that knocks down enemies.
**Notes:**
The MOA's base Overshields are 600, resulting in a total Overshields capacity of 3600 at max rank.
Shields (including Overshields) are fully replenished on ability use.
Synergizes with Link Redirection and/or high-shield Warframes like Hildryn.
Shield refill occurs even when mission modifiers (such as Nightmare or Sortie) disable them.
The shockwave knocks down any enemies that make contact with it.
The primary target is not knocked down.
The shockwave deals twice the damage of the initial hit.
Like the other Nychus-Model Mod (Hard Engage), Blast Shield is NOT affected by MOA's equipped weapon.
Unlike Hard Engage, Blast Shield is NOT affected by the equipped weapon's mods.
The weapon itself is still useful for ranged attack when neither mod's ability is being used.

This mod is more cost effective than a Rank 3 Point Blank mod and a rank 3 Incendiary Coat mod put together (9 mod capacity compared to 16).
The +60% base damage will apply to the +60% heat damage, giving approximately +96% heat damage.

## Blazing Pillage
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Hildryn | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Partner under The Perrin Sequence, or the rank of Genius under Cephalon Suda, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.
This mod can periodically be acquired from The Circuit.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Pillage Augment: Enemies affected by Haven will be set ablaze for 50 Heat Damage and restore 20 additional Shields to Hildryn.
- **Rank 1:** Pillage Augment: Enemies affected by Haven will be set ablaze for 100 Heat Damage and restore 30 additional Shields to Hildryn.
- **Rank 2:** Pillage Augment: Enemies affected by Haven will be set ablaze for 150 Heat Damage and restore 40 additional Shields to Hildryn.
- **Rank 3:** Pillage Augment: Enemies affected by Haven will be set ablaze for 200 Heat Damage and restore 50 additional Shields to Hildryn.

### Drop Locations
- Cephalon Suda, Genius — Common (100.00%)
- The Perrin Sequence, Partner — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Blazing Pillage is a Warframe Augment Mod for Hildryn that makes enemies affected by Haven receive Heat damage with a guaranteed proc and restore Shields to Hildryn when hit by Pillage.
**Notes:**
Heat damage and shield restore are affected by Ability Strength.
Because Heat procs will temporarily reduce half of an enemy's current armor rating, this makes Pillage itself more efficient as enemies on fire will have half of the remaining armor that Pillage strips, as long as they stay on fire.
Blazing Pillage will only trigger on enemies marked by the expanding pulse, while linked to Hildryn with Haven activated.
**Tips:**
This Augment gives Hildryn a much-needed edge against the Infested as the overall lack of armor or shields in this faction makes Pillage as it is far less effective against them, in turn making it more diffcult for Hildryn to restore her shields.

**Trivia:**
Blending Talons is currently unique from other Warframe augments for Exalted Weapons such as Chromatic Blade, Mesa's Waltz and Balefire Surge, as it does not need to be toggled to grant its passive bonus to Garuda's talons as long as the enemy suffers from Slash procs from any source.

## Blind Justice
Reverse grip style emphasizing slashing and impaling strikes.
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** -2 | **Compatible:** Nikanas | **Max Rank:** 3

### Drop Locations
- Sedna/Vodyanoi (Arena) — Legendary (0.50%)
- Sedna/Yam (Arena) — Legendary (0.50%)
- Hunhow — Uncommon (30.56%)
- Protector Stalker — Uncommon (30.56%)
- Shadow Stalker — Uncommon (30.56%)
- Stalker — Uncommon (30.56%)
- Knave Specter — Common (36.36%)

### Wiki
Blind Justice is a stance mod for Nikanas, specializing in high mobility combined with fast overhead slashes.
**Notes:**
Many of the attacks have a Slash damage multiplier.
The first and second attack of Guiding Light have a 2xSlash damage multiplier.
The second attack of Heeding Call has a 2xSlash damage multiplier.
The third attack of Destined Path has a 2xSlash damage multiplier.
Certain attacks have a status chance multiplier.
The third hit of the third attack of Zatōs Creed has a 2x status chance multiplier.
The Slide Attack is unique from other Nikana stances; the scabbard is used in addition to the blade. In addition, the attack also has a forced Lifted status effect, unlike other stances.
Heeding Call can proc the Zaw Arcane Exodia Hunt on its slam attack.
Sepfahn Zaws are the only Nikana Zaws.
**Trivia:**
This stance's combo animations were first seen at Tennolive 2014.
Blind Justice is the third Nikana Stance, following Tranquil Cleave and Decisive Judgement. It is the only one out of the three that is uncommon.
The name "Blind Justice" was confirmed by Geoff Crookes to be a nod to the fictional Japanese character 座頭市 (Zatoichi), who was a blind swordsman best known for his use of the reverse-grip style of swordsmanship. The name of the first combo Zatōs Creed is a further reference to the name.
The grip is not changed during other animations, including walking and sprinting or jumping, causing the sword to spin between stopping and starting movement.
Like Decisive Judgement, Blind Justice changes the weapon's grip during attacks, in this case using a single-hand reverse-grip style of holding the Nikana. Blind Justice is also the only stance that completely changes the weapon's animations, with unique movements for blocking, stealth attacks, counterattack finishers, wall attacks, and idle animations.
Unlike Tranquil Cleave and Decisive Judgement, which portrays Frost performing the combo, Blind Justice shows Banshee instead.

## Blind Rage
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** WARFRAME | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 10

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +9% Ability Strength, -5% Ability Efficiency
- **Rank 1:** +18% Ability Strength, -10% Ability Efficiency
- **Rank 2:** +27% Ability Strength, -15% Ability Efficiency
- **Rank 3:** +36% Ability Strength, -20% Ability Efficiency
- **Rank 4:** +45% Ability Strength, -25% Ability Efficiency
- **Rank 5:** +54% Ability Strength, -30% Ability Efficiency
- **Rank 6:** +63% Ability Strength, -35% Ability Efficiency
- **Rank 7:** +72% Ability Strength, -40% Ability Efficiency
- **Rank 8:** +81% Ability Strength, -45% Ability Efficiency
- **Rank 9:** +90% Ability Strength, -50% Ability Efficiency
- **Rank 10:** +99% Ability Strength, -55% Ability Efficiency

### Drop Locations
- Derelict Vault — Rare (4.17%)

### Wiki
Blind Rage is a Corrupted Mod that increases Ability Strength while reducing Ability Efficiency of Warframe abilities.
**Notes:**
At rank 5, Blind Rage will give 24% more Ability Strength than Intensify for the same cost, but abilities will use more energy. At this rank, a fully-ranked Streamline alone is sufficient to negate the downside.
Fleeting Expertise can be used to negate a maxed Blind Rage's downside at the cost of Ability Duration.
Can be stacked with Intensify, Transient Fortitude, Augur Secrets and Power Drift to provide a total of +223% Ability Strength.
You may also stack it with Energy Conversion to get a total of 273% after collecting an Energy Orb.
Combining this with Fleeting Expertise will grant you +5% Ability Efficiency, 35% when stacked with Streamline, and a total of 129% increase in Ability Strength with Intensify. This will cause most abilities to be shortened considerably, so consider only ranking this mod up to 5 or 6 and combining it with Streamline instead, otherwise use it with builds that do not rely on duration (such as Gara's offensive Mass Vitrify build).
Warframes with lower energy pools may prefer to use lower ranks of this mod to cast more of their abilities.

## Blood For Ammo

### Wiki

**Notes:**
It only replenishes the magazine of the weapon and not the reserve ammo pool.

## Blood Forge
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Garuda | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Exalted under Red Veil, or the rank of General under Steel Meridian, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Bloodletting Augment: Garuda's equipped weapon is reloaded up to 25%.
- **Rank 1:** Bloodletting Augment: Garuda's equipped weapon is reloaded up to 50%.
- **Rank 2:** Bloodletting Augment: Garuda's equipped weapon is reloaded up to 75%.
- **Rank 3:** Bloodletting Augment: Garuda's equipped weapon is reloaded up to 100%.

### Drop Locations
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)
- Steel Meridian, General — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Blood Forge is a Warframe Augment Mod for Garuda's Bloodletting to reload her equipped weapon up to a percentage.
**Notes:**
This mod works effectively for both primary and secondary weapons, as well as Archguns with Gravimags, as long as Garuda is actively using them.
Reloaded ammo is taken from the equipped weapon's ammo reserves. This mod does not generate ammo.
Works well with weapons with slow reload speed (e.g. Nagantaka, Arca Plasmor (Tenet Arca Plasmor), Gorgon and its variants).
Affects weapons that reload one round at a time (e.g. Strun, Corinth, Zarr (Kuva Zarr), Felarx), resulting in a very quick full reload.
Does not count as a reload for certain conditional effects that reset on reload, including:
Status chance and multishot stacks from Sobek & Kuva Sobek's Clip Delegation
Auto-targeting tendrils from Ocucor's passive
Various Incarnon perks:
Punch through, projectile speed, and fire rate from Felarx's Dual-Mode Chamber and Mounting Momentum
Damage increase from Boar Incarnon Genesis & Lato Incarnon Genesis' Reified Bane
Multishot from Sybaris Incarnon Genesis & Strun Incarnon Genesis' Blazing Barrel
Damage increase from Sybaris Incarnon Genesis's Well Rehearsed and Reaver's Rapture
Soma Prime with Hata-Satya will not retain its critical chance bonus when reloaded using Blood Forge.

## Blood Rush
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Melee | **Max Rank:** 10

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +3.6% Critical Chance stacks with Combo Multiplier
- **Rank 1:** +7.3% Critical Chance stacks with Combo Multiplier
- **Rank 2:** +10.9% Critical Chance stacks with Combo Multiplier
- **Rank 3:** +14.6% Critical Chance stacks with Combo Multiplier
- **Rank 4:** +18.2% Critical Chance stacks with Combo Multiplier
- **Rank 5:** +21.8% Critical Chance stacks with Combo Multiplier
- **Rank 6:** +25.5% Critical Chance stacks with Combo Multiplier
- **Rank 7:** +29.1% Critical Chance stacks with Combo Multiplier
- **Rank 8:** +32.8% Critical Chance stacks with Combo Multiplier
- **Rank 9:** +36.4% Critical Chance stacks with Combo Multiplier
- **Rank 10:** +40% Critical Chance stacks with Combo Multiplier

### Drop Locations
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 1 (Normal) — Legendary (0.67%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 3 (Normal) — Legendary (0.67%)
- Lua/Pavlov (Spy), Rotation A — Uncommon (12.18%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation A — Uncommon (13.21%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation A — Rare (7.53%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation A — Rare (9.59%)

### Wiki
Blood Rush is an uncommon Melee mod that increases critical chance as the Melee Combo Counter increases.
**Notes:**
Blood Rush multiplies critical chance based on the Melee Combo Counter tier increase.
Without a Combo Counter, Blood Rush provides no bonus to critical chance. At 2x, it increases critical chance by 0.40 (2 - 1) and at 3x, it increases critical chance by 0.40 (3 - 1). At the standard max Combo Counter of 12x, it increases critical chance by 440%.
Pairs very well with Body Count, Drifting Contact, Gladiator Rush, or The Primary Dexterity & Secondary Dexterity arcanes which allow players to keep the Combo Counter up more consistently.
Highly recommended to use the Focus/Naramon school. The Power Spike passive prevents total combo loss, decaying the counter by only 5 hits at a time. This makes it an exceptionally powerful school for any blood rush build.
Since thrown attacks from Glaive weapons are affected by the Combo Counter, they will also receive any bonus from Blood Rush.
Calculation
The formula for calculating the increased critical chance reached by the mod is as follows:
Crit Chance Weapon Crit Chance [1 + Mod Crit Bonus + Blood Rush Bonus x (Combo Multi - 1)] + Static Crit Bonus
For example, a weapon with 20% base critical chance, modded with maxed True Steel (1.2) and Blood Rush (0.4), and with a Combo Multiplier of 4.0x would reach 20% (1 + 1.2 + 0.4 (4.0 - 1)) chance to crit.
The table below displays the critical chance that a melee weapon can achieve depending on its base critical chance and current combo multiplier.
Blood Rush/Crit Calculation/Equation
A spreadsheet that performs the same calculation, and also allows to enter your Crit Chance % from Crit Mods and the CC% per combo, can be found online here.
**Trivia:**
Prior to Update 26, Blood Rush provided +165% critical chance per combo level. Critical chance was calculated according to the following equation:

## Body Count
**Rarity:** Common | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Melee | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +2s Combo Duration
- **Rank 1:** +4s Combo Duration
- **Rank 2:** +6s Combo Duration
- **Rank 3:** +8s Combo Duration
- **Rank 4:** +10s Combo Duration
- **Rank 5:** +12s Combo Duration

### Drop Locations
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 15 - 25 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation C — Uncommon (13.16%)
- Jupiter/The Ropalolyst (Assassination) — Uncommon (20.00%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 15 - 25 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation C — Rare (5.68%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 15 - 25 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation C — Rare (7.35%)

### Wiki
Body Count is a common Melee mod that extends the duration of the Melee Combo Counter.
**Notes:**
Body Count increases the total melee combo duration (base: 5 seconds) to 17 seconds at max rank.
With Drifting Contact and Gladiator Rush, the combo duration can be further increased to 33 seconds.
Body Count does not affect ability summoned melee weapons such as Exalted Blade, Hysteria and Primal Fury. Summoned melee weapons use their own summoned weapon combo counter. The melee combo counter stays present in the background and decreases with time as normal.
Body Count does, however, benefit non-channeled melee abilities such as Slash Dash, Landslide and Blade Storm.
**Tips:**
Body Count compliments its related mods in the Acolyte mod set, including Blood Rush and Weeping Wounds.

Bomb The Landin' is a K-Drive mod that increases the slam shockwave damage and range.
**Notes:**
Missing iOS controls
The following are the controls to perform a slam shockwave:
PC: Space, Tap LCtrl, Hold LCtrl
PlayStation: X, Tap L1, Hold L1
Xbox: A, Tap LB, Hold LB
Nintendo Switch: B, Tap L Button, Hold L Button

## Bore
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Pistol | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
This mod was acquired by surviving at least 30 minutes in the Operation: Mutalist Incursions Event.
Obtainable from re-accruing Razorback Armada
Was also obtainable from the Divine Will Tactical Alert.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +20% Puncture
- **Rank 1:** +40% Puncture
- **Rank 2:** +60% Puncture
- **Rank 3:** +80% Puncture
- **Rank 4:** +100% Puncture
- **Rank 5:** +120% Puncture

### Drop Locations
- Eidolon Gantulyst — Legendary (0.84%)
- Blite Captain — Uncommon (3.00%)
- Glacik Commander — Uncommon (3.00%)
- Earth/Erpo (Mobile Defense) — Rare (3.76%)
- Europa/Gamygyn (Mobile Defense) — Rare (3.76%)
- Jupiter/Galilea (Sabotage) — Rare (3.76%)
- Neptune/Salacia (Mobile Defense) — Rare (3.76%)
- Razorback — Rare (5.53%)
- Phobos/Kepler (Rush), Rotation C — Rare (7.52%)

### Wiki
The Bore mod increases Puncture damage of a pistol by 20% per rank for a maximum of 120% at Rank 5.
**Notes:**
Can be combined with No Return and Jugulus Spines to provide a 300% increase to Puncture damage.
When calculating total raw damage, a weapon will require a Puncture damage percentage equal to 75% of its total base damage to equal the raw damage increase provided by a standard elemental mod (which increases corresponding elemental damages by 90%).
The higher the Puncture damage percentage over 75%, the more viable this mod will be as opposed to an elemental mod, and vice versa for lower values.
These calculations only pertain to raw damage, and do not take into consideration enemy armor/flesh/shield damage multipliers.
**Trivia:**
One of the few mods that depicts a Warframe with non-standard color schemes, in this case a Nyx with her Immortal skin.

Can also be equipped on the Prisma Grakata.
Ammo Efficiency means the Grakata will not consume ammunition when firing; at full rank, the Grakata will not consume ammunition at all if you reliably score headshots and keep the buff going.
Can be used with Wild Frenzy. However, ammunition will not be refunded if Brain Storm activates during the burst.
Additional headshots will refresh Brain Storm's duration.

## Breach Loader
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Shotgun | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
This mod was acquired by surviving at least 30 minutes in the Operation: Mutalist Incursions Event.
Can also be obtained in the Tactical Alert (Divine Will) as a rare drop from completing the Razorback assassination mission.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +20% Puncture
- **Rank 1:** +40% Puncture
- **Rank 2:** +60% Puncture
- **Rank 3:** +80% Puncture
- **Rank 4:** +100% Puncture
- **Rank 5:** +120% Puncture

### Drop Locations
- Eidolon Gantulyst — Legendary (0.84%)
- Razorback — Rare (5.53%)

### Wiki
Breach Loader is a mod that increases Puncture damage of a shotgun by 20% per rank for a maximum of 120% at Rank 5.
**Notes:**
Can be combined with Accelerated Blast and Flechette to provide a 270% increase to Puncture damage.
This is best suited for the Cedo due to its primary fire's base of entirely Puncture damage.
When calculating total raw damage, a weapon will require a Puncture damage percentage equal to 75% of its total base damage to equal the raw damage increase provided by a standard elemental mod (which increases corresponding elemental damages by 90%).
The higher the Puncture damage percentage over 75%, the more viable this mod will be as opposed to an elemental mod, and vice versa for lower values.
These calculations only pertain to raw damage and do not take into consideration enemy armor/flesh/shield damage multipliers.
**Trivia:**
One of the few mods that depict a Warframe with non-standard color schemes, in this case a Nyx with her Immortal skin.
Breechloader is the correct spelling. A breech is the part of a cannon behind the bore. A breach is an act of breaking or failing to observe a law, agreement, or code of conduct; or a gap in a wall, barrier, or defense, especially one made by an attacking army.
This likely an intended deviation, as the mod does not affect reload. The name simply being a wordplay that combines gun terminology with a word related to puncture.

## Brief Respite
On Ability Cast:
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** -2 | **Compatible:** AURA | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
Brief Respite is dropped by the Orphid Specter, available upon anointing a Silver Grove shrine with the Twilight Apothic.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Squad converts 25% of Energy spent to Shields while Overshields are inactive
- **Rank 1:** Squad converts 50% of Energy spent to Shields while Overshields are inactive
- **Rank 2:** Squad converts 75% of Energy spent to Shields while Overshields are inactive
- **Rank 3:** Squad converts 100% of Energy spent to Shields while Overshields are inactive
- **Rank 4:** Squad converts 125% of Energy spent to Shields while Overshields are inactive
- **Rank 5:** Squad converts 150% of Energy spent to Shields while Overshields are inactive

### Drop Locations
- Orphid Specter — Common (38.60%)

### Wiki
Brief Respite is an Aura Mod that grants additional Shields equal to a percentage of Energy spent whenever an ability is cast.
* Aura mods increase the amount of Mod Capacity
**Notes:**
Stacks with the Augur mod set effect for a total of 390% Energy to shield conversion.
Inaros, Nidus, Kullervo, Hildryn and Lavos (due to having either no energy or no shields) gain no benefit from this aura.
Shields are only replenished from activating abilities. Constant Energy drain from channeling abilities or triggered drain such as Artemis Bow shots do not replenish Shields.
Because the amount of shields restored is based off energy usage, this means that Ability Efficiency can reduce the amount of energy this Aura sees spent on most abilities.
Conversely, equipping Blind Rage to decrease Efficiency increases the effectiveness of the aura.
**Trivia:**
Brief Respite was the first (and is currently the only) aura possessing the Zenurik Zenurik polarity.
The only Warframe to possess a default Zenurik Zenurik aura polarity is Dagath, who released seven years after Brief Respite was introduced.
Dante, Jade and Protea (Protea Prime) possess a default Aura Universal aura polarity, the only other Warframes who "match" Brief Respite by default.

**Notes:**
Cannot be equipped alongside Disabling Conditioning and Precision Conditioning.

### Wiki
Bullet Dance is a stance mod for Gunblades.
**Notes:**
Every attack does 25% bonus physical damage (i.e. Impact, Puncture, and Slash)
The first attack in every combo is a shot.
Samba Slash consists entirely of firing the gunblade.
All ranged attacks also deal slam damage to nearby enemies.
Slam damage is based on single pellet damage of each gunblade, except for Stropha which does not trigger slams on ranged attacks.
The first and third attack of Automatic Rhumba inflict a slam attack with a guaranteed Slash proc. The second and fourth attacks inflict a slam attack that ragdolls enemies.
The first and fourth attacks of Magnum Mambo inflict a slam attack that ragdolls enemies.
The first attack of Lead Tango inflicts a slam attack that ragdolls enemies. The second attack inflicts two slams that both have a guaranteed Slash proc.
The first attack of Samba Slash inflicts a slam attack with a guaranteed Slash proc. The second and third attacks inflict a slam attack that ragdolls enemies.
All attacks of Spinning Uppercut inflict a slam attack that ragdolls enemies.

## Burdened Magazine
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Shotgun | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +10% Magazine Capacity, -3% Reload Speed
- **Rank 1:** +20% Magazine Capacity, -6% Reload Speed
- **Rank 2:** +30% Magazine Capacity, -9% Reload Speed
- **Rank 3:** +40% Magazine Capacity, -12% Reload Speed
- **Rank 4:** +50% Magazine Capacity, -15% Reload Speed
- **Rank 5:** +60% Magazine Capacity, -18% Reload Speed

### Drop Locations
- Derelict Vault — Rare (4.17%)

### Wiki
Burdened Magazine is a Corrupted Mod that increases magazine capacity while reducing the reload speed of Shotguns.
**Notes:**
For any non-integer magazine values the magazine size is simply rounded to the nearest whole number. For example, a Strun modded with a max rank Burdened Magazine will have a calculated magazine size of 6 (1 + 60%), which will simply round to 6 (1 + 60%).
Suitable for shotguns with innately high magazine capacities (Boar, Boar Prime, Sobek, or Phage).
Could make one magazine last entire fights without needing any reloads, thus nullifying the negative reload speed.
Combining this mod and Ammo Stock would give +120% magazine size to the modded shotgun.
Unlike Tainted Mag and Tainted Clip, this mod increases the magazine size just as much as the non-corrupt counterpart, hence it should only be used in conjunction with Ammo Stock in builds aiming to maximize magazine size.
With this mod and Ammo Stock, Tigris and it's variants can reach a magazine size of 4. With a rank 5 Ammo Stock, Burdened Magazine can be left at rank 1 to minimize the reload penalty and capacity drain.
**Trivia:**
Prior to Update 16.7, this mod was usable in PvP games until it was replaced by its own specific PvP mods along with a number of other mods: Quickdraw, Fast Hands, Slip Magazine, Tactical Pump, Steady Hands, Stabilizer, Magazine Warp and Terminal Velocity.

### Wiki
Burning Claws is a Mod for Beast Claws that grants additional Heat Damage & Status Chance, while converting all elemental damage into Heat damage.
**Notes:**

Does not convert or mix elemental damage from Momentous Bond.

## Burning Hate
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Hate | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
Burning Hate could be obtained by reaching Rank 15 with Nightwave during Nora's Mix Volume 7.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** When Hate damages enemies inflicted with Heat Status, they become vulnerable to 20% more Status Damage.
- **Rank 1:** When Hate damages enemies inflicted with Heat Status, they become vulnerable to 40% more Status Damage.
- **Rank 2:** When Hate damages enemies inflicted with Heat Status, they become vulnerable to 60% more Status Damage.
- **Rank 3:** When Hate damages enemies inflicted with Heat Status, they become vulnerable to 80% more Status Damage.
- **Rank 4:** When Hate damages enemies inflicted with Heat Status, they become vulnerable to 100% more Status Damage.
- **Rank 5:** When Hate damages enemies inflicted with Heat Status, they become vulnerable to 120% more Status Damage.

### Wiki
Burning Hate is a Weapon Augment Mod for the Hate that increases Status Damage towards enemies afflicted by a Heat status effect.
**Notes:**
Heat afflicted enemies that are damaged by the Hate will become more vulnerable to Status Damage from all sources. The status damage vulnerability persists even after the Heat status proc expires.
The heat status effect can be from any source, not just from the Hate.
Direct hit damage and status effect damage from the Hate both trigger the vulnerability.
A heat status from the Hate itself will both apply the necessary heat status and then damage the target, applying the vulnerability for subsequent attacks.
The damage vulnerability only applies to status procs dealt after the vulnerability is applied; It does not enhance status effects already on the enemy beforehand, nor any procs inflicted on the same swing that the vulnerability is applied.
Damage increase is multiplicative with Melee Elementalist and Faction Damage Bonus.
Damage increase is additive with Dante's Final Verse's Status Damage increase.
Heat status that has been spread through Melee Influence applies the status damage vulnerability, both to the spread status procs and any future status procs.
**Tips:**
Synergizes with Hate Incarnon Genesis whose normal and forward combos throw spectral blades that inflict Heat damage.
