## Seeking Fury
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Shotgun | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
Seeking Fury can be acquired as a random reward from completing Nightmare Mode missions.
This mod is available as part of the 1000, 2100 and 4300 Platinum purchase packs.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +2.5% Reload Speed, +0.2 Punch Through
- **Rank 1:** +5% Reload Speed, +0.4 Punch Through
- **Rank 2:** +7.5% Reload Speed, +0.6 Punch Through
- **Rank 3:** +10% Reload Speed, +0.8 Punch Through
- **Rank 4:** +12.5% Reload Speed, +1 Punch Through
- **Rank 5:** +15% Reload Speed, +1.2 Punch Through

### Drop Locations
- Nightmare Mode Rewards, Rotation B — Uncommon (15.49%)

### Wiki
Seeking Fury is a Nightmare Mode shotgun mod that increases reload speed and adds punch through.
Data may differ due to width variances from dynamic posing.
**Notes:**
The calculation of reload time using reload speed is:
Reload Time Base Reload Time (1 + Reload Speed Bonus)
At max rank, this mod reduces reload time by an estimated ~13%.
Can be combined with Tactical Pump and Chilling Reload for a maximum 85% reload speed bonus, granting an approximate ~46% reduction of reload time.
Can be combined with Seeking Force for a maximum 3.3-meter punch through.
**Trivia:**
Despite not being a Corrupted Mod, Seeking Fury features primed units in its card image, in this case Nova Prime, Boar Prime and Wyrm Prime.

## Seeking Shuriken
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Ash | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under the Arbiters of Hexis, or the rank of Exalted under the Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.
This mod can periodically be acquired from The Circuit.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Shuriken Augment: Hits expose weaknesses on enemies, reducing their Armor by 35% for 2s.
- **Rank 1:** Shuriken Augment: Hits expose weaknesses on enemies, reducing their Armor by 45% for 4s.
- **Rank 2:** Shuriken Augment: Hits expose weaknesses on enemies, reducing their Armor by 55% for 6s.
- **Rank 3:** Shuriken Augment: Hits expose weaknesses on enemies, reducing their Armor by 70% for 8s.

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Maxim — Common (100.00%)
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Seeking Shuriken is an Ash Warframe Augment Mod that allows Shuriken to temporarily reduce the armor of their targets.
**Notes:**
Armor reduction is affected by Ability Strength, fully removing armor at 143% Ability Strength.
This can be easily reached (without penalties) using either a combination of Intensify and Power Drift, or an Umbral Intensify.
Duration of armor reduction is affected by Ability Duration.
Subsequent Shuriken refresh the duration of the armor reduction.
The armor reduction of multiple Shuriken can stack.
Despite Shuriken seeking through walls, the armor reduction requires line of sight.
Affected enemies have a green aura around them identical to that of a Corrosive proc.
**Tips:**
With one player using Corrosive Projection, 100% armor strip can be achieved with 118% Ability Strength.

## Seismic Bond
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** COMPANION | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
The mod can be bought from Son for 20,000 Standing after reaching Rank 3 - Associate with the Entrati.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** While a channeled Ability is active, Companion melee attacks create a 4m shockwave for 5% of their melee attack damage. Damage dealt by your Companion increases your Ability Efficiency by 0.5% for 2 seconds. Max 10 stacks.
- **Rank 1:** While a channeled Ability is active, Companion melee attacks create a 4m shockwave for 10% of their melee attack damage. Damage dealt by your Companion increases your Ability Efficiency by 1% for 4 seconds. Max 10 stacks.
- **Rank 2:** While a channeled Ability is active, Companion melee attacks create a 4m shockwave for 15% of their melee attack damage. Damage dealt by your Companion increases your Ability Efficiency by 1.5% for 6 seconds. Max 10 stacks.
- **Rank 3:** While a channeled Ability is active, Companion melee attacks create a 4m shockwave for 20% of their melee attack damage. Damage dealt by your Companion increases your Ability Efficiency by 2% for 8 seconds. Max 10 stacks.
- **Rank 4:** While a channeled Ability is active, Companion melee attacks create a 4m shockwave for 25% of their melee attack damage. Damage dealt by your Companion increases your Ability Efficiency by 2.5% for 10 seconds. Max 10 stacks.
- **Rank 5:** While a channeled Ability is active, Companion melee attacks create a 4m shockwave for 30% of their melee attack damage. Damage dealt by your Companion increases your Ability Efficiency by 3% for 12 seconds. Max 10 stacks.

### Drop Locations
- Entrati (Son), Associate — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Seismic Bond is a Companion mod that causes the companion's melee attacks to emit 4-meter shockwaves, as long as a Channeled Ability is active. In addition, the companion's attacks will grant stacking Ability Efficiency to their owner for a brief period.
**Notes:**
A channeled ability must be active for both the shockwave to trigger and to gain stacks of the Ability Efficiency bonus.
Stacks are gained on any damage dealt by your companion. Each stack has its own duration.
"Channeled abilities" that trigger Seismic Bond are the same abilities that triggers Arcane Intention. See list below.
Shockwave deals Impact Damage and has a 0% Status Chance.
Damage scales with increases to melee damage (e.g. Precision Conditioning), but is unaffected by damage conversion and elemental damage bonuses.
Shockwave does not hit enemies protected with Overguard.
Status Chance can be added to with Mecha Overdrive to create Impact procs.
Shockwave can applies Status Effects via Manifold Bond.
Shockwave does not trigger Vicious Bond.
Ability Efficiency bonus is additive to similar bonuses such as Streamline.
A channeled ability does not have to be active to gain the Ability Efficiency bonus of existing stacks.
Testing with Hildryn's Balefire has shown that it snapshots Ability Efficiency on cast.
Testing with Mesa's Peacemaker has shown that it updates its energy consumption according to Ability Efficiency dynamically.
Arcane Intention#Eligible Abilities

**Notes:**
Nira's Set bonus is additive to Seismic Wave.
Slam damage is multiplicative to base damage (e.g., Pressure Point, Arcane Fury).
Seismic Wave and Nira's Set also increases the damage dealt by slam attacks performed via Stance Combos.
Works with Wukong's Primal Fury.
It is currently the only mod capable of increasing the explosion effect damage of the Jat Kusar's Heavy Attack.
**Trivia:**
On the initial release that showcased this mod, the mod card along with the update notes had noted that Seismic Wave increased the slam radius of the equipped weapon, misleading players to believe that its purpose was to expand the already impressive slam radius of a weapon (such as the Jat Kittag). The mod card text was eventually fixed to reflect its actual function.
Between Update 18.10 and Update 22.6.1, there were no enemies that dropped Seismic Wave.

## Self Destruct
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Sentinel | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Explodes when incapacitated, dealing 100 Blast Damage in a 3m radius and knocking down nearby enemies.
- **Rank 1:** Explodes when incapacitated, dealing 200 Blast Damage in a 6m radius and knocking down nearby enemies.
- **Rank 2:** Explodes when incapacitated, dealing 300 Blast Damage in a 9m radius and knocking down nearby enemies.
- **Rank 3:** Explodes when incapacitated, dealing 400 Blast Damage in a 12m radius and knocking down nearby enemies.
- **Rank 4:** Explodes when incapacitated, dealing 500 Blast Damage in a 15m radius and knocking down nearby enemies.
- **Rank 5:** Explodes when incapacitated, dealing 600 Blast Damage in a 18m radius and knocking down nearby enemies.

### Drop Locations
- Fusion Moa — Rare (0.03%)
- Vapos Fusion Moa — Rare (0.03%)

### Wiki
Self Destruct is a mod that allows Sentinels to explode upon Incapacitation, dealing Blast damage in an area of effect.
**Trivia:**
The mod's description used to say that it dealt Explosion Damage.

## Semi-Pistol Cannonade
Only compatible with Semi-Auto Trigger. Fire Rate cannot be modified.
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** vazarin | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Pistol | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +50% Damage, +0.25 Punch Through
- **Rank 1:** +100% Damage, +0.5 Punch Through
- **Rank 2:** +150% Damage, +0.75 Punch Through
- **Rank 3:** +200% Damage, +1 Punch Through
- **Rank 4:** +250% Damage, +1.25 Punch Through
- **Rank 5:** +300% Damage, +1.5 Punch Through

### Drop Locations
- Juno Sapper Moa — Uncommon (0.43%)

### Wiki
Semi-Pistol Cannonade is a Semi-Auto exclusive Pistol mod that increases Damage and Punch Through, but locks Fire Rate.
**Notes:**
Equipping this mod will set weapon's Fire Rate to its default, ignoring other modifiers, even negative effects (e.g. Creeping Bullseye).
Mods such as Rivens and Lethal Torrent that affect Fire Rate among multiple other stats will still apply their other effects.
Weapons with an Incarnon mode must have Semi-Auto trigger type for both firing modes in order to equip this mod, such as Bronco Incarnon Genesis, Lato Incarnon Genesis and Lex Incarnon Genesis.
For a full list of secondary weapons and their trigger types, see Weapon Comparison - Secondary.

Only compatible with Semi-Auto Trigger. Fire Rate cannot be modified.

- **Rank 0:** +40% Damage, +0.25 Punch Through
- **Rank 1:** +80% Damage, +0.5 Punch Through

### Wiki
Semi-Rifle Cannonade is a Semi-Auto exclusive Rifle Mod that increases Damage and Punch Through, but locks Fire Rate.
**Notes:**
Equipping this mod will set weapon's Fire Rate to its default ignoring other bonuses, even negative effects (e.g. Critical Delay, Vile Precision, Komorex's second zoom).
Weapons with an Incarnon mode must have Semi-Auto trigger type for both firing modes in order to equip this mod.
Latron Incarnon Genesis is currently the only Incarnon weapon capable of equipping this mod.
Nagantaka and Nagantaka Prime cannot equip this mod.
For a full list of primary rifle weapons and their trigger types, see Weapon Comparison - Primary Rifles.

Only compatible with Semi-Auto Trigger. Fire Rate cannot be modified.

### Wiki
Semi-Shotgun Cannonade is a Semi-Auto exclusive Shotgun mod that increases Damage and Punch Through, but locks Fire Rate.

## Sentient Barrage
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Battacor | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
Available for 20 from the Nightwave Cred Offerings store on a rotational basis.
Sentient Barrage was originally acquired by reaching Rank 23 in Nightwave during Nora's Mix Volume 4.
Beginning with Nightwave Nora's Mix: Vol. 8, it was added to the Nightwave Cred Offerings.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Discharge from Alt-Fire now has infinite Body Punch Through but no longer explodes on contact. Each enemy hit will refill one charge, and reaching a full charge will increase the Critical Chance and Critical Damage of the next discharge by 50%.
- **Rank 1:** Discharge from Alt-Fire now has infinite Body Punch Through but no longer explodes on contact. Each enemy hit will refill one charge, and reaching a full charge will increase the Critical Chance and Critical Damage of the next discharge by 100%.
- **Rank 2:** Discharge from Alt-Fire now has infinite Body Punch Through but no longer explodes on contact. Each enemy hit will refill one charge, and reaching a full charge will increase the Critical Chance and Critical Damage of the next discharge by 150%.
- **Rank 3:** Discharge from Alt-Fire now has infinite Body Punch Through but no longer explodes on contact. Each enemy hit will refill one charge, and reaching a full charge will increase the Critical Chance and Critical Damage of the next discharge by 200%.
- **Rank 4:** Discharge from Alt-Fire now has infinite Body Punch Through but no longer explodes on contact. Each enemy hit will refill one charge, and reaching a full charge will increase the Critical Chance and Critical Damage of the next discharge by 250%.
- **Rank 5:** Discharge from Alt-Fire now has infinite Body Punch Through but no longer explodes on contact. Each enemy hit will refill one charge, and reaching a full charge will increase the Critical Chance and Critical Damage of the next discharge by 300%.

### Wiki
Sentient Barrage is a Weapon Augment Mod for the Battacor that changes the mechanics of its Alternate Fire. The discharge now has infinite body Punch Through but no longer explodes. Each enemy hit will refill one charge, and reaching a full charge this way increases the Critical Chance and Critical Multiplier of the next discharge.

## Sentient Surge
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Ocucor | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Each target eliminated refills 3% of Ocucor's magazine. Status Chance and Critical Chance are increased by 10% for each Tendril active.
- **Rank 1:** Each target eliminated refills 6% of Ocucor's magazine. Status Chance and Critical Chance are increased by 20% for each Tendril active.
- **Rank 2:** Each target eliminated refills 9% of Ocucor's magazine. Status Chance and Critical Chance are increased by 30% for each Tendril active.
- **Rank 3:** Each target eliminated refills 12% of Ocucor's magazine. Status Chance and Critical Chance are increased by 40% for each Tendril active.
- **Rank 4:** Each target eliminated refills 15% of Ocucor's magazine. Status Chance and Critical Chance are increased by 50% for each Tendril active.
- **Rank 5:** Each target eliminated refills 20% of Ocucor's magazine. Status Chance and Critical Chance are increased by 60% for each Tendril active.

### Wiki
Sentient Surge is a Weapon Augment Mod for the Ocucor where each target eliminated refills the Ocucor's magazine. In addition, Status Chance and Critical Chance are increased for each Tendril active.
Sentient Surge can be obtained by reaching Rank 9 with Nightwave during Nora's Mix Volume 4.
Can be purchased from Daughter during the October 2025 Nights of Naberus event for 50 Mother Token.
**Notes:**
Reloaded ammo is taken from the Ocucor's ammo reserves. This mod does not generate ammo.
Critical Chance and Status Chance bonus increases up to 240% each, and is Additive to other crit chance and status chance mods.
Reloading the weapon will reset the bonuses, as they are directly tied to its tendril effect which resets on reload.
Bonuses are also reset on Host Migration.
**Tips:**
Arcane Pistoleer can still be used to allow the weapon to use no ammunition after getting a headshot kill (at max rank).
The Helminth ability Energized Munitions can be used to increase ammo efficiency while active, improving ammo economy.
Cyte-09's Resupply can be used to refill ammunition without reloading and without pulling from ammo reserves to vastly increase the efficiency of this mod.
Disabling the setting for "Reload with Context Action Input" helps avoid accidental reloads.

### Wiki
Sepsis Claws is a Mod for Beast Claws that grants additional Toxin Damage & Status Chance, while converting all elemental damage into Toxin Damage.
**Notes:**
Cannot be equipped alongside Burning Claws, Chilling Claws, and Shocking Claws.
Does not convert or mix elemental damage from Momentous Bond.
Only converts primary elemental damage; secondary elemental damage like Radiation from Radon Claws and Magnetic from Magnetic Claws will not be converted.

### Drop Locations
- The Perrin Sequence, Senior Executive — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Sequence Burn is a Weapon Augment Mod exclusive to the Spectra and Spectra Vandal that increases their beam range and adds a Sequence effect.
**Notes:**
With this mod equipped, the Spectra/Spectra Vandal can achieve a beam length of 38/42 meters, more than doubling the original weapon's range. Combining this with Ruinous Extension results in a 46/50 meter beam length, nearly triple the original range, and more than doubling the Vandal variant's range.

- Mercury/Suisei (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Phobos/Grildrig (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Phobos/Shklovsky (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Venus/Unda (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Venus/Vesper (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)

### Wiki
Serration is a mod that increases the base damage of primary weapons (excluding shotguns) by 15% per rank, at a maximum of 165% at rank 10.
**Notes:**
Serration damage is applied before any other damage type. Therefore, every other damage increasing mod benefits from Serration. E.g. a weapon with a base damage of 18 equipped with a rank 9 Serration mod (150%) would have a new base damage of 45: 18 (1 + 1.5) 45
This new base damage will be what is used to calculate elemental damages.
When paired with other mods:
Multiplicatively stacks with Faction Damage Mods for a maximum of +244.5% damage.
+310.75% for Primed Faction Damage Mods.
Additively stacks with Heavy Caliber for a maximum of +330% damage.
Stacks with Heavy Caliber and Faction Damage Mods for a total of +459% damage at max rank.
+566.5% for Primed Faction Damage Mods.
At higher ranks the fusion cost of this mod becomes quite costly. Upgrading other mods simultaneously makes for a better investment of your Endo compared to only enhancing this one alone.
It is suggested to upgrade this mod to at least rank 5 quickly though, since it is useful on a lot of weapons.
Maxing this mod requires 20,460 Endo and 988,218.

## Shadow Haze
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Sevagoth | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Genius under Cephalon Suda, or the rank of Partner under The Perrin Sequence, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Reap Augment: Increase Critical Chance by 35% on enemies inflicted with Death Harvest. A new Shadow emerges from those enemies when they perish. Limit of 3 Shadows.
- **Rank 1:** Reap Augment: Increase Critical Chance by 40% on enemies inflicted with Death Harvest. A new Shadow emerges from those enemies when they perish. Limit of 3 Shadows.
- **Rank 2:** Reap Augment: Increase Critical Chance by 45% on enemies inflicted with Death Harvest. A new Shadow emerges from those enemies when they perish. Limit of 3 Shadows.
- **Rank 3:** Reap Augment: Increase Critical Chance by 50% on enemies inflicted with Death Harvest. A new Shadow emerges from those enemies when they perish. Limit of 3 Shadows.

### Drop Locations
- Cephalon Suda, Genius — Common (100.00%)
- The Perrin Sequence, Partner — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Shadow Haze is a Warframe Augment Mod for Sevagoth that increases the Critical Chance from any source against enemies affected by Reap or Death's Harvest. When affected enemies die, a new Reap Shadow spawns from their corpse and seeks other enemies, up to a maximum of 3 active Shadows at all mod ranks.
**Notes:**
Critical chance bonus is affected by Sevagoth's Ability Strength.
Critical chance bonus is applied additively after mods, the same way as Arcane Avenger and Covenant.
For example, a Baza Prime with a rank 5 Point Strike affected by Reap with a rank 5 Intensify will have 28% (1 + 150%) + (50% (1 + 30%)) critical chance.
The bonus does not apply to radial attacks on weapons such as Ogris.
The bonus does not work on abilities that are able to land critical hits, like Nova's Null Star, Wisp's Breach Surge or Vauban's Minelayer.
The bonus will apply to Amps.
Shadow Haze can only be equipped on Sevagoth himself, but grants its effects to Sevagoth's Shadow via its Death's Harvest ability.
The critical chance bonus would still be determined by the Ability Strength of Sevagoth.
The flying lifespan and area of effect's radius of shadows spawned by Death's Harvest are determined by the Ability Duration and Ability Range of Sevagoth, while the Damage Vulnerability of Death's Harvest applied by the shadows are determined by the Ability Strength and Ability Duration of Sevagoth's Shadow.
Number of Shadows is not affected by Mods.
Spawned Shadows take flight toward the direction their enemy host was facing and travel at the regular flight speed of Reap's tap-cast.

Sharpened Blade is a Conclave exclusive melee Mod that converts an amount of physical damage to Slash damage.
**Notes:**
As this mod only converts physical damage, weapons that deal elemental damage will be unaffected.
A weapon may only have one damage conversion mod equipped at a time.

## Sharpened Claws
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Kavat | **Max Rank:** 3

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** A vicious attack dealing 150% damage that sunders armor by 30% and rends flesh.
- **Rank 1:** A vicious attack dealing 200% damage that sunders armor by 60% and rends flesh.
- **Rank 2:** A vicious attack dealing 250% damage that sunders armor by 90% and rends flesh.
- **Rank 3:** A vicious attack dealing 300% damage that sunders armor by 120% and rends flesh.

### Drop Locations
- Hyekka — Common (9.17%)
- Kuva Hyekka — Common (9.17%)

### Wiki
Sharpened Claws is a Kavat-exclusive mod that allows the Kavat to target an enemy and rip it apart as it is stunned in a free fall animation. Each swipe deals high damage and removes some of the target's Armor.
**Notes:**
Damage multiplier is multiplicative to all other damage increases.
Cooldown of 4 seconds.
When combined with Swipe only a single enemy will take bonus damage and lose its armor. Other enemies beyond the first will take damage as though from a normal attack, and will not take the extra damage, nor lose armor.
Armor Reduction stacks additively with Corrosive Projection but only applies 1 time per target. Therefore, with 1 max rank Corrosive Projection active, a Kavat with a rank 2 Sharpened Claws will already remove enemy armor entirely. With a rank 1 Sharpened Claws 22% enemy armor will remain.
Currently can also be equipped on Vulpaphyla pets, but not Predasites.
Cannot armor strip Kuva Liches.

## Sharpshooter

- **Rank 2:** On Headshot Kill: +7 Energy
- **Rank 3:** On Headshot Kill: +8 Energy
- **Rank 4:** On Headshot Kill: +9 Energy
- **Rank 5:** On Headshot Kill: +10 Energy
- **Rank 6:** On Headshot Kill: +11 Energy
- **Rank 7:** On Headshot Kill: +12 Energy
- **Rank 8:** On Headshot Kill: +13 Energy
- **Rank 9:** On Headshot Kill: +14 Energy
- **Rank 10:** On Headshot Kill: +15 Energy

### Wiki
Sharpshooter is a Sniper mod that restores energy upon a headshot kill.
**Notes:**
The energy is rewarded even while channeled abilities are active.
Electricity and Gas status effect can also trigger the energy gain, even if the direct headshot hit didn't kill the target.
**Tips:**
Synergizes well with Ivara and her Prowl, as the ability gives Ivara bonus damage to headshots while using energy over time. The sniper must be silent however to avoid breaking her invisibility when firing.
Synergizes very well with Cyte-09 and his Neutralize. The ability grants Cyte-09 an Exalted sniper rifle that costs energy to fire. Even with 100% Ability Efficiency, 1 headshot is more than enough to not just refund the energy cost but also give you a net positive of +5 energy per headshot. However, the ricochet mechanic does not activate the mod multiple times.

- **Rank 8:** Delivers a barrage of explosions across a large area.

### Drop Locations

- Orm Basilisk — Uncommon (3.79%)

- Earth/Iota Temple (Caches) — Rare (4.00%)

### Wiki
Shatter Burst is a Plexus Battle Offensive mod. It launches a rocket that, upon contact with a surface or pressing the ability button again (default 2), creates a series of Blast explosions.
**Notes:**
Explosions have 50% linear damage falloff over its radius.
Energy cost and explosion frequency are not affected by Reactors or Warframe mods.
Damage is affected by Ability Strength.
Duration is affected by Ability Duration.
Radius and explosion range are affected by Ability Range.
**Tips:**
The continuous explosions can be used to damage the healing bubbles deployed by Exo Gokstad Crewships, effectively negating their effects within the radius of Shatter Burst.
In lieu of Tycho Seekers on a Railjack, Shatter Burst is also effective at disabling the shields of Grineer Skold Crewships and Corpus Crewships by destroying their generators without having to carefully aim.
Combining with Void Hole will deal large amounts of damage over time over a wide area.
The wide radius of the barrage makes it useful for farming large amounts of resources, especially around clusters of asteroids.

## Shattered Storm
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Gara | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under Arbiters of Hexis, or the rank of Flawless under New Loka, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Shattered Lash Augment: When Gara breaks her Mass Vitrify ring with Shattered Lash, enemies struck by the glass suffer Splinter Storm at 25% Strength.
- **Rank 1:** Shattered Lash Augment: When Gara breaks her Mass Vitrify ring with Shattered Lash, enemies struck by the glass suffer Splinter Storm at 50% Strength.
- **Rank 2:** Shattered Lash Augment: When Gara breaks her Mass Vitrify ring with Shattered Lash, enemies struck by the glass suffer Splinter Storm at 75% Strength.
- **Rank 3:** Shattered Lash Augment: When Gara breaks her Mass Vitrify ring with Shattered Lash, enemies struck by the glass suffer Splinter Storm at 100% Strength.

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Maxim — Common (100.00%)
- New Loka, Flawless — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Shattered Storm is a Warframe Augment Mod for Gara's Shattered Lash that, upon shattering Mass Vitrify, inflicts Splinter Storm to impacted enemies equal to a percentage of modded Ability Strength.
**Notes:**
This augment causes the explosion from Mass Vitrify to apply the effects of Splinter Storm to all enemies hit as if they had been targeted by Splinter Storm, albeit with modified Power Strength.
The enemy-target version of Splinter Storm creates an aura that deals damage per second within a radius, as well as causing the target enemy to be more vulnerable to damage.
The damage over time does not accumulate damage as with allied-targets, nor does it benefit from any accumulated damage prior to casting.
The damage vulnerability applied by Splinter Shield does not benefit the instigating damage from Mass Vitrify, but will benefit subsequent casts of Mass Vitrify.
Mending Splinters will count enemies affected by this augment.

## Shattering Impact
**Rarity:** Common | **Polarity:** vazarin | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Melee | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Impact Damage reduces enemy Armor by 1.
- **Rank 1:** Impact Damage reduces enemy Armor by 2.
- **Rank 2:** Impact Damage reduces enemy Armor by 3.
- **Rank 3:** Impact Damage reduces enemy Armor by 4.
- **Rank 4:** Impact Damage reduces enemy Armor by 5.
- **Rank 5:** Impact Damage reduces enemy Armor by 6.

### Drop Locations
- Drekar Butcher — Uncommon (0.57%)

### Wiki
Shattering Impact is a melee mod that permanently reduces an enemy's base armor by 1 per rank upon dealing Impact damage with a melee weapon.
**Notes:**
Due to the nature of in-game Damage Quantization, some melee weapons have such a low base Impact value that it is rounded to 0 damage, causing Shattering Impact to not apply. However, for the examples below, each weapon coincidentally deals pure Impact on slam hits, allowing certain attacks to reduce armor anyways.
Destreza
Galatine
Galatine Prime
Shattering Impact takes effect on every melee hit from weapons with any Impact damage. It has no effect if the melee weapon's Impact damage is zero (for example ranged attacks of Redeemer). Note that it is not necessary to proc the Impact status effect to trigger the armor reduction.
The amount of armor reduction per hit is a flat, constant value, independent of the amount of Impact damage inflicted. Since the reduction is applied to the target's base armor, for a given enemy type it will always take the same number of hits to completely drain the enemy's armor, regardless of its level.
Shattering Impact is applied before percentage-based base armor strips, such as Corrosive Projection, and so the number of shots required to fully strip will be unaffected.
Compared to Corrosive status effect, Shattering Impact has the ability to reduce a target's armor to 0 permanently, instead of just by 80% for the duration of the status effect.

**Trivia:**
Prior to Update 27.3, Shattering Justice added 20 percentage points to Sobek's status chance after other mods. For example, a Sobek with a max rank Shotgun Savvy and would have had a 27% (1 + 30%) + 20% status chance.

## Shattering Storm

## Shepherd

### Acquisition
Awarded from Arbitrations missions.

- **Rank 3:** Squad's Companions receive +200 Health and +120 Armor

### Wiki
Shepherd is an aura mod that increases Companion's health and armor.
* Aura mods increase the amount of Mod Capacity
**Notes:**
Health and armor bonuses apply additively after base health and armor mods.
A Djinn sentinel with maxed Enhanced Vitality under the effect of Shepherd will have 200 x (1 + 2.2) + 300 = 940 health.
The same Djinn sentinel with maxed Metal Fiber under the effect of Shepherd will have 50 x (1 + 1.1) + 180 = 285 armor.
Also affects Venari

- **Rank 4:** Increase Warframe Max Shields and Shield Regeneration by 50% for 9s.
- **Rank 5:** Increase Warframe Max Shields and Shield Regeneration by 60% for 10s.

### Drop Locations
- 002-Er — Uncommon (1.25%)
- Armis Ulta — Uncommon (1.25%)
- Auditor — Uncommon (1.25%)
- Azoth — Uncommon (1.25%)
- Derim Zahn — Uncommon (1.25%)
- Dru Pesfor — Uncommon (1.25%)
- Jad Teran — Uncommon (1.25%)

### Wiki
Shield Charger is a Sentinel and MOA Mod that periodically increases your Warframe's Max Shields and regenerates them for a certain amount of time.
**Notes:**
Shield bonus is additive with bonuses such as Redirection.
Shield Recharge Rate bonus is additive with bonuses such as Fast Deflection.
Unlike Arcane Aegis, Shield Recharge Rate can be interrupted by damage, but with a greatly reduced Shield Recharge Delay.
Once the ability duration ends, shields will go back to normal, leaving excess shields as overshields.
Has a cooldown of 30 seconds.
Will not grant shields if the user does not possess base shields of their own.
Unlike Shield Osprey, it does not instantly recharge shields.
Sentinels, Companions, Rescue Targets, Syndicate Operatives Syndicate Specters or Factional Allies cannot benefit from this mod.

## Shield Disruption
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** -2 | **Compatible:** AURA | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
Available for 20 creds from the Nightwave Cred Offerings store on a rotational basis.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Enemies lose -3% Shield Capacity
- **Rank 1:** Enemies lose -6% Shield Capacity
- **Rank 2:** Enemies lose -9% Shield Capacity
- **Rank 3:** Enemies lose -12% Shield Capacity
- **Rank 4:** Enemies lose -15% Shield Capacity
- **Rank 5:** Enemies lose -18% Shield Capacity

### Wiki
Shield Disruption is an aura mod that reduces the shield capacity of all enemies.
* Aura mods increase the amount of Mod Capacity
**Notes:**
Can be stacked with other teammates' to lower shield capacity by a maximum of 72%.
Shield reduction from this aura maxes out at 80%. This can be achieved by having all squad members equipping this aura with at least three squad members equipping Coaction Drift too.
Does not affect the following enemies:
Aurax Atloc Raknoids
Basilisks and Elite Basilisks
Crewships
Goxes
Harpis and Elite Harpis
Raknoids
Ropalolyst
Weavers and Elite Weavers
**Tips:**
This is most effective against the Corpus due to their heavy use of shields. It is somewhat effective against the Corrupted, albeit to a lesser extent due to that only some of the enemies using shields.
As only a select few bosses use shields, this mod has only a very minor effect against the Grineer.
Similarly, as Mutalist Alad V is the only Infested unit to use shields, this mod has no effect against the Infested in most situations.
**Trivia:**
Previously, Shield Disruption showed a Nova shooting bolts though a Shield Lancer's Riot Shield, which was more a depiction of punch through rather than shield reduction.
Previously obtainable during Artifact Defense Event from special alerts.

## Shimmering Blight
Fast spinning attacks and staggering strikes.
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** -2 | **Compatible:** Polearms | **Max Rank:** 3

### Drop Locations

- Frontier Seeker — Rare (0.22%)

- Kuva Seeker — Rare (0.22%)
- Narmer Seeker — Rare (0.22%)
- Seeker — Rare (0.22%)
- Tusk Seeker — Rare (0.22%)

## Shock Trooper
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Volt | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under the Arbiters of Hexis, or the rank of Exalted under the Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Shock Augment: Hold to cast will grant all allies within 15m an additional 50% Electricity Damage to their attacks for 28s.
- **Rank 1:** Shock Augment: Hold to cast will grant all allies within 15m an additional 65% Electricity Damage to their attacks for 32s.
- **Rank 2:** Shock Augment: Hold to cast will grant all allies within 15m an additional 80% Electricity Damage to their attacks for 36s.
- **Rank 3:** Shock Augment: Hold to cast will grant all allies within 15m an additional 100% Electricity Damage to their attacks for 40s.

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Maxim — Common (100.00%)
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Shock Trooper is a Warframe Augment Mod for Volt that allows Shock to be held on cast, creating a wave of energy traveling outward from the user that temporarily grants the caster and nearby allies additional Electricity damage to all attacks.
**Notes:**
Damage bonus is affected by Ability Strength.
Duration is affected by Ability Duration.
Range is affected by Ability Range.
Adds Electricity damage to weapon attacks. This damage bonus does not combine with other elements.
Multiple Shock Troopers do not stack; the buff with the highest Ability Strength will take effect.
However if a weaker buff with more Ability Duration is cast, it will take effect after the stronger buff expires.
Electric damage from weapons buffed by Shock Trooper does not activate the passive from Archon Stretch.
Does not apply to Archguns.
Does not apply to Exalted Weapon.

### Wiki
Shocking Claws is a Mod for Beast Claws that grants additional Electricity Damage & Status Chance, while converting all elemental damage into Electricity Damage.
**Notes:**
Cannot be equipped alongside Burning Claws, Chilling Claws, and Sepsis Claws.
Does not convert or mix elemental damage from Momentous Bond.
Only converts primary elemental damage; secondary elemental damage like Radiation from Radon Claws and Magnetic from Magnetic Claws will not be converted.

## Shocking Speed
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Volt | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under the Arbiters of Hexis, or the rank of Exalted under Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Speed Augment: While moving under the effects of Speed, enemies within 3m will take 75 Electricity Damage with guaranteed Status effect.
- **Rank 1:** Speed Augment: While moving under the effects of Speed, enemies within 3m will take 150 Electricity Damage with guaranteed Status effect.
- **Rank 2:** Speed Augment: While moving under the effects of Speed, enemies within 3m will take 225 Electricity Damage with guaranteed Status effect.
- **Rank 3:** Speed Augment: While moving under the effects of Speed, enemies within 3m will take 300 Electricity Damage with guaranteed Status effect.

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Maxim — Common (100.00%)
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Shocking Speed is a Warframe Augment Mod for Volt's Speed that causes him and his allies to inflict Electricity damage and status to enemies within close proximity while moving.
**Notes:**
Damage is affected by Ability Strength.
Range is affected by Ability Range.
The guaranteed Electricity proc can be used to deal more damage with Condition Overload due to Shocking Speed's range being similar to the majority of melee weapon ranges, without casting any of Volt's other abilities.
The effect is active as long as Volt is moving, whether by walking, sprinting, using melee attacks, or performing maneuvers.
Also targets Storage Containers, Security Cameras, Sensor Bars, Arc Trap and Reinforced Glass.
Applies to each member affected by Speed for its entire duration.
A wavy energy halo surrounding Volt will appear upon casting Speed if this augment is equipped, which serves as a visual indicator of the ability's radius.
Unique Interactions
Buffing Swarm Kavats will allow the Kavats to spread Scarab Swarm with Shocking Speed's damage.
Buffing Maggots/Techrot Miasmites spawned from the (Coda) Pathocyst or Strain Mod set will cause Shocking Speed to proc on allies.

## Shockwave Actuators
**Rarity:** Common | **Polarity:** penjaga | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Moa | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod is acquired by building a MOA with the Lambeo model.
Shockwave Actuators is automatically acquired upon obtaining a MOA built with the Lambeo Model.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Blasts a shockwave knocking down those within 12m. The shockwave recharges every 25s.
- **Rank 1:** Blasts a shockwave knocking down those within 12m. The shockwave recharges every 20s.
- **Rank 2:** Blasts a shockwave knocking down those within 12m. The shockwave recharges every 15s.
- **Rank 3:** Blasts a shockwave knocking down those within 12m. The shockwave recharges every 10s.

### Wiki
Shockwave Actuators is a precept mod for MOAs to perform a Shockwave Stomp similar to the Shockwave MOA, which will knock down enemies.
**Notes:**
Will only activate if the player is attacking enemies with a weapon and an enemy is nearby.
Will not activate unless the enemy is fully alert.
Shockwave expands slowly for 3 seconds, up to a 12-meter radius. 
Enemies affected by the shockwave are also pushed back, in addition to being knocked down.
Airborne enemies such as Scrambus and Attack Drone are unaffected.
MOA must have line of sight for an enemy to be knocked down.
An enemy that is visually in the shockwave radius may not be affected due to this.

### Wiki
Shotgun Ammo Mutation is a shotgun mod that converts any unused Secondary Ammo into Primary Ammo. The affected shotgun will only convert ammo while equipped, and will not convert any ammo type used by holstered secondary weapons until their own ammo is full.
Converted ammo is denoted by a Mutate symbol. The final amount of ammo restored is rounded to the nearest integer.
**Tips:**
Good for weapons with poor ammo economy, such as the Boar or Kohm.
Functions well with Sentinel's Vacuum or Chesa Kubrow's Retrieve, which automatically collect unused ammo as needed.

## Shotgun Amp
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** -2 | **Compatible:** AURA | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
Shotgun Amp is a potential drop from the Feyarch Specter, available upon anointing a Silver Grove shrine with the Sunrise Apothic.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Squad receives +3% Shotgun Damage
- **Rank 1:** Squad receives +6% Shotgun Damage
- **Rank 2:** Squad receives +9% Shotgun Damage
- **Rank 3:** Squad receives +12% Shotgun Damage
- **Rank 4:** Squad receives +15% Shotgun Damage
- **Rank 5:** Squad receives +18% Shotgun Damage

### Drop Locations
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 1 (Normal) — Legendary (0.67%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 3 (Normal) — Legendary (0.67%)
- Feyarch Specter — Common (51.52%)

### Wiki
Not to be confused with Amp.
Shotgun Amp is an aura mod that increases the damage dealt with shotguns by 3% per rank, up to 18% at full rank.
* Aura mods increase the amount of Mod Capacity
**Notes:**
Increases the base damage of shotguns similar to the effects of Primed Point Blank and Point Blank allowing for a slightly greater shotgun damage bonus of 183% or 108% respectively.
For a short time after Update 10.6, this mod could have been acquired via Transmutation. This was due to a bug where all mods, including unreleased ones such as this one, became obtainable through transmutation. This has since been fixed, but players who obtained the mod this way were allowed to keep them. It was then made untradable so there was no other way to obtain this mod.
As of Update 11.0.6, all unreleased mods were made untradeable.
As of Update The Silver Grove, the damage was reduced from 60% at max rank to 6%.
As of Update The Silver Grove 3, the damage was increased to 18% at max rank.

### Wiki
Shotgun Barrage is an uncommon shotgun mod that increases the fire rate of a primary shotgun weapon, bearing a Madurai polarity mod.
An amalgam mod version of Shotgun Barrage exists, known as Amalgam Shotgun Barrage.
**Notes:**
It is not recommended to use this mod alongside Semi-Shotgun Cannonade, as cannonade mods locks the fire rate down to be unchangeable by mods.
This mod has the highest rate of fire enhancement of all the shotgun fire rate mods, thus making it very effective on shotguns like the Sobek and Strun Wraith.
Can be combined with Accelerated Blast and Frail Momentum to provide a 240% increase in fire rate.
**Trivia:**
Was formerly named Shotgun Spazz prior to Update 32.

## Shotgun Elementalist
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** vazarin | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Shotgun | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +15% Status Damage, +10% Magazine Capacity

- **Rank 2:** +45% Status Damage, +30% Magazine Capacity
- **Rank 3:** +60% Status Damage, +40% Magazine Capacity
- **Rank 4:** +75% Status Damage, +50% Magazine Capacity
- **Rank 5:** +90% Status Damage, +60% Magazine Capacity

### Drop Locations
- Juno Sapper Moa — Uncommon (0.43%)

### Wiki
Shotgun Elementalist is a Shotgun mod that increases Status Damage and Magazine Capacity.
Damage increase is final multiplicative - applies AFTER faction damage multipliers like Bane of Grineer or Roar.
Damage increase is additive with other sources of explicitly increased status damage - such as "Toxin status effects deal +30% more damage" from Emerald Archon Shard.

### Wiki
Shrapnel Rounds is a Marelok and Vaykor Marelok mod which increases multishot for reduced damage.
**Notes:**
This mod can also be used on the Vaykor Marelok.
**Trivia:**
Before Update 18.8, this mod had three ranks, each rank increasing Multishot by 50% and decreasing damage by 16.5%.
Because of this, Shrapnel Rounds is now the third mod without ranks, the first being Coolant Leak, the second being the Legendary Core, the fourth being Precision Munition, and the fifth being Astral Autopsy.

Shrapnel Shot is a common Shotgun mod that increases critical multiplier while aiming for a brief time upon a kill.

## Shred
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Rifle | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
Reward from Operation: Arid Fear by earning 1 point or more.
This mod is now available as a Nightmare Mode reward at the end of the mission.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +5% Fire Rate (x2 for Bows), +0.2 Punch Through
- **Rank 1:** +10% Fire Rate (x2 for Bows), +0.4 Punch Through
- **Rank 2:** +15% Fire Rate (x2 for Bows), +0.6 Punch Through
- **Rank 3:** +20% Fire Rate (x2 for Bows), +0.8 Punch Through
- **Rank 4:** +25% Fire Rate (x2 for Bows), +1 Punch Through
- **Rank 5:** +30% Fire Rate (x2 for Bows), +1.2 Punch Through

### Drop Locations
- Conclave, Mistral — Common (100.00%)
- Nightmare Mode Rewards, Rotation B — Uncommon (15.49%)
- Lektro Commander — Uncommon (3.00%)
- Pyr Captain — Uncommon (3.00%)
- Earth/Erpo (Mobile Defense) — Rare (3.76%)
- Europa/Gamygyn (Mobile Defense) — Rare (3.76%)
- Jupiter/Galilea (Sabotage) — Rare (3.76%)
- Neptune/Salacia (Mobile Defense) — Rare (3.76%)

### Wiki
Shred is a mod that increases the fire rate of rifles and bows by 5% and punch through by 0.2 meter per rank for a maximum of 30% and 1.2 meter at Rank 5, respectively.
Data may differ due to width variances from dynamic posing.
**Notes:**
Can be combined with Speed Trigger, Spring-Loaded Chamber, Vigilante Fervor and Vile Acceleration, to provide a 330% (660% for Bows) increase in fire rate while aiming, otherwise 255% (510% for bows)
This mod is significantly more powerful when stacking a maxed Metal Auger, increasing overall punch through up to 3.3.
Despite the buff of Metal Auger, as of Update 11, Shred is still efficient due to +0.4 punch through bares merely a 7 mod power use, while giving +10% rate of fire.
The fire rate boost increases charging speed of chargeable weapons and the drawing speed of Bow class weapons.
Bows receive double the fire rate increase from this mod unlike other primary weapons.
23.10.8

## Shred Shot
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Shotgun | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod is acquired by attaining the rank of Mistral with Teshin, and spending 10,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** 5% of Damage converted into Puncture
- **Rank 1:** 10% of Damage converted into Puncture
- **Rank 2:** 15% of Damage converted into Puncture
- **Rank 3:** 20% of Damage converted into Puncture

### Drop Locations
- Conclave, Mistral — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Shred Shot is a Conclave exclusive shotgun mod that converts an amount of physical damage to Puncture damage.
**Notes:**
As this mod only converts physical damage, weapons that deal elemental damage will be unaffected.
A weapon may only have one damage conversion mod equipped at a time.
**Trivia:**
Despite it being a Puncture mod, the Tigris that is shown on the mod deals Slash damage.

## Silent Battery
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Shotgun | **Max Rank:** 3

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Reduces the chance an enemy will hear gunfire by 25%.
- **Rank 1:** Reduces the chance an enemy will hear gunfire by 50%.
- **Rank 2:** Reduces the chance an enemy will hear gunfire by 75%.
- **Rank 3:** Reduces the chance an enemy will hear gunfire by 100%.

### Drop Locations
- Executioner Dhurnam — Common (9.17%)

### Wiki
Silent Battery is a Mod that reduces Noise Level on Shotguns. At max rank, it renders any Shotgun completely silent and undetectable while firing.
**Notes:**
This Mod only reduces or eliminates firing noise. Any corpses, returning fire or enemies that are not killed quick enough will still cause an alert.
Shooting a silent Weapon within 6 meters of an enemy or at the terrain near an enemy will cause them to stop and look around, but will not change their actual alert state.
This Mod does not work correctly on the Sweeper Prime (and assuming regular Sweeper). It may reduce sound range but the shot is not silent.
A rank 3 Silent Battery Mod (100% Noise reduction) will allow Ivara to stay invisible while Prowl is active.

**Notes:**
Cannot be used with Assimilate.
Not affected by Ability Range.
Not affected by Ability Strength.
Vertical distance from enemies is not taken into account.

- **Rank 0:** Switching to Warframe after a Chained Sling adds 10% Ability Strength for 5s.
- **Rank 1:** Switching to Warframe after a Chained Sling adds 20% Ability Strength for 10s.
- **Rank 2:** Switching to Warframe after a Chained Sling adds 30% Ability Strength for 15s.
- **Rank 3:** Switching to Warframe after a Chained Sling adds 40% Ability Strength for 20s.

## Sling Stun
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 4 | **Max Rank:** 3

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Second Ability increases the width of the next Void Sling by 50% and enemies hit are vulnerable to Finishers, taking 15% more finisher damage.
- **Rank 1:** Second Ability increases the width of the next Void Sling by 100% and enemies hit are vulnerable to Finishers, taking 20% more finisher damage.
- **Rank 2:** Second Ability increases the width of the next Void Sling by 150% and enemies hit are vulnerable to Finishers, taking 25% more finisher damage.
- **Rank 3:** Second Ability increases the width of the next Void Sling by 200% and enemies hit are vulnerable to Finishers, taking 30% more finisher damage.

## Slip Magazine
**Rarity:** Common | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Pistol | **Max Rank:** 3

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +2.5% Magazine Capacity
- **Rank 1:** +5% Magazine Capacity
- **Rank 2:** +7.5% Magazine Capacity
- **Rank 3:** +10% Magazine Capacity

### Drop Locations
- Arcane Boiler — Uncommon (0.46%)
- Boiler — Uncommon (0.46%)
- Toxic Ancient — Uncommon (0.46%)
- Arid Heavy Gunner — Uncommon (0.57%)
- Corrupted Warden — Uncommon (0.57%)
- Frontier Heavy Gunner — Uncommon (0.57%)
- Garv — Uncommon (0.57%)
- Grineer Warden — Uncommon (0.57%)
- Heavy Gunner — Uncommon (0.57%)
- Narmer Gunner Warden — Uncommon (0.57%)
- Narmer Heavy Gunner — Uncommon (0.57%)
- Commander — Uncommon (0.77%)
- Alad V — Uncommon (25.29%)
- Captain Vor — Uncommon (25.29%)
- Janus Captain Vor — Uncommon (25.29%)
- Mutalist Alad V — Uncommon (25.29%)

### Wiki
Slip Magazine is a mod that increases magazine capacity of a pistol by 5% per rank for a maximum of 30% at rank 5.
**Notes:**
For any non-integer magazine values the magazine size is simply rounded to the nearest whole number. For example, a Furis modded with a max rank Slip Magazine will have a calculated magazine size of 35 (1 + 30%), which will simply round to 0.
Is completely inferior to Ice Storm which can give a larger increase to Magazine Capacity (40%) and a 40% increase in Cold damage for the exact same mod capacity cost.
**Trivia:**
Prior to Update 16.7, this mod was usable in PvP games until it was replaced by its own specific PvP mods along with a number of other mods: Quickdraw, Fast Hands, Tactical Pump, Steady Hands, Stabilizer, Burdened Magazine, Magazine Warp and Terminal Velocity.

## Sly Devolution
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** penjaga | **Drain:** 0 | **Compatible:** Sly Vulpaphyla | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
Sly Devolution is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Sly Vulpaphyla.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Devolves into its larval form when downed and regains its true form after 30s. Your kills reduce enemy accuracy against Warframes by 5% for 2s.
- **Rank 1:** Devolves into its larval form when downed and regains its true form after 30s. Your kills reduce enemy accuracy against Warframes by 10% for 4s.
- **Rank 2:** Devolves into its larval form when downed and regains its true form after 30s. Your kills reduce enemy accuracy against Warframes by 15% for 6s.
- **Rank 3:** Devolves into its larval form when downed and regains its true form after 30s. Your kills reduce enemy accuracy against Warframes by 20% for 8s.

### Wiki
Sly Devolution is a precept mod for the Sly Vulpaphyla to devolve into its larval form upon death. Any kills made by the owner will grant an Evasion buff. The Vulpaphyla will respawn after 30 seconds.
**Notes:**
The larval form floats beside the owner, similar to a Sentinel.
Devolution prevents bleedout and thus the Vulpaphyla cannot be revived normally. Its transformation also cannot be sped up.
Duration is not increased by Tek Enhance.
Additional kills will refresh the buff duration.

## Smite Corpus
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Melee | **Max Rank:** 3

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** x1.05 Damage to Corpus
- **Rank 1:** x1.1 Damage to Corpus
- **Rank 2:** x1.15 Damage to Corpus
- **Rank 3:** x1.2 Damage to Corpus

### Drop Locations
- Fusion Moa — Rare (0.17%)
- Vapos Fusion Moa — Rare (0.17%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 1 (Normal) — Legendary (0.67%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 3 (Normal) — Legendary (0.67%)
- Demolisher Anti Moa — Uncommon (3.75%)
- Demolisher Bursa — Uncommon (3.75%)
- Demolisher Hyena — Uncommon (3.75%)
- Demolisher Machinist — Uncommon (3.75%)
- Mimic — Uncommon (6.43%)

### Wiki
Smite Corpus is a mod that increases the Faction Damage of melee weapons against Corpus.
**Notes:**
This mod will increase both the base damage and elemental damage of a weapon (see Damage for complete mechanics).
**Notes:**
Has no effect on Corrupted and Narmer Corpus (e.g. Corrupted Crewman, Narmer Crewman).
Despite being listed as a multiplier, it will stack additively with other sources of Damage to Corpus.
For example, if you had a Riven Mod with x0.5 Damage to Corpus and a max rank Smite Corpus with x1.3 Damage to Corpus, you would have a 1 - 0.5 + 0.3 = x0.8 multiplier for damage against Corpus with both mods equipped.

## Smite Infusion
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Oberon | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of General under Steel Meridian, or the rank of Flawless under New Loka, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Smite Augment: Hold to cast will grant all allies within 15m an additional 50% Radiation Damage to their attacks for 28s.
- **Rank 1:** Smite Augment: Hold to cast will grant all allies within 15m an additional 65% Radiation Damage to their attacks for 32s.
- **Rank 2:** Smite Augment: Hold to cast will grant all allies within 15m an additional 80% Radiation Damage to their attacks for 36s.
- **Rank 3:** Smite Augment: Hold to cast will grant all allies within 15m an additional 100% Radiation Damage to their attacks for 40s.

### Drop Locations
- New Loka, Flawless — Common (100.00%)
- Steel Meridian, General — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Smite Infusion is a Warframe Augment Mod for Oberon that allows Smite to be held on cast, creating a wave of energy traveling outward from the user that temporarily grants the caster and nearby allies additional Radiation damage to all attacks.
**Notes:**
Damage bonus is affected by Ability Strength.
Duration is affected by Ability Duration.
Range is affected by Ability Range.
Add Radiation damage to weapons (excluding exalted weapons), additively to the IPS and elemental mods.
Does not increase the damage of most abilities.
Does not merge with Heat or Electricity
For example, with a weapon with base damage of 100 Impact per bullet, the mod Hellfire at max rank, and the buff from Smite Infusion at max rank with 110 strength, the damage will be: 100 Impact, 90 Heat, and 110 Radiation.
In this situation, if a status proc, it will have 100/300 chance to be Impact, 90/300 chance to be Heat, and 110/300 to be Radiation.
For more information on how this augment works, see Buff & Debuff page.
Multiple Smite Infusions do not stack; the buff with the highest Ability Strength will take effect.
However if a weaker instance with more Ability Duration is cast, it will take effect after the stronger buff expires.

## Smoke Shadow
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Ash | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under the Arbiters of Hexis, or the rank of Exalted under the Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Smoke Screen Augment: Conceals allies within 8m and grants 60% Critical Chance while invisible.
- **Rank 1:** Smoke Screen Augment: Conceals allies within 10m and grants 90% Critical Chance while invisible.
- **Rank 2:** Smoke Screen Augment: Conceals allies within 12m and grants 120% Critical Chance while invisible.
- **Rank 3:** Smoke Screen Augment: Conceals allies within 15m and grants 150% Critical Chance while invisible.

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Maxim — Common (100.00%)
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Smoke Shadow is a Warframe Augment Mod for Ash's Smoke Screen that allows Ash to temporarily cloak nearby allies along with himself, while also increasing affected player's critical chance.
**Notes:**
Allied cloak duration is affected by Ability Duration.
Allied cloak radius is affected by Ability Range.
Teammates must be within range to receive the cast, after receiving the cast they can move away and still be cloaked.
The increased Critical Hit chance is additive to mods like Point Strike, Pistol Gambit, and Blood Rush.
Example: A Vectis with Point Strike and cloaked by Smoke Shadow will have 25% * (1 + Point Strike + Smoke Shadow) 100% critical chance.
Affects all weapon types including Archguns and Exalted Weapons, as long as the cloak buff remains.
Critical chance is not affected by mods.
Critical chance bonus is only applied when invisible from Smoke Shadow. Other forms of invisibility with this augment equipped will not grant the bonus.
The increased critical chance bonus from different players stacks, up to 600% bonus critical chance from 4 players.
Allied cloak duration is independent of Smoke Screen's rank.

### Wiki
Sniper Ammo Mutation is a sniper rifle mod that converts any unused Secondary Ammo into Primary Ammo. The affected weapon will only convert ammo while equipped, and will not convert any ammo type used by holstered secondary weapons until their own ammo is full.
Converted ammo is denoted by a Mutate symbol. The final amount of ammo restored is rounded to the nearest integer.
**Tips:**
Functions well with Sentinel's Vacuum or Chesa Kubrow's Retrieve, which automatically collect unused ammo as needed.

## Soft Hands
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Shotgun | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
Acquired by attaining the rank of Mistral under the Conclave Syndicate, and spending 10,000 Standing to purchase.
Can be obtained as a drop from a Conculyst.

### Stats by Rank

- **Rank 1:** On Equip: -20% Weapon Recoil and +20% Accuracy for 8s
- **Rank 2:** On Equip: -30% Weapon Recoil and +30% Accuracy for 8s

- Summulyst — Uncommon (2.29%)

### Wiki
Soft Hands is a shotgun mod usable in both PvE and PvP that reduces recoil and increases accuracy for 8 seconds upon holstering a weapon. This effect works for both primary and secondary weapons.
**Notes:**
Both recoil and spread reduction apply to all weapons, not just the one equipped with this mod.
Buff is refreshed, whenever a weapon is equipped.
Buff stacks additively with those from Twitch and Reflex Draw.

## Sonic Dash
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** vazarin | **Drain:** 4 | **Max Rank:** 3

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Void Sling no longer displaces enemies, instead it emits a shockwave 8m wide and travels 2m stunning any enemy it hits.
- **Rank 1:** Void Sling no longer displaces enemies, instead it emits a shockwave 10m wide and travels 4m stunning any enemy it hits.
- **Rank 2:** Void Sling no longer displaces enemies, instead it emits a shockwave 12m wide and travels 6m stunning any enemy it hits.
- **Rank 3:** Void Sling no longer displaces enemies, instead it emits a shockwave 14m wide and travels 8m stunning any enemy it hits.

## Sonic Fracture
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Banshee | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Genius under Cephalon Suda, or the rank of Partner under The Perrin Sequence, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Sonic Boom Augment: Enemy Armor is reduced by 35%.
- **Rank 1:** Sonic Boom Augment: Enemy Armor is reduced by 45%.
- **Rank 2:** Sonic Boom Augment: Enemy Armor is reduced by 55%.
- **Rank 3:** Sonic Boom Augment: Enemy Armor is reduced by 70%.

### Drop Locations
- Cephalon Suda, Genius — Common (100.00%)
- The Perrin Sequence, Partner — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Sonic Fracture is a Warframe Augment Mod for Banshee's Sonic Boom that allows it to permanently strip armor off enemies.
**Notes:**
Armor reduction is affected by Ability Strength, fully removing armor at 143% Ability Strength.
A maxed Intensify and Power Drift can do this without negatively impacting any other stats.
Without maximized strip from strength, it needs only two casts to fully strip armor.
Affected enemies have a green aura around them identical to that displayed by Corrosive.
**Tips:**
With one player using Corrosive Projection, 100% armor strip can be achieved at 118% Ability Strength.

## Soul Survivor
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Nekros | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
Can be acquired by attaining the rank of Partner under The Perrin Sequence, or the rank of Exalted under the Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Soul Punch Augment: Use on a downed ally to revive them with 15% Health.
- **Rank 1:** Soul Punch Augment: Use on a downed ally to revive them with 20% Health.
- **Rank 2:** Soul Punch Augment: Use on a downed ally to revive them with 25% Health.
- **Rank 3:** Soul Punch Augment: Use on a downed ally to revive them with 30% Health.

### Drop Locations
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)
- The Perrin Sequence, Partner — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Soul Survivor is a Warframe Augment Mod that allows Nekros to use Soul Punch on allies in bleedout to revive them with partial health.
**Notes:**
Instantly revives the downed ally target on cast with a percentage of their maximum health.
Can revive downed players and Companions, except Sentinels due to them dying instantly rather than bleedout.
The percentage of health restored is affected by Ability Strength.
Can revive allied targets repeatedly as long as Nekros has enough energy for Soul Punch.
Revived allies receive 2 seconds of Invulnerability.
Reviving with Soul Punch also counts towards Challenges that count Revives.
**Tips:**
Synergizes well with Despoil, as it allows one to continue Desecrating while saving Energy for emergency Revives.
Combining this with Equilibrium will also allow Nekros to chain revives as long as he gathers health orbs to create the energy for casting Soul Punch.
**Trivia:**
This augment originally had very steep drawbacks; in its introduction in Update 15.0, Nekros's energy and shields would be fully drained upon use, along with draining a percentage of his health, all of which made him vulnerable to enemy fire. The shield and health drain penalties would be removed in Update 15.5, and the energy drain would follow in Update 32.0.
The name of this mod is a play on the phrase, "Sole Survivor", meaning the only survivor.

## Spare Parts
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** ROBOTIC | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Companion marks a target every 15s for 15s. The target becomes 34% more likely to drop an item when killed.
- **Rank 1:** Companion marks a target every 15s for 15s. The target becomes 67% more likely to drop an item when killed.
- **Rank 2:** Companion marks a target every 15s for 15s. The target becomes 100% more likely to drop an item when killed.
- **Rank 3:** Companion marks a target every 15s for 15s. The target becomes 134% more likely to drop an item when killed.
- **Rank 4:** Companion marks a target every 15s for 15s. The target becomes 167% more likely to drop an item when killed.
- **Rank 5:** Companion marks a target every 15s for 15s. The target becomes 200% more likely to drop an item when killed.

### Drop Locations
- Corrupted Bombard — Uncommon (0.33%)
- Corrupted Drahk Master — Uncommon (0.33%)
- Corrupted Heavy Gunner — Uncommon (0.33%)
- Corrupted Nullifier — Uncommon (0.33%)
- Lephantis — Uncommon (22.11%)

### Wiki
Spare Parts is a mod for Robotic Companions that periodically marks an enemy to increase their item drop chance upon death.
**Notes:**
This mod follows the precept mod priority order rule, Precept mods will have different priorities in which they are used, based on which slot they equipped in; the top left mod slot has the highest priority and will be used most often, while the bottom right mod slot has the lowest priority and will be used least often. In other words, if you want this mod to work more frequently, it has to be among the first few slots.
Manifold Bond can reduce the 15 second cooldown of this mod ensuring more frequent activations.
Enemies that are marked for this bonus resource drop chance pulse with a yellow energy effect. thumb
Increases the drop chance of resources from normal enemy drop tables. Resources with a 100% drop chance such as a Rare Resource from a boss drop or unique resources like Steel Essence will not be increased since they already have a guaranteed drop chance to begin with.

## Spectral Blades
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 4 | **Max Rank:** 3

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Summon 1 spectral swords that are copies of equipped melee weapon. Melee attacks will simultaneously trigger spectral attacks on any enemies within 10m for 30s. Spectral sword hits increase Combo Count and grant extra Tauron Strike Charge. Spectral swords are granted to all players in Affinity Range.
- **Rank 1:** Summon 2 spectral swords that are copies of equipped melee weapon. Melee attacks will simultaneously trigger spectral attacks on any enemies within 10m for 30s. Spectral sword hits increase Combo Count and grant extra Tauron Strike Charge. Spectral swords are granted to all players in Affinity Range.
- **Rank 2:** Summon 3 spectral swords that are copies of equipped melee weapon. Melee attacks will simultaneously trigger spectral attacks on any enemies within 10m for 30s. Spectral sword hits increase Combo Count and grant extra Tauron Strike Charge. Spectral swords are granted to all players in Affinity Range.
- **Rank 3:** Summon 4 spectral swords that are copies of equipped melee weapon. Melee attacks will simultaneously trigger spectral attacks on any enemies within 10m for 30s. Spectral sword hits increase Combo Count and grant extra Tauron Strike Charge. Spectral swords are granted to all players in Affinity Range.

## Spectral Spirit
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Dagath | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
Can be acquired by attaining the rank of Partner under The Perrin Sequence, or the rank of Exalted under the Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Grave Spirit Augment: Immediately assume Spectral Form. 25% chance for weapons and abilities to apply Doom. Kills outside of Spectral Form decrease its cooldown by 1s.
- **Rank 1:** Grave Spirit Augment: Immediately assume Spectral Form. 50% chance for weapons and abilities to apply Doom. Kills outside of Spectral Form decrease its cooldown by 1s.
- **Rank 2:** Grave Spirit Augment: Immediately assume Spectral Form. 75% chance for weapons and abilities to apply Doom. Kills outside of Spectral Form decrease its cooldown by 1s.
- **Rank 3:** Grave Spirit Augment: Immediately assume Spectral Form. 100% chance for weapons and abilities to apply Doom. Kills outside of Spectral Form decrease its cooldown by 1s.

### Wiki
Spectral Spirit is a Warframe Augment Mod for Dagath's Grave Spirit that immediately enters the spectral form when used and gives all weapons and abilities a chance to inflict Doom for the duration. When outside the spectral form, kills will reduce Grave Spirit's cooldown by 1 second for every kill.
**Notes:**
Cooldown reduction per kill is not affected by mods.
Unlike the base ability, Dagath will only gain the critical damage bonus provided by Grave Spirit while she is in her spectral form.
In addition shields will restore normally while using this ability.
Subsuming Doom for another ability will prevent players from modifying the Phantom Wrath debuff associated with Doom.
With this augment, Grave Spirit can be dispelled, such as Silence from Violence, and immediately forced into cooldown.
Abilities that do not deal damage on cast (i.e. abilities like Breach Surge) will not spread the doom effect on cast.
**Tips:**
Pairs well with Equilibrium and Violet Archon Shard since kills in spectral form have a 100% chance to drop a Health Orb, which allows for easy energy generation.

## Spectrosiphon
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Gara | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under the Arbiters of Hexis, or the rank of Flawless under the New Loka, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.
This mod can periodically be acquired from The Circuit.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Spectrorage Augment: Enemies that die within Spectrorage have a 20% chance to drop an Energy Orb.
- **Rank 1:** Spectrorage Augment: Enemies that die within Spectrorage have a 30% chance to drop an Energy Orb.
- **Rank 2:** Spectrorage Augment: Enemies that die within Spectrorage have a 40% chance to drop an Energy Orb.
- **Rank 3:** Spectrorage Augment: Enemies that die within Spectrorage have a 50% chance to drop an Energy Orb.

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Maxim — Common (100.00%)
- New Loka, Flawless — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Spectrosiphon is a Warframe Augment Mod for Gara's Spectrorage, that makes enemies that die within its influence have a chance to drop an Energy Orb.
**Notes:**
Drop chance is not affected by Ability Strength.
Spectrosiphon affects enemies that die within Spectrorage's charm radius, which extends 4 meters beyond the ring of mirrors. Both the ring and the charm radius are affected by Ability Range.
**Tips:**
This mod synergizes very well with anything that can help pull enemies into a cluster within the ring of mirrors and thus generate a higher chance at yielding energy orbs, such as Proboscis Cernos, Nidus's Larva, Vauban's Bastille in Vortex mode, Khora's Ensnare, Mag's short-tap Magnetize, Yareli's Riptide, Gyre's detonated Coil Horizon, the Vazarin school's Void Snare, or Nautilus's Cordon precept.
As drop chance is unaffected by Ability Strength, players can focus on maximizing Spectrorage's area via Overextended.

Speed Trigger is a mod that increases a primary weapon's fire rate by 10% per rank for a maximum of 60% at Rank 5.

Has no visual effect on continuous weapons (e.g. the Flux Rifle and Ignis) as they shoot out a continuous beam. The number of damage instances will increase with higher fire rate.

## Spellbound Harvest
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Titania | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Flawless under New Loka, or the rank of Exalted under Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Spellbind Augment: Hitting at least 4 enemies with Spellbind grants Titania 20. The next cast has +10% Ability Range.
- **Rank 1:** Spellbind Augment: Hitting at least 4 enemies with Spellbind grants Titania 30. The next cast has +20% Ability Range.
- **Rank 2:** Spellbind Augment: Hitting at least 4 enemies with Spellbind grants Titania 40. The next cast has +30% Ability Range.
- **Rank 3:** Spellbind Augment: Hitting at least 4 enemies with Spellbind grants Titania 50. The next cast has +40% Ability Range.

### Drop Locations
- New Loka, Exalted — Common (100.00%)
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Spellbound Harvest is a Warframe Augment Mod for Titania which lets her regain Energy and increases the Ability Range of the next cast of Spellbind after hitting at least 4 enemies with Spellbind.
**Notes:**
Energy gain is affected by Ability Strength.
Spellbound Harvest still recovers energy even under the effects of Razorwing or any other ability that normally prevents energy regeneration on Warframes that have been injected with a subsumed Spellbind.
Does NOT work on Hildryn or Hildryn/Prime.
Does NOT work on Arbitration Shield Drones.
Enemies don't need to be levitating in order to grant the energy.
Energy is granted when hitting enemies with Overguard.
Has no cooldown, but enemies already floating under the effects of Spellbind will not count towards the 4 needed to toggle it.

- Uranus/Assur (Survival), Rotation B — Rare (6.67%)
- Uranus/Cupid (Survival), Rotation B — Rare (6.67%)
- Uranus/Ophelia (Survival), Rotation B — Rare (6.67%)

### Wiki
Split Chamber is a mod that increases the chance of multishot on rifles by 15% per rank for a maximum of 90% at Rank 5. These additional rounds do not consume extra ammunition.
**Notes:**
The in-game UI considers any possible multishot capabilities when showing final damage numbers, and will display the damage of the weapon as if it was fired once.
Example: A Braton with a level 4 Split Chamber (75%) showing 36 of the total damage, with a 25% chance that the Braton will show a total damage of 18.
This mod also has an effect on weapons with 100% accuracy (such as the Dera), but since the projectiles do not spread out, the extra projectile is generated inside the original projectile. This mod's effects are much more noticeable if Heavy Caliber is installed, as the accuracy penalty generated will allow the projectiles to noticeably spread.
**Tips:**
When calculating DPS for weapons using this mod, apply the damage bonus caused by this mod as a separate multiplier after all other factors have been accounted for.

## Split Flights
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 10 | **Compatible:** Bow | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
This mod can be bought from Baro Ki'Teer for 300 and 200,000.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Hit: +16.7% Multishot -30% Accuracy for 0.333s. Stacks up to 4x. (Non-AOE Bows)
- **Rank 1:** On Hit: +33.3% Multishot -60% Accuracy for 0.666s. Stacks up to 4x. (Non-AOE Bows)
- **Rank 2:** On Hit: +50% Multishot -90% Accuracy for 0.999s. Stacks up to 4x. (Non-AOE Bows)
- **Rank 3:** On Hit: +66.7% Multishot -120% Accuracy for 1s. Stacks up to 4x. (Non-AOE Bows)
- **Rank 4:** On Hit: +83.3% Multishot -150% Accuracy for 2s. Stacks up to 4x. (Non-AOE Bows)
- **Rank 5:** On Hit: +100% Multishot -180% Accuracy for 2s. Stacks up to 4x. (Non-AOE Bows)

### Wiki
Split Flights is a mod which increases a Bow's multishot on hits at the cost of decreased accuracy for a short period of time.
**Notes:**
Cannot be used with Split Chamber or Galvanized Chamber.
Cannot be equipped on:
Artemis Bow
Attica
Kuva Bramma
Lenz (Prisma Lenz)
Nagantaka (Nagantaka Prime)
Nataruk
Proboscis Cernos
Zhuge (Zhuge Prime)
Added spread is not affected by bonuses that increase accuracy, such as Twitch or Guided Ordnance.
Multishot allows for getting multiple stacks in one shot.
Subsequent hits refresh all stacks' duration.
Stacks expire all at once after 2 seconds without a hit.
Mirage's Hall of Mirrors clones do not benefit from this mod.
**Tips:**
Works well with the Mutalist Cernos as damage dealt by the clouds refresh the mod's duration, allowing an even higher amount of procs to occur on targets.
Works well with the Cernos Prime, because each of the innate 3 arrows activate this mod, and the spread from low accuracy is only perpendicular to the spread of the 3 arrows.
Works well with the Paris and Dread incarnons, because they can very easily generate all 4 stacks with a single shot due to their innate infinite punch through and large projectile sizes.
Explosions from Thunderbolt satisfy the requirement to activate the mod, making it easier to keep the buff going.
**Trivia:**
Could unintentionally be acquired via transmutation upon release which was later patched server-side.
This mod was added to Baro Ki'Teer's inventory for the first time on the weekend of March 27, 2020.
ZMzfqvXKJKk

## Spoiled Strike
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Melee | **Max Rank:** 3

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +25% Melee Damage, -5% Attack Speed
- **Rank 1:** +50% Melee Damage, -10% Attack Speed
- **Rank 2:** +75% Melee Damage, -15% Attack Speed
- **Rank 3:** +100% Melee Damage, -20% Attack Speed

### Drop Locations
- Derelict Vault — Rare (4.17%)

### Wiki
Spoiled Strike is a Corrupted Mod that increases damage by 25% per rank while reducing attack speed by -5% per rank of melee attacks for a maximum of 100% damage and -20% attack speed at rank 3.
The damage bonus from this mod stacks additively with Pressure Point.
**Notes:**
Reduction in attack speed can be countered by Fury. With a max of each mod, it will result in 100% more damage and 10% faster attack speed. Quickening can also be added to counter the downside, resulting in a net 20% faster attack speed, with the added bonus of increasing combo count chance. Can be further countered with Berserker Fury, but only recommended on melee weapons you can realistically kill every 10 seconds with and not on boss fights with no extra enemies.
Where possible, it is best to avoid running this mod in your build, even if you plan on running this together with another damage mod like Pressure Point. It is better to run Pressure Point, Primed Pressure Point or Condition Overload (with good enough status chance) over Spoiled Strike. All 3 offer higher damage bonuses without the attack speed penalty, offering higher DPS and damage per hit.

## Spontaneous Singularity
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Simulor | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
Spontaneous Singularity can be obtained by reaching Rank 25 with Nightwave during Nora's Mix Volume 9.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Orbs that strike targets will explode immediately with 15% Bonus Damage and a 3% chance of Singularity that pulls in more targets. Orbs do not bounce or combine.
- **Rank 1:** Orbs that strike targets will explode immediately with 30% Bonus Damage and a 6% chance of Singularity that pulls in more targets. Orbs do not bounce or combine.
- **Rank 2:** Orbs that strike targets will explode immediately with 45% Bonus Damage and a 9% chance of Singularity that pulls in more targets. Orbs do not bounce or combine.
- **Rank 3:** Orbs that strike targets will explode immediately with 60% Bonus Damage and a 12% chance of Singularity that pulls in more targets. Orbs do not bounce or combine.
- **Rank 4:** Orbs that strike targets will explode immediately with 75% Bonus Damage and a 15% chance of Singularity that pulls in more targets. Orbs do not bounce or combine.
- **Rank 5:** Orbs that strike targets will explode immediately with 90% Bonus Damage and a 18% chance of Singularity that pulls in more targets. Orbs do not bounce or combine.

### Wiki
Spontaneous Singularity is an Weapon Augment Mod for Simulor and Synoid Simulor which alters the orbs to instantly detonate upon hitting an enemy, dealing additional damage and a chance of generating a singularity that pulls in nearby enemies, but removes their ability to bounce off surfaces or merge with other orbs.
**Notes:**
Singularities last for 5 seconds.
Orbs that trigger a singularity do not explode.
Singularities can be triggered by contact with teammates or allies and will remain attached to them after triggering.
Setting the second energy color to black will significantly reduce the brightness of the singularity without causing the overall effect to disappear.
