## Thermal Transfer
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Gauss | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under Arbiters of Hexis, or the rank of Partner under The Perrin Sequence, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Thermal Sunder Augment: Allies in range gain 40% bonus Elemental Damage for 18s.
- **Rank 1:** Thermal Sunder Augment: Allies in range gain 50% bonus Elemental Damage for 22s.
- **Rank 2:** Thermal Sunder Augment: Allies in range gain 60% bonus Elemental Damage for 26s.
- **Rank 3:** Thermal Sunder Augment: Allies in range gain 75% bonus Elemental Damage for 30s.

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Maxim — Common (100.00%)
- The Perrin Sequence, Partner — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Thermal Transfer is a Warframe Augment Mod for Gauss's Thermal Sunder, increasing elemental damage for himself and allies within range.
**Notes:**
Tap cast grants Cold damage. Hold cast grants Heat damage.
Both fields can exist simultaneously, granting each elemental buff separately.
If a player obtains both elemental buffs, they combine into a Blast buff, equaling the sum of Cold and Heat damage.
Bonus damage does not combine with modded elements.
Does not affect exalted weapons or warframe abilities.
Duration is refreshed and paused indefinitely while standing in the Thermal Sunder field.
Cold and Heat fields refresh the duration of the corresponding buffs, the Blast damage buff duration is paused in any of the fields.
Sunder areas gain an inward pulsing visual effect to indicate Thermal Transfer is equipped.
The caster and allies see the Thermal Transfer Cold, Heat, or Blast bonus as separate buff icons with a value of the elemental damage added and the remaining duration in seconds.
Elemental Damage bonus scales with Ability Strength.
Buff duration scales with Ability Duration
For status damage purposes Heat bonus is additive with other Heat damage bonuses, while Blast does not contribute towards status damage.

### Wiki
Thermite Rounds is a mod that increases both the Heat damage and status chance of a rifle by 15% per rank for a maximum of 60% at Rank 3.
**Notes:**
Thermite Rounds is additive with similar mods. For example, a Braton Prime with a max rank Thermite Rounds and Rifle Aptitude will have a 26% (1 + 60% + 90%) status chance.
**Trivia:**
Originally this mod was acquired by scoring at least 17 points in a single Operation: Breeding Grounds node run.
Unlike the previous Cicero and Tethra mod sets that depict Warframes already available at the time of the event, the cards from Operation: Breeding Grounds depicted Mirage, a Warframe that at the time was yet to be revealed or released.
Thermite is a pyrotechnic composition of metal powder and metal oxide. The intense heat it generates when ignited is used to cut through or weld together metal objects for civil or military purposes, such as welding together copper wires for electrical connections.

### Wiki
Thief's Wit is an Exilus mod which adds a Loot Radar to the minimap. The loot radar will display resources, lootable canisters, chests, crates, lootable corpses (which only appear during the self-destruction environmental hazard) on the mini-map, and Medallions in Syndicate Alert Missions. Thief's Wit will not display lockers (other than Resource Caches) or dropped blueprints.
**Notes:**
Thief's Wit (and similar mods) will mark Cephalon Fragments in range on the map with a unique blue diamond icon. Somachord and Frame Fighter fragments are likewise marked with their own icons.
When in a mission with other players, resources picked up by another player aside from yourself will not remove them from the mini-map. They will disappear only when you pick it up. The radar is not shared with any other player, so you will need to guide teammates using waypoints, etc. to resources.
Due to the random generation of every map, and also the Containers within them, you will be able to see Containers that you are unable to get to, especially at Rank 4 and above, due to them being in a location that may appear near but is only accessible from a different area of the map.
Originally, the mod granted only 5 meters of vision per rank. The mod was buffed to 7 meters per rank around Update 12.1.
As of Update The Silver Grove, Loot Detector, Animal Instinct and Thief's Wit do not highlight mods through walls.
Thief's Wit, along with Loot Detector and Animal Instinct will display Resource Caches in select Sabotage and Exterminate missions. However, due to the fact that Resource Caches uses the same icon as a normal container, it's advised to go and destroy every container that you see on the minimap.
Does not work on Index points.
24.1.3

## Thrall Pact
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Revenant | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Genius under Cephalon Suda, or the rank of Partner under The Perrin Sequence, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.
This mod can periodically be acquired from The Circuit.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Enthrall Augment: Gain +10% Primary Weapon Damage for each active Thrall.
- **Rank 1:** Enthrall Augment: Gain +15% Primary Weapon Damage for each active Thrall.
- **Rank 2:** Enthrall Augment: Gain +20% Primary Weapon Damage for each active Thrall.
- **Rank 3:** Enthrall Augment: Gain +25% Primary Weapon Damage for each active Thrall.

### Drop Locations
- Cephalon Suda, Genius — Common (100.00%)
- The Perrin Sequence, Partner — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Thrall Pact is an Warframe Augment Mod for Revenant's Enthrall that grants him additional damage for the equipped primary weapon for every enemy he has enthralled.
**Notes:**
Damage bonus is affected by Ability Strength.
The damage bonus from Thrall Pact stacks additively with damage bonuses such as Serration, Galvanized Aptitude, and Primary Merciless.
The modified damage can be calculated using the following formula:
Modified Damage = Base Damage x (1 + Thrall Pact Bonus x (1 + Ability Strength) x Number of Enthralled Enemies + Damage Mods)
For example, with a max rank Serration and Intensify, 4 enthralled enemies, and a weapon that deals 100 damage, the total modified damage will be:
100 x (1 + 0.25 x (1 + 0.3) x 4 + 1.65) = 395

## Thrash Landing
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** K-Drive | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
Can be purchased from Roky after reaching Rank Logical with the Ventkids for 20,000 Standing.

### Drop Locations
- Ventkids, Logical — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Thrash Landing is a K-Drive mod that deals Blast damage on landing, to enemies within range. Damage is calculated based on a percentage of Trick score.
**Notes:**
Amount of damage is capped at 1,200.
All enemies hit are knocked down, regardless of damage taken.
Damage falls off with range.
Applies an explosion-style visual affect whenever the user lands a trick.

## Thunderbolt
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Bow | **Max Rank:** 3

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +7.5% Chance to Explode (Use with Caution)
- **Rank 1:** +15% Chance to Explode (Use with Caution)
- **Rank 2:** +22.5% Chance to Explode (Use with Caution)
- **Rank 3:** +30% Chance to Explode (Use with Caution)

### Drop Locations
- Darek Draga — Legendary (0.02%)
- Dargyn Pilot — Legendary (0.02%)
- Draga — Legendary (0.02%)
- Elite Arid Lancer — Legendary (0.02%)
- Elite Frontier Lancer — Legendary (0.02%)
- Elite Lancer — Legendary (0.02%)
- Kuva Elite Lancer — Legendary (0.02%)
- Narmer Elite Lancer — Legendary (0.02%)
- Shock Draga — Legendary (0.02%)
- Tusk Elite Lancer — Legendary (0.02%)
- Ceres/Seimeni (Defense), Rotation C — Legendary (0.40%)
- Earth/Coba (Defense), Rotation C — Legendary (0.40%)
- Eris/Akkad (Defense), Rotation C — Legendary (0.40%)
- Europa/Larzac (Defense), Rotation C — Legendary (0.40%)
- Jupiter/Sinai (Defense), Rotation C — Legendary (0.40%)
- Mars/Kadesh (Defense), Rotation C — Legendary (0.40%)
- Pluto/Sechura (Defense), Rotation C — Legendary (0.40%)
- Sedna/Sangeru (Defense), Rotation C — Legendary (0.40%)
- Venus/Romula (Defense), Rotation C — Legendary (0.40%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 6 (Normal) — Rare (1.03%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 4 (Normal) — Rare (1.49%)

### Wiki
Thunderbolt is a mod that gives arrows fired from primary bows a chance of exploding on impact of a surface or an enemy.
**Notes:**
The explosion deals 250 Blast damage to the target, as well as to nearby enemies within 10 meters of the blast.
The explosion inflicts self-stagger.
Unlike the area blasts of dedicated blast weapons like Launchers, Thunderbolt does NOT have a safety distance to prevent self-stagger. Furthermore, if the shot hits and explodes close enough to you it will do a full Knockdown instead of just a self-stagger.
The explosive damage from this mod cannot be increased with base damage, such as Serration, and elemental mods such as Hellfire, but it will be increased by Bane mods, like Bane of Infested.
Compared to Launchers, the Thunderbolt blast has full Punch Through (like most Launchers) and zero falloff throughout its entire area of effect (unlike most Launchers), so all enemies take full damage even at the outer-most edges of the blast while behind cover.
The blast area is increased by Firestorm or Primed Firestorm.
The explosions are silent.
Arrows fired at terrain and other surfaces still explode, but not arrows fired at teammates or other allies.
When the explosion occurs, the projectile of the arrow causing that is actually "dissolved". Thus any subsequent mechanics relating to the projectile will not happen, such as punching through or the spore coming after the arrow of Mutalist Cernos.
Cannot be equipped on Lenz.
Can be paired with Cautious Shot to reduce stagger effects.
The explosion will trigger effects that activate upon damaging enemies; for example, the Thunderbolt explosion created from an Evensong's projectile will apply Puncture status effects to each enemy it hits.

## Tidal Impunity
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Hydroid | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Genius under Cephalon Suda, or the rank of Flawless under New Loka, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Tidal Surge Augment: Clears Status Effects and grants 8s of Status Immunity for yourself and allies that come in contact with it. Reduces Tidal Surge's Energy cost to 15.
- **Rank 1:** Tidal Surge Augment: Clears Status Effects and grants 9s of Status Immunity for yourself and allies that come in contact with it. Reduces Tidal Surge's Energy cost to 15.
- **Rank 2:** Tidal Surge Augment: Clears Status Effects and grants 10s of Status Immunity for yourself and allies that come in contact with it. Reduces Tidal Surge's Energy cost to 15.
- **Rank 3:** Tidal Surge Augment: Clears Status Effects and grants 12s of Status Immunity for yourself and allies that come in contact with it. Reduces Tidal Surge's Energy cost to 15.

### Drop Locations
- Cephalon Suda, Genius — Common (100.00%)
- New Loka, Flawless — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Tidal Impunity is a Hydroid Warframe Augment Mod for Tidal Surge that allows Hydroid and all allies contacted by the ability to temporarily gain immunity to Status Effects, as well as removing already active ones. Also passively reduces Tidal Surge's base energy cost to 15.
**Notes:**
Duration is affected by Ability Duration.
Status effect immunity includes protection against stun, stagger, and knockdown which is reduced to a minor knockback effect.
Affected players are enveloped by water tinted with their selected energy color for the duration.
Reduces Tidal Surge combo casts to 7.5 energy.

## Titanic Rumbler
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Atlas | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of General under Steel Meridian, or the rank of Exalted under the Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Rumblers Augment: Create a single rumbler with 200% Health and 200% Damage. Reactivating will cause him to slam the floor and knockdown enemies in 15m.
- **Rank 1:** Rumblers Augment: Create a single rumbler with 225% Health and 250% Damage. Reactivating will cause him to slam the floor and knockdown enemies in 15m.
- **Rank 2:** Rumblers Augment: Create a single rumbler with 265% Health and 300% Damage. Reactivating will cause him to slam the floor and knockdown enemies in 15m.
- **Rank 3:** Rumblers Augment: Create a single rumbler with 300% Health and 400% Damage. Reactivating will cause him to slam the floor and knockdown enemies in 15m.

### Drop Locations
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)
- Steel Meridian, General — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Titanic Rumbler is a Warframe Augment Mod for Atlas that modifies Rumblers to make one larger Rumbler with more health, damage, and melee range, and will occasionally increase its Threat Level, instead of the normal two Rumblers. The recast ability to remove Rumblers is replaced by the taunt and a slam attack that knocks down all enemies within 15 meters.
**Notes:**
At max rank and without other mods, Titanic Rumbler will cause Atlas to spawn a single, larger Rumbler with 18,000 health, 6,000 punch damage and 1500 rock throw damage.
Health is affected by Health and Shield mods.
Health and damage are affected by Ability Strength.
While Titanic Rumbler is equipped, reactivating the ability will make the Rumbler taunt nearby enemies and perform a slam attack that inflicts Ability Strength500 Impact damage in Ability Range15 meters radius.
Slam attack has a static cooldown of 6 seconds.
Slam damage is not affected by Summoner's Wrath, Nourish, or even Roar (regardless of the buff being applied to Atlas himself or to the Rumbler).
Atlas cannot unsummon the Rumbler while Titanic Rumbler is equipped.

## Total Eclipse
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Mirage | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under the Arbiters of Hexis, or the rank of Genius under Cephalon Suda, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.
This mod can periodically be acquired from The Circuit.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Eclipse Augment: While active, allies within 8m benefit from Eclipse.
- **Rank 1:** Eclipse Augment: While active, allies within 10m benefit from Eclipse.
- **Rank 2:** Eclipse Augment: While active, allies within 12m benefit from Eclipse.
- **Rank 3:** Eclipse Augment: While active, allies within 15m benefit from Eclipse.

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Maxim — Common (100.00%)
- Cephalon Suda, Genius — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Total Eclipse is a Mirage Warframe Augment Mod for Eclipse that allows it to grant its bonuses to nearby allies.
**Notes:**
Range is affected by Ability Range.
Affected Defense Objects cap their damage reduction at 50%.
Total Eclipse applies to other players, Companions, Specters, friendly AI and Mirage's Hall of Mirrors dopplegangers
Total Eclipse also appears to apply to ability-related specters of other Warframes when Eclipse is subsumed, including Celestial Twin, Metamorphosis with Duality, Shadows of the Dead.
Eclipse's bonus will add separately from other damage-bonus augments (such as Freeze Force), though it will still affect modded elemental values when applied on weapons.
A Mirage under the effects of both her own Eclipse and an allied Total Eclipse will only benefit from her own Eclipse. The allied Total Eclipse will not stack.
**Trivia:**
A total eclipse is when an observer is in the umbra, or the darkest part, of a given eclipse, be it Lunar or Solar.
On August 21, 2017, this mod was awarded through a special 24-hour Gift from the Lotus Excavation alert on Earth, when a Solar eclipse passed over the mainland United States the same day, the first such event in nearly a century, and the first total eclipse to cross the area in four decades. This makes the mod the first, and up until the introduction of The Circuit in Update 33.0, the only, Syndicate Augment to be awarded outside its related Syndicates.

## Toxic Barrage

### Acquisition
Originally acquired as a limited-edition reward from participating in The Cicero Crisis (50 points)
Can be acquired as a possible drop by killing Corrupted Vor in Orokin Void missions level >=40 such as Mithra and Mot
25% drop chance; it has 100% drop, but shares this with its counterparts - Pistol Pestilence, Virulent Scourge, Malignant Force
It was also acquired as a drop from Razorback Armada via killing the Razorback; however, this is no longer possible.

### Wiki
Toxic Barrage is a mod that increases both the Toxin damage and status chance of a shotgun by 15% per rank for a maximum of 60% at rank 3.
**Notes:**
Toxic Barrage is additive with similar mods. For example, a Strun with a max rank Toxic Barrage and Shotgun Savvy will have a 20% (1 + 60% + 90%) status chance.
This mod can be combined with Frigid Blast, Shell Shock and Scattering Inferno to achieve a combined status chance bonus of 240%. With Shotgun Savvy, this bonus can be increased to 330%.

## Toxin Resistance
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** vazarin | **Drain:** -2 | **Compatible:** AURA | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +2.5% Toxin Resistance
- **Rank 1:** +5% Toxin Resistance
- **Rank 2:** +7.5% Toxin Resistance
- **Rank 3:** +10% Toxin Resistance
- **Rank 4:** +12.5% Toxin Resistance
- **Rank 5:** +15% Toxin Resistance

### Drop Locations
- Nox — Rare (0.23%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 1 (Normal) — Legendary (0.67%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 3 (Normal) — Legendary (0.67%)

### Wiki
Toxin Resistance is an aura mod that reduces Toxin damage by 2.5% per rank, up to 15% at max. This can be stacked with other teammates. Its effect is similar to Antitoxin.
* Aura mods increase the amount of Mod Capacity
**Notes:**
Damage resistance works on both health and shields. It also works for damage over time effects dealt by Toxin procs.
Only Hildryn with overshields active can make use of the damage resistance to shields, as Toxin bypasses shields otherwise.
Increases effective health/shields by +17.7% against Toxin damage.
100% (100% - 15%) more effective health/shields
Damage resistance bonus is multiplicative with other sources of damage resistance such as Adaptation and Antitoxin
This mod can be used to reduce the effect of Toxic Ancient's toxin damage when touching them. It also reduces the DoT toxin proc effect that can happen when coming into contact with them.
It may also be useful in Sortie missions where elemental enhancement is present and the enemies are modified with additional Toxin damage.
**Trivia:**
For a short time after Update 10.6 this mod could have been acquired via Transmutation. This was due to a bug where all mods, including unreleased ones such as this one, became obtainable through transmutation. This has since been fixed, but players who obtained the mod this way were allowed to keep them.
As of Update 11.0.6 all unreleased mods were made untradeable.

## Tractor Beam
**Rarity:** Common | **Polarity:** penjaga | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Moa | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
Tractor Beam is automatically acquired upon obtaining a MOA built with the Oloro Model.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +20% Aim Glide Duration -12.5% Gravity
- **Rank 1:** +50% Aim Glide Duration -25% Gravity
- **Rank 2:** +75% Aim Glide Duration -37.5% Gravity
- **Rank 3:** +100% Aim Glide Duration -50% Gravity

### Wiki
Tractor Beam is a precept mod for MOAs that increases Warframe aim glide duration and reduces the effects of gravity whilst aim gliding.
**Notes:**
The aim glide and gravity buff is stored in charges that regenerate once every 5s. Up to 3 buffs can be stored, and each lasts 5s.
The buff, its charges, and duration is indicated by a symbol in the UI.
Only one stack of the buff can be activated before the player needs to touch the ground to activate another one.
Once the buff is activated, it will last a full 5s regardless if the player is utilizing it. Initiating another aim glide after touching the ground consumes a charge, even if the ongoing charge's duration hasn't finished yet. However, the remaining duration is combined with the new buff's, despite the UI not clearly reflecting this.
The player must be within 20m of the MOA for the buff to be applied. If the player goes out of range while the effect is active, it will persist until they stop aim gliding.
The reduction to gravity only takes effect during aim glide.
Despite not being in the description of the mod, the regeneration cooldown of charges is affected by the rank of Tractor Beam.

## Tranquil Cleave
Powerful arcs with frenzied combo.
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** -2 | **Compatible:** Nikanas | **Max Rank:** 3

### Drop Locations
- Arid Butcher — Rare (0.03%)
- Frontier Butcher — Rare (0.03%)
- Narmer Butcher — Rare (0.03%)
- Sedna/Undine (Arena) — Legendary (0.40%)

### Wiki
Tranquil Cleave is a stance mod for Nikanas. This stance features swift and precise single-handed slashes.
**Notes:**
Many of the attacks have Puncture or Slash damage multipliers.
Every hit of Breathless Lunge's first attack has a 1.5x Puncture damage multiplier.
The third attack of Breathless Lunge has a 2x Slash damage multiplier.
The third attack of Windless Cut has a 1.5x Slash damage multiplier.
The first attack of Beyond Reproach has a 1.2x Slash damage multiplier.
Certain attacks have status chance multipliers.
The second hit of the first attack of Breathless Lunge has a 1.5x status chance multiplier.
The third hit of the first attack of Breathless Lunge has a 1.25x status chance multiplier.
The third attack of Breathless Lunge has a 2x status chance multiplier.
The first hit of Breathless Lunge's second attack generates 3 combo instead of 1.

## Transfusion
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** penjaga | **Drain:** 0 | **Compatible:** Vasca Kavat | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
Transfusion is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Vasca Kavat.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** When its Master is bleeding out, the Vasca Kavat sacrifices 80% of its Health to raise them.
- **Rank 1:** When its Master is bleeding out, the Vasca Kavat sacrifices 60% of its Health to raise them.
- **Rank 2:** When its Master is bleeding out, the Vasca Kavat sacrifices 40% of its Health to raise them.
- **Rank 3:** When its Master is bleeding out, the Vasca Kavat sacrifices 20% of its Health to raise them.

### Wiki
Transfusion is a precept mod for the Vasca Kavat to sacrifice a percentage of their own Health to revive its owner from bleedout, with a 120 second cooldown between uses.
**Notes:**
During bleedout, the Vasca Kavat will sacrifice 20% of its max health to revive its owner, restoring them to full Health and Shields, along with 5 seconds of Invulnerability.
Tranfusion will not work if the Kavat does not have enough health to sacrifice. It will also not work during Arbitrations, as the player cannot enter bleedout.
Getting downed in Solo play will trigger Bleedout state regardless of the mod's cooldown.
Has a 120 second cooldown between uses.
The cooldown will still progress even while the Vasca Kavat is incapacitated.

## Transient Fortitude
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** WARFRAME | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 10

### Acquisition
Transient Fortitude is a possible reward from an Orokin Vault on Deimos.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +5% Ability Strength, -2.5% Ability Duration
- **Rank 1:** +10% Ability Strength, -5% Ability Duration
- **Rank 2:** +15% Ability Strength, -7.5% Ability Duration
- **Rank 3:** +20% Ability Strength, -10% Ability Duration
- **Rank 4:** +25% Ability Strength, -12.5% Ability Duration
- **Rank 5:** +30% Ability Strength, -15% Ability Duration
- **Rank 6:** +35% Ability Strength, -17.5% Ability Duration
- **Rank 7:** +40% Ability Strength, -20% Ability Duration
- **Rank 8:** +45% Ability Strength, -22.5% Ability Duration
- **Rank 9:** +50% Ability Strength, -25% Ability Duration
- **Rank 10:** +55% Ability Strength, -27.5% Ability Duration

### Drop Locations
- Derelict Vault — Rare (4.17%)

### Wiki
Transient Fortitude is a Corrupted Mod that increases Ability Strength while reducing the Ability Duration of Warframe abilities.
**Notes:**
A max rank Continuity, Constitution, or Primed Continuity mod will negate the loss of Ability Duration this mod has at max rank.
Transient Fortitude's negative Ability Duration of 27.5% will be rounded up to 28%. Therefore, Continuity will give a +2% in Ability Duration, Constitution will simply negate its effects, and Primed Continuity will give a +27% Ability Duration at max rank.
Can be stacked with Blind Rage, Intensify, Augur Secrets and Power Drift to provide a total of +223% Ability Strength, and 259% with all three Umbral mods.
You may also stack it with Energy Conversion to get a total of +273% Ability Strength after collecting an Energy Orb, 309% Ability Strength with the Umbral mods.
A maxed Intensify has the same bonus and power cost as a Rank 5 Transient Fortitude but without the penalties.
It is advised not to use this mod alongside Fleeting Expertise for most builds on your warframe, as this will lead to an 87.5% reduction in Ability Duration at max rank.

## Transistor Shield
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Volt | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under the Arbiters of Hexis, or the rank of Exalted under Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Electric Shield Augment: Allies can pick up Electric Shield. 150% of damage absorbed will be added to Volt's Static Discharge.
- **Rank 1:** Electric Shield Augment: Allies can pick up Electric Shield. 200% of damage absorbed will be added to Volt's Static Discharge.
- **Rank 2:** Electric Shield Augment: Allies can pick up Electric Shield. 250% of damage absorbed will be added to Volt's Static Discharge.
- **Rank 3:** Electric Shield Augment: Allies can pick up Electric Shield. 300% of damage absorbed will be added to Volt's Static Discharge.

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Maxim — Common (100.00%)
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Transistor Shield is a Warframe Augment Mod for Volt's Electric Shield that allows allies to pick up and move Electric Shields. Additionally, a percentage of enemy damage absorbed by the Electric Shield(s) will add up to Volt's Static Discharge passive.
**Notes:**
Damage absorbed is directly affected by Ability Strength.
Any damage absorbed by Electric Shield will contribute to Volt's Static Discharge passive, but it cannot exceed the 1000 damage cap on the passive itself.

## Tribunal
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Harrow | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under Arbiters of Hexis, or the rank of Exalted under Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Condemn Augment: Other players will trigger 40% of the effects of Penance and Thurible when attacking chained enemies.
- **Rank 1:** Condemn Augment: Other players will trigger 60% of the effects of Penance and Thurible when attacking chained enemies.
- **Rank 2:** Condemn Augment: Other players will trigger 80% of the effects of Penance and Thurible when attacking chained enemies.
- **Rank 3:** Condemn Augment: Other players will trigger 100% of the effects of Penance and Thurible when attacking chained enemies.

### Drop Locations
- Arbiters of Hexis, Maxim — Common (100.00%)
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Tribunal is a Warframe Augment Mod for Harrow which lets other players proc a percentage of Penance and Thurible's shared effects, specifically lifesteal and energy regeneration, when attacking enemies chained by Condemn.
**Notes:**
Effect percentage is not affected by mods.
Harrow must have Penance and/or Thurible active to allow allies to proc their effects from enemies chained by Condemn.
Allies gain the lifesteal on hit from Penance, and energy per kill or per headshot kill from Thurible. Harrow also gains the health and energy earned by his allies.
Health and energy points earned from allies are shown to Harrow on his HUD pertaining to the respective abilities. Health points beneath the aiming reticle, and energy notification messages above the ability icons.

**Notes:**
For any non-integer maximum ammo capacity values the capacity is rounded down to the nearest whole number. For example, a Kulstar modded with a max rank Trick Mag will have a calculated maximum ammo capacity of 15 (1 + 90%), which will round down to 15 (1 + 90%).

- Venus/Malva (Survival), Rotation C — Uncommon (11.28%)

### Wiki
True Punishment gives a chance for an additional combo point while decreasing combo duration.
**Notes:**
The additional Combo Count Chance seems to universally affect all sources of combo count generation.
The Combo Duration penalty is calculated from the melee weapon's base value. Meaning it always subtracts exactly 2.5 seconds and therefore is easily counteracted by Combo Duration mods (e.g. Body Count, Swift Momentum, Rising Storm).
Pairs well with stances that have high damage multipliers in their combos and each pellet from Gunblade shots.
Crushing Ruin's Winding Temper combo is one attack consisting of 3 hits for 300%, 200%, and 400% damage, respectively, totaling +9 hit combo if the target survives the first two hits.
The Redeemer shoots 10 pellets with each shot, resulting in +10 hit combo if they all hit a target.
**Trivia:**
Unlike most mods, the picture shows an Excalibur wearing the Pendragon helmet, his Immortal Skin, as well as a different color scheme. This is a rare instance of a mod depicting a non-default character loadout. Other examples are Life Strike, Second Wind, Enduring Strike, Warrior's Grip, Quickening and Corrupt Charge, all of which are Heavy Attack/Combo related mods.
This is currently one of two non-stance weapon mods that use the Zenurik Zenurik Polarity. The other mod is Enduring Strike.
Prior to Update 26, this mod grants additional critical chance upon Channeling while reducing Channeling efficiency.

## Truth's Flame
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Melee | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
Purchased from Aspirant Zorba at any relay for 360 Atramentum.
The damage bonus is only active following the first kill, and is additive with mods like Pressure Point.
Not using the Tennokai opportunity even after the first kill will not reset your combo and will not apply the curse.
Activating Tennokai and then immediately roll to cancel it will not reset your combo and apply the curse as well.
This mod counts as a Syndicate augment, meaning you cannot equip other augments together with this mod.
The Combo reset bypasses all forms of Heavy Attack Efficiency.
Known Bugs
Does not work with Glaive weapons.
Heat status effect isn't negated by Status Effect Negation Abilities, and bypasses Overguard.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Enables Tennokai. Tennokai kills grant an additional 4s Tennokai opportunity and increase Tennokai damage by 30%. CURSE: Suffer 25 Heat Damage/s for 6s., +0.3 'Truth'
- **Rank 1:** Enables Tennokai. Tennokai kills grant an additional 4s Tennokai opportunity and increase Tennokai damage by 40%. CURSE: Suffer 35 Heat Damage/s for 6s., +0.5 'Truth'
- **Rank 2:** Enables Tennokai. Tennokai kills grant an additional 4s Tennokai opportunity and increase Tennokai damage by 60%. CURSE: Suffer 50 Heat Damage/s for 6s., +0.8 'Truth'
- **Rank 3:** Enables Tennokai. Tennokai kills grant an additional 4s Tennokai opportunity and increase Tennokai damage by 120%. CURSE: Suffer 100 Heat Damage/s for 6s., +1 'Truth'

### Wiki
Truth's Flame is an Exilus Weapon Mod for melee weapons that enables chaining Tennokai opportunities with increased Melee Damage on successful Tennokai kills and self-inflicting Heat damage whilst resetting the Combo Counter on failed Tennokai kills, and adds a Truth effect.
**Trivia:**
This is the first (and so far the only) Tennokai mod:
Obtainable outside of Albrecht's Laboratories, and
Associated with a Faction Syndicate

## Twitch
**Rarity:** Uncommon | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Rifle | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
Acquired by attaining the rank of Mistral under the Conclave Syndicate, and spending 10,000 Standing to purchase.
Can be obtained as a drop from a Conculyst.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Equip: -10% Weapon Recoil and +10% Accuracy for 8s
- **Rank 1:** On Equip: -20% Weapon Recoil and +20% Accuracy for 8s
- **Rank 2:** On Equip: -30% Weapon Recoil and +30% Accuracy for 8s
- **Rank 3:** On Equip: -40% Weapon Recoil and +40% Accuracy for 8s

### Drop Locations
- Conclave, Mistral — Common (100.00%)
- Archimedean Itzam — Uncommon (2.29%)
- Conculyst — Uncommon (2.29%)
- Decaying Conculyst — Uncommon (2.29%)
- Ortholyst — Uncommon (2.29%)
- Summulyst — Uncommon (2.29%)

### Wiki
Twitch is a rifle mod usable in both PvE and PvP reduces recoil and increases accuracy for 8 seconds upon holstering a weapon. This effect works for both primary and secondary weapons.
**Notes:**
Does not trigger while using Artemis Bow.
Previously, a rare version of this mod was acquirable, although it didn't affect the total percentage change, only the rarity and Conculyst drop rate.
The rarity of this mod changed in an unmarked hotfix during Update 18.
Both recoil and spread reduction apply to all weapons, not just the one equipped with this mod.
Buff is refreshed, whenever a weapon is equipped.
Buff stacks additively with those from Soft Hands and Reflex Draw.

## Ulfrun's Endurance
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Voruna | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of General under Steel Meridian, or the rank of Exalted under Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Ulfrun's Descent Augment: During Ulfrun's attack, enemies that die from Slash Status within 5m restore Voruna's charges.
- **Rank 1:** Ulfrun's Descent Augment: During Ulfrun's attack, enemies that die from Slash Status within 10m restore Voruna's charges.
- **Rank 2:** Ulfrun's Descent Augment: During Ulfrun's attack, enemies that die from Slash Status within 15m restore Voruna's charges.
- **Rank 3:** Ulfrun's Descent Augment: During Ulfrun's attack, enemies that die from Slash Status within 20m restore Voruna's charges.

### Drop Locations
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)
- Steel Meridian, General — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Ulfrun's Endurance is a Warframe Augment Mod for Voruna that restores Ulfrun's Descent charges whenever a nearby enemy dies from Slash status effect.
**Notes:**
Range is affected by Ability Range.
Despite its description, the augment only restores a charge if the enemy directly targeted by the lunge attack dies instantly or due to the Slash procs from abilities such as Ulfrun's Descent or Fangs of Raksh while in range.
This also applies to helminth abilities such as Aquablades, as long as the Slash proc is caused by an ability Voruna has cast.
This includes inflicting a Slash proc with a weapon, then duplicating it with Sickening Pulse, since the duplicated procs are created by an ability.
Slash procs made by ally abilities do not count for restoring charges.
Nearby enemies who die due to the radial Slash damage do not restore charges.
**Tips:**
When targeting a durable enemy, it is best to wait for them to die due to the innate Slash proc instead of lunging for a second time to save charges.
Equipping the augment is the only way to reach the maximum stacks of the damage multiplier, Critical Chance, and Critical Damage, as they can only be achieved after 5 direct kills.
Using Fangs of Raksh can apply Slash procs, making it possible to regenerate charges without spending them, and can restore multiple charges due to the status effects spreading when the target dies.

## Umbral Fiber
**Rarity:** Legendary | **Polarity:** umbra | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** WARFRAME | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 10

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +9% Armor, +1% Tau Resistance
- **Rank 1:** +18% Armor, +2% Tau Resistance
- **Rank 2:** +27% Armor, +3% Tau Resistance
- **Rank 3:** +36% Armor, +4% Tau Resistance
- **Rank 4:** +45% Armor, +5% Tau Resistance
- **Rank 5:** +55% Armor, +6% Tau Resistance
- **Rank 6:** +64% Armor, +7% Tau Resistance
- **Rank 7:** +73% Armor, +8% Tau Resistance
- **Rank 8:** +82% Armor, +9% Tau Resistance
- **Rank 9:** +91% Armor, +10% Tau Resistance
- **Rank 10:** +100% Armor, +11% Tau Resistance

### Drop Locations
- Cephalon Simaris, Complete The Sacrifice — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Umbral Fiber is the Umbra variant of Steel Fiber, increasing a Warframe's Armor and Tau resistance.
The other mods of this set are Umbral Intensify and Umbral Vitality.
Umbral Set: Enhances the primary values of other mods in the set.
**Notes:**
This mod is given at the penultimate mission of The Sacrifice, automatically ranked to level 5. Additional unranked mods can be bought from Cephalon Simaris for 100,000 Standing.
Umbral Fiber is essentially the Steel Fiber mod with Legendary rarity. It is considered the same mod as its Common counterpart, and thus both mods cannot be equipped together.
The set bonus for Umbral Fiber increases the Armor given by the mod by 30% of mod's value when using 2 set pieces and 80% when using 3. At max rank with full set bonus, Umbral Fiber grants an Armor increase of 180%, and increases Tau resistance by 19.8%.
Resistance values in the above stat table are calculated based on set bonus values, displayed values are rounded to the first decimal place ingame.
Unlike Umbral Fiber and Umbral Vitality, Umbral Intensify's stats only increase by 25% and 75% due to set bonuses instead of 30% and 80%.
This mod outperforms Steel Fiber from rank 8 when using 2 set pieces and from rank 6 when using 3.
Umbra mods have a unique Umbra polarity, whose matching polarity can currently only be found on Excalibur Umbra, Exalted Umbra Blade, and the Skiajati. It is possible to (re-)add a Umbra polarity to a mod slot but only through the use of Umbra Forma, which can be obtained either directly, from Nightwave, or built with blueprints purchasable once every 8 weeks with Steel Essence. Given the extremely limited rate of acquisition, it is advised not to re-Forma any mod slot with an Umbra polarity.
23.0.1

- **Rank 7:** +32% Ability Strength, +8% Tau Resistance

### Wiki
Umbral Intensify is the Umbra variant of Intensify, increasing a Warframe's Ability Strength and Tau resistance.
The other mods of this set are Umbral Vitality and Umbral Fiber.
Umbral Set: Enhances the primary values of other mods in the set.
**Notes:**
This mod is given at the penultimate mission of The Sacrifice, automatically ranked to level 5. Additional unranked mods can be bought from Cephalon Simaris for 100,000 Standing.
Umbral Intensify is essentially the Intensify mod with Legendary rarity and 5 more ranks. It is considered the same mod as its Rare counterpart, and thus both mods cannot be equipped together.
The set bonus for Umbral Intensify increases the Ability Strength given by the mod by 25% of mod's value when using 2 set pieces and 75% when using 3. At max rank with full set bonus, Umbral Intensify grants an Ability Strength increase of 77%, and increases Tau resistance by 19.25%.
Resistance values in the above stat table are calculated based on set bonus values, displayed values are rounded to the first decimal place ingame.
Unlike Umbral Intensify, Umbral Fiber and Umbral Vitality increase their stats by 30% and 80% due to set bonuses instead of 25% and 75%.
This mod outperforms Intensify from rank 7 alone, from rank 6 with 2 set pieces and from rank 4 with 3 set pieces.
Umbra mods have a unique Umbra polarity, whose matching polarity can currently only be found on Excalibur Umbra, Exalted Umbra Blade, and the Skiajati. It is possible to (re-)add a Umbra polarity to a mod slot but only through the use of Umbra Forma, which can be obtained either directly, from Nightwave, or built with blueprints purchasable once every 8 weeks with Steel Essence. Given the extremely limited rate of acquisition, it is advised not to re-Forma any mod slot with an Umbra polarity.

The other mods of this set are Umbral Intensify and Umbral Fiber.
**Notes:**
Umbral Vitality is essentially the Vitality mod with Legendary rarity. It is considered the same mod as its Common counterpart, and thus both mods cannot be equipped together.
The set bonus for Umbral Vitality increases the maximum Health given by the mod by 30% of mod's value when using 2 set pieces and 80% when using 3. At max rank with full set bonus, Umbral Vitality grants a Health increase of 180%, and increases Tau resistance by 19.8%.

## Untime Rift
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Xaku | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Genius under Cephalon Suda, or the rank of General under the Steel Meridian, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** The Vast Untime Augment: Creates a Rift that connects to enemies suffering from Void Status Effect within 9m, doubling debuffs applied by The Vast Untime and maintaining Void Status.
- **Rank 1:** The Vast Untime Augment: Creates a Rift that connects to enemies suffering from Void Status Effect within 11m, doubling debuffs applied by The Vast Untime and maintaining Void Status.
- **Rank 2:** The Vast Untime Augment: Creates a Rift that connects to enemies suffering from Void Status Effect within 13m, doubling debuffs applied by The Vast Untime and maintaining Void Status.
- **Rank 3:** The Vast Untime Augment: Creates a Rift that connects to enemies suffering from Void Status Effect within 15m, doubling debuffs applied by The Vast Untime and maintaining Void Status.

### Wiki
Untime Rift is a Warframe Augment Mod for Xaku's The Vast Untime that creates a void rift which tethers to enemies affected by the Void status effect, pausing the duration of the status effect as long as they are within range, while also doubling the Void Damage Vulnerability and Slow effects from The Vast Untime.
**Notes:**
Instead of doubling The Vast Untime Damage Vulnerability, this augment applies a second instance of it, meaning enemies take 125% more Void damage instead of 100%.
Because Xata's Whisper is the only way for Xaku to gain Void status, this ability is effectively mandatory to properly use this augment mod.
Untime Rift will continue to tether to new enemies affected by Void status after the initial casting of The Vast Untime.
The Slow is capped at 95%, with it can be achieved using less Ability Strength.

## Untraceable
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** universal | **Drain:** 0 | **Compatible:** Parazon | **Max Rank:** 0

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Invisible for 15s after Hacking

### Drop Locations
- Kuva Fortress/Pago (Spy), Rotation B — Uncommon (10.00%)

### Wiki
Untraceable is a Parazon mod that turns the player invisible for 15 seconds upon successfully Hacking a console.
**Notes:**
Successfully hacking a console while the invisibility buff is already active will refresh the buff timer.
Attacking while the invisiblity buff is active does NOT end the buff.
Despite the patch history stating that the invisibility buff lasts 18 seconds, it is actually only 15 seconds in-game.
**Tips:**
Particularly useful for Spy missions, especially for Warframes with no stealth ability, as there are always consoles at the vaults' entrance.

## Vacuum
**Rarity:** Common | **Polarity:** penjaga | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** ROBOTIC | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
Vacuum does not drop from any enemy, and is not obtainable from any mission. Instead, you will be given one copy every time you claim a Sentinel from your Foundry.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** 8.5m Companion Gather-Link. Detects and collects items, including mods.
- **Rank 1:** 9.5m Companion Gather-Link. Detects and collects items, including mods.
- **Rank 2:** 10.5m Companion Gather-Link. Detects and collects items, including mods.
- **Rank 3:** 11.5m Companion Gather-Link. Detects and collects items, including mods.
- **Rank 4:** 12.5m Companion Gather-Link. Detects and collects items, including mods.
- **Rank 5:** 13.5m Companion Gather-Link. Detects and collects items, including mods.

### Wiki
Vacuum is a Robotic mod that pulls in Pickups, Ammo, and Mods toward the Warframe from farther away.
**Notes:**
Vacuum will still function while the Companion is Incapacitated.
If affected by Confusion from Radiation, Vacuum will be disabled until the effect runs out.
Vacuum will still pull the loot if you are in the Rift Plane, however, you will not be able to collect these items until you are no longer in the Rift Plane or you bring them in by entering Cataclysm.
The following items cannot be attracted by Vacuum, despite not requiring to be picked up manually, but can still be attracted by Cosmic Crush:
Cetus Wisps
Sentient Cores
Eidolon Shards
Profit-Taker Orb's drops
Exploiter Orb's drops
**Trivia:**
In Update The Vacuum Within, Vacuum was removed from Carrier and was replaced with Ammo Case, while the vacuum effect was applied to all Sentinels. In Update The Vacuum Within 2, Vacuum was returned to Mod form as an optional precept for all Sentinels.
Prior to Update 24.0.2, the mod allowed Sentinels to collect pickups instead of increasing the player's pickup radius. In other words, pickups used to go towards the Sentinel instead of the player.
24.0.2

## Valence Formation
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Lavos | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of Flawless under New Loka, or the rank of Exalted under the Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Passive Augment: Casting an Ability imbued with extra Elemental Damage applies that Element as a 50% bonus to your weapons with guaranteed Status for 20s.
- **Rank 1:** Passive Augment: Casting an Ability imbued with extra Elemental Damage applies that Element as a 100% bonus to your weapons with guaranteed Status for 20s.
- **Rank 2:** Passive Augment: Casting an Ability imbued with extra Elemental Damage applies that Element as a 150% bonus to your weapons with guaranteed Status for 20s.
- **Rank 3:** Passive Augment: Casting an Ability imbued with extra Elemental Damage applies that Element as a 200% bonus to your weapons with guaranteed Status for 20s.

### Drop Locations
- New Loka, Flawless — Common (100.00%)
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Valence Formation is a Warframe Augment Mod for Lavos that allows weapons to gain the corresponding element of an ability whenever it is cast, with a guaranteed status effect.
**Notes:**
Upon casting an ability with an imbued element, grants a 200% Elemental Damage buff of the imbued element to all of Lavos's weapons for Ability Duration20 seconds.
No buff will be granted when casting an ability with no element infused, or when casting Helminth abilities.
Only one elemental bonus can be active at a time. Casting another ability with a mixed element will replace it and refresh the duration.
Bonus Elemental Damage will be added parallel to the weapon's Elemental Damage, meaning it will NOT combine with elements on the weapon.
Damage bonus is additive to elemental damage bonuses like Heated Charge.
Due to how status DoT damage is calculated, a Valence Formation buff for Heat, Electricity, Toxin, or Gas will also add 200% DoT damage to all procs of that specific element.
Blast damage is exempt, as its proc damage does not scale with elemental damage.
The bonus is additive to elemental damage bonuses like Heated Charge, and multiplicative to Faction Damage bonuses like Bane of Grineer and Status Damage bonuses like Rifle Elementalist.
The 200% bonus DoT damage also applies to matching status procs from all of Lavos's abilities, including Helminth abilities.
For example, a heat Valence Formation buff will triple the DoT damage from his Catalyze, heat-imbued Ophidian Bite, subsumed Thermal Sunder, etc.

## Vampire Leech
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Trinity | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
Can be acquired by attaining the rank of Partner under The Perrin Sequence, or the rank of Flawless under New Loka, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.
This mod can periodically be acquired from The Circuit.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Energy Vampire Augment: Excess Energy replenishes Shields by 150%.
- **Rank 1:** Energy Vampire Augment: Excess Energy replenishes Shields by 175%.
- **Rank 2:** Energy Vampire Augment: Excess Energy replenishes Shields by 200%.
- **Rank 3:** Energy Vampire Augment: Excess Energy replenishes Shields by 225%.

### Drop Locations
- New Loka, Flawless — Common (100.00%)
- The Perrin Sequence, Partner — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Vampire Leech is a Warframe Augment Mod for Trinity that causes Energy Vampire to convert excess energy into Shields, and will even boost into Overshields.
**Notes:**
Synergizes with Trinity's Blessing, allowing up to 75% damage reduction to be applied to the generated shields and overshields.
The base 225% shield replenishment is not affected by any mods, however it is indirectly affected by Ability Strength as more overflowing energy per cast means more shields and overshields.

## Vampiric Grasp

### Acquisition

- **Rank 1:** Grasp of Lohk Augment: When a stolen weapon deals damage to an enemy affected by The Lost: Gaze or The Vast Untime, Xaku heals by 15.
- **Rank 2:** Grasp of Lohk Augment: When a stolen weapon deals damage to an enemy affected by The Lost: Gaze or The Vast Untime, Xaku heals by 20.
- **Rank 3:** Grasp of Lohk Augment: When a stolen weapon deals damage to an enemy affected by The Lost: Gaze or The Vast Untime, Xaku heals by 25.

### Wiki

**Notes:**

## Vapor Trail
**Rarity:** Common | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** K-Drive | **Max Rank:** 10

### Acquisition
Can be purchased from Roky after reaching Rank Logical with the Ventkids for 20,000 Standing.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Add 1 Boost Speed. Consumes 10 Energy/s
- **Rank 1:** Add 2 Boost Speed. Consumes 10 Energy/s
- **Rank 2:** Add 3 Boost Speed. Consumes 10 Energy/s
- **Rank 3:** Add 4 Boost Speed. Consumes 10 Energy/s
- **Rank 4:** Add 5 Boost Speed. Consumes 10 Energy/s
- **Rank 5:** Add 6 Boost Speed. Consumes 10 Energy/s
- **Rank 6:** Add 7 Boost Speed. Consumes 10 Energy/s
- **Rank 7:** Add 8 Boost Speed. Consumes 10 Energy/s
- **Rank 8:** Add 9 Boost Speed. Consumes 10 Energy/s
- **Rank 9:** Add 10 Boost Speed. Consumes 10 Energy/s
- **Rank 10:** Add 11 Boost Speed. Consumes 10 Energy/s

### Drop Locations
- Ventkids, Logical — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Vapor Trail is a K-Drive mod that consumes Energy to increase Boost Speed.
**Notes:**
Hildryn and Lavos do not get any extra boosted speed with this mod, although Hildryn's shields will still be drained by it.
Energy Siphon and Energy Nexus will grant the player extra boost speed even with zero energy displayed, allowing an overall permanent increase to boost speed.
Juice can generate energy while making use of the extra boost speed
Here is a few abilities that help for the maximum energy conservation convenience if you jump off of your K-Drive to use them:
Wellspring from the Zenurik Focus tree (You do not have to jump off your K-drive to use this, just use transference while on the K-Drive, use the ability, and re-transference)
Styanax's 3rd ability Rally Point
Arcane Steadfast at max rank can have a 20% chance for the next three abilities to cost no energy, this can be used for Styanax's Rally Point.
With Preparation may be handy on your Warframe to spawn in with full energy.
This mod combined with energy aiding mods like above are a great way to complete the K-Driven Trophy Challenge of 'Ride 1,000,000 meters on a K-Drive'.

## Vaporize
**Rarity:** Common | **Polarity:** penjaga | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** Dethcube | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
Vaporize is automatically acquired upon obtaining Dethcube or Dethcube Prime.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Every 10s the sentinel will stun and inflict 150 damage to an enemy within 5m. Damage dealt affected by Sentinel Weapon Mods.
- **Rank 1:** Every 10s the sentinel will stun and inflict 300 damage to an enemy within 10m. Damage dealt affected by Sentinel Weapon Mods.
- **Rank 2:** Every 10s the sentinel will stun and inflict 450 damage to an enemy within 15m. Damage dealt affected by Sentinel Weapon Mods.
- **Rank 3:** Every 10s the sentinel will stun and inflict 600 damage to an enemy within 20m. Damage dealt affected by Sentinel Weapon Mods.
- **Rank 4:** Every 10s the sentinel will stun and inflict 600 damage to an enemy within 25m. Damage dealt affected by Sentinel Weapon Mods.
- **Rank 5:** Every 10s the sentinel will stun and inflict 600 damage to an enemy within 30m. Damage dealt affected by Sentinel Weapon Mods.

### Drop Locations
- Fusion Moa — Uncommon (0.57%)
- Vapos Fusion Moa — Uncommon (0.57%)
- Kuva Powerclaw — Common (1.14%)
- Narmer Powerfist — Common (1.14%)
- Powerfist — Common (1.14%)

### Wiki
Vaporize is a mod that allows Dethcube and Dethcube Prime to periodically fire a powerful beam weapon at nearby foes.
**Notes:**
Beam deals Radiation damage and can stun enemies.
Has a 10-second cooldown.
Gives the Sentinel no affinity for activating this ability.
Has innate punch through so it can hit multiple enemies at once if they're lined up.
Damage is affected by base damage mods.
**Tips:**
It is recommended to place this mod in a precept slot before Swift Deth or Assault Mode so Dethcube will use it as often as possible.
Secondary weapon mods (Hornet Strike, Magnum Force, and Augur Pact) give the highest base damage bonus to the beam.
**Trivia:**
The beam shares its color with the Dethcube's energy color. However, by default it will be orange, regardless of the skin's default color set.

## Vazarin Transmute Core
Ensures transmuted mod is of Vazarin polarity and eliminates credit cost.
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** vazarin | **Drain:** 0 | **Compatible:** MOD | **Max Rank:** 0

### Drop Locations
- Cephalon Simaris, Vazarin Transmute Core
 — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Vazarin Transmutate Core is a special Core that can be used as an ingredient in Transmutation. When transmuted alongside other Mods, the core ensures that the resulting Mod will be of Vazarin Vazarin Polarity. Using a Transmutation Core also removes the credit cost for that transmutation, allowing for cheaper attempts at transmuting Rare-quality Mods. Transmutation Cores do not guarantee the rarity of the resulting mod, only their polarity.
Transmutation Cores can be bought from Cephalon Simaris for 5,000 Standing each.

## Venari Bodyguard
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Khora | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of General under Steel Meridian, or the rank of Exalted under Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Venari Augment: Venari dies in Khora's place. Recovery timer increased to 150s. Killing enemies decreases the timer by 1s.
- **Rank 1:** Venari Augment: Venari dies in Khora's place. Recovery timer increased to 150s. Killing enemies decreases the timer by 2s.
- **Rank 2:** Venari Augment: Venari dies in Khora's place. Recovery timer increased to 150s. Killing enemies decreases the timer by 3s.
- **Rank 3:** Venari Augment: Venari dies in Khora's place. Recovery timer increased to 150s. Killing enemies decreases the timer by 4s.

### Drop Locations
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)
- Steel Meridian, General — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Venari Bodyguard is a Warframe Augment Mod for Khora's Venari that makes Venari die in Khora's place at the cost of an increased spawn timer, but every enemy killed decreases the spawn timer.
**Notes:**
Upon taking fatal damage, Khora becomes invulnerable for 3 seconds and has 50% of her health restored.
Venari cannot be manually respawned after sacrificing herself. However, if she dies normally, she can be manually respawned.
The kill and respawn timer, invulnerability duration and amount of health restored apparently can't be increased or decreased by mods.
Considering the 150s cooldown and 4s cooldown reduction - you will have to kill ~37 enemies to immediately revive Venari and regain the Death Gate.
This mod functions properly in Arbitrations, allowing a Khora player to have a buffer to being killed, as long as Venari is still alive.
Oddly this mod is tagged as an augment for the Venari ability specfically, despite all of its effects relating to Khoras passive ability of simply having Venari and none of its effects synergising with the ability itself. This causes a minor gameplay issue, as if the ability is replaced via Helminth this augment cannot be equiped despite the fact it would function normally.

## Vengeful Revenant
Hate... Dread... Despair...
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** -2 | **Compatible:** Swords | **Max Rank:** 3

### Drop Locations
- Sedna/Vodyanoi (Arena) — Legendary (0.25%)
- Sedna/Yam (Arena) — Legendary (0.25%)
- Archimedean Itzam — Rare (0.42%)
- Conculyst — Rare (0.42%)
- Decaying Conculyst — Rare (0.42%)
- Ortholyst — Rare (0.42%)
- Summulyst — Rare (0.42%)
- Aerolyst — Common (1.13%)
- Typholyst — Common (1.13%)

### Wiki
Vengeful Revenant is a stance mod for Sword type weapons.
Vengeful Revenant
**Notes:**
Like other stance mods, it can be acquired from weekly Conclave Missions.
The periodic anomaly that appears in Veil Proxima is an outstanding place to farm for this mod.
Uniquely, if no stance is equipped on the Broken War sword, then it will use this stance's entire moveset instead of the normal stanceless moveset for swords.
**Trivia:**
This is the first, and currently the only Stance to not feature a playable Warframe as its subject, instead featuring the Shadow Stalker. It also shows the Orokin Moon tileset, rather than the Clan Dojo like the other Stance mods.
Although the image uses the Stalker wielding Broken War, he is never seen using that weapon.
While it's now possible to recreate this with the playable Stalker in Duviri at a very low chance (assuming that the Broken War is also available as weapon choice), this Stalker is not customizable and thus cannot become Shadow Stalker.
The stance is named for a monster from European folklore called the Revenant, an undead but lucid person who haunts the living to try and fulfill a purpose, usually revenge.
The names of the stance's 3 main combos, as well as the stance's descriptions all reference the Stalker's arsenal prior to completing The Second Dream; Dread, Hate, and Despair.
The move Drowning Despair is misspelled as Dispair.
Despite being named in the description, this mod cannot be equipped on any of these weapons.
Patch Notes

## Venom Dose
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** zenurik | **Drain:** 6 | **Compatible:** Saryn | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired by attaining the rank of General under Steel Meridian, or the rank of Exalted under Red Veil, and spending 25,000 Standing to purchase.
This mod can periodically be acquired from The Circuit.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Spores Augment: Hold to cast will grant all allies within 15m an additional 50% Corrosive Damage to their attacks for 28s.
- **Rank 1:** Spores Augment: Hold to cast will grant all allies within 15m an additional 65% Corrosive Damage to their attacks for 32s.
- **Rank 2:** Spores Augment: Hold to cast will grant all allies within 15m an additional 80% Corrosive Damage to their attacks for 36s.
- **Rank 3:** Spores Augment: Hold to cast will grant all allies within 15m an additional 100% Corrosive Damage to their attacks for 40s.

### Drop Locations
- Red Veil, Exalted — Common (100.00%)
- Steel Meridian, General — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Venom Dose is a Warframe Augment Mod for Saryn that allows Spores to be held on cast, creating a wave of energy traveling outward from the user that temporarily grants the caster and nearby allies additional Corrosive damage to all attacks.
**Notes:**
Damage bonus is affected by Ability Strength.
Duration is affected by Ability Duration.
Range is affected by Ability Range.
Cannot be equipped at the same time as Revealing Spores.
Adds Corrosive damage to the weapon (excluding exalted weapon), added alongside IPS and elemental mods.
Does not increase the damage of most abilities.
Does not merge with Toxin or Electricity.
For example: with a weapon with a base damage of 100 Impact per bullet, the mod Infected Clip at max rank, and the buff from Venom Dose at max rank with 110 strength, the damage will be: 100 Impact, 90 Toxin, and 110 Corrosive.
In this situation, if a status procs, it will have 100/300 chance to be Impact, 90/300 chance to be Toxin, and 110/300 to be Corrosive.
For more information on how this augment works, see Buff & Debuff page.
Multiple casts of Venom Dose do not stack; the buff with the highest Ability Strength will take effect.
However if a weaker one with more Ability Duration is cast, it will take effect after the stronger buff expires.

Kicks woven between spinning slashes.

Vermilion Storm's combos were previewed at TennoLive 2014, though its name was not known at the time. The stance was still a work in progress and from the clip, only Cardinal Breeze made the final cut.

## Vicious Bond
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** COMPANION | **Max Rank:** 5

### Acquisition
The mod can be bought from Son for 20,000 Standing after reaching Rank 3 - Associate with the Entrati.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Companion melee attacks strip 2.5% of enemy armor. Enemies recently damaged by Abilities spread the effect to other enemies in a 1.5m radius.
- **Rank 1:** Companion melee attacks strip 5% of enemy armor. Enemies recently damaged by Abilities spread the effect to other enemies in a 3m radius.
- **Rank 2:** Companion melee attacks strip 7.5% of enemy armor. Enemies recently damaged by Abilities spread the effect to other enemies in a 4.5m radius.
- **Rank 3:** Companion melee attacks strip 10% of enemy armor. Enemies recently damaged by Abilities spread the effect to other enemies in a 6m radius.
- **Rank 4:** Companion melee attacks strip 12.5% of enemy armor. Enemies recently damaged by Abilities spread the effect to other enemies in a 7.5m radius.
- **Rank 5:** Companion melee attacks strip 15% of enemy armor. Enemies recently damaged by Abilities spread the effect to other enemies in a 9m radius.

### Drop Locations
- Entrati (Son), Associate — Common (100.00%)

### Wiki
Vicious Bond is a Companion mod that allows the companion's melee attacks to reduce enemy armor. Damaging enemies with abilities will also reduce the armor of nearby targets.
**Notes:**
Each hit will remove 15% armor from the hit enemy. If the enemy was damaged by an ability within the past 10 seconds, each melee hit by the companion will also cause enemies within 9 meters of the hit enemy to have 15% of their armor removed.
The only Sentinel weapon that counts as a melee attack is Deconstructor and Deconstructor Prime, but it can only be used by Helios and Helios Prime.
Shockwaves from Seismic Bond will not trigger the armor strip.
"Abilities" refers to those used by either your Warframe or operator/drifter.
Damage from Exalted weapons does not count.
Damage from Companion precept abilities do not count.
**Tips:**
Synergizes well with Swipe, as the armor stripping effects will trigger for each target.

## Vicious Frost
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Melee | **Max Rank:** 3

### Acquisition
This mod can be acquired as a random end-of-mission reward for a successful Tier 1 Spy mission with all 3 Data Vaults hacked.
Drop Locations:
Shklovsky
Originally this mod could be acquired from Operation Cryotic Front by scoring more than 1000 points in a single mission.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +15% Cold, +15% Status Chance
- **Rank 1:** +30% Cold, +30% Status Chance
- **Rank 2:** +45% Cold, +45% Status Chance
- **Rank 3:** +60% Cold, +60% Status Chance

### Drop Locations
- Ceres/Hapke (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Earth/Cambria (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Mars/Arval (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Mercury/Suisei (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Phobos/Grildrig (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Phobos/Shklovsky (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Venus/Unda (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)
- Venus/Vesper (Spy), Rotation C — Rare (8.60%)

### Wiki
Vicious Frost is a mod that increases the Cold damage and status chance of a melee weapon by 15% per rank for a maximum of 60% at rank 3.
**Notes:**
Vicious Frost is additive with similar mods. For example, a Galatine with a max rank Vicious Frost and Melee Prowess will have a 20% (1 + 60% + 90%) status chance.
Can be stacked with Melee Prowess, Volcanic Edge, Voltaic Strike, Virulent Scourge, and Drifting Contact for a 370% increase in Status Chance. On weapons with at least 22% base Status Chance, this allows them to achieve a total Status Chance value of 100%, allowing every strike to deal Status Effect procs.
Weeping Wounds can further increase the Status Chance depending on the Melee Combo Counter
**Trivia:**
All of the dual-stat event mods for melee weapons have names starting with the letter V.
Vicious Frost was originally named Cold Touch before it was changed in Update 14.5.2 to match the theme of having the Elemental Damage + Status Chance melee mods starting with the letter V.

## Vicious Spread
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** madurai | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** Shotgun | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +15% Damage, -10% Accuracy
- **Rank 1:** +30% Damage, -20% Accuracy
- **Rank 2:** +45% Damage, -30% Accuracy
- **Rank 3:** +60% Damage, -40% Accuracy
- **Rank 4:** +75% Damage, -50% Accuracy
- **Rank 5:** +90% Damage, -60% Accuracy

### Drop Locations
- Derelict Vault — Rare (4.17%)

### Wiki
Vicious Spread is a Corrupted Mod which increases the damage by +15% per rank, but also increases the spread of shotguns by +10% per rank, to a maximum of +90% and +60% at Rank 5, respectively.
**Notes:**
Damage bonus stacks additively with similar mods, such as Point Blank.
Spread increase is additive with bonuses that increase accuracy, such as Soft Hands, Narrow Barrel, and Tainted Shell.
Additional spread modifiers are not affected by bonuses that increase accuracy.
For example, a Arca Plasmor with Vicious Spread and Tainted Shell will have a max deviation of Arca Plasmor's Max Deviation (1 + Vicious Spread - Tainted Shell) + Vicious Spread degrees.
**Tips:**
As Vicious Spread affects the angle of a shotgun's conical spread, players can compensate by simply closing in and firing the weapon at almost point blank range to ensure all shots hit the target.
Not recommended to be combined with Galvanized Acceleration, as the spread will be bigger at the bonus effective range and thus will cause more shots to miss enemies at long range, unless combined with Punch Through mods if the intention is to make the shotgun good at large crowd control.

## Vigilante Armaments
**Rarity:** Common | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** PRIMARY | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +10% Multishot
- **Rank 1:** +20% Multishot
- **Rank 2:** +30% Multishot
- **Rank 3:** +40% Multishot
- **Rank 4:** +50% Multishot
- **Rank 5:** +60% Multishot

### Drop Locations
- Earth/Cetus (Level 20 - 40 Cetus Bounty), Rotation B — Uncommon (21.59%)

- Earth/Cetus (Level 20 - 40 Cetus Bounty), Rotation B — Common (35.19%)
- Plains Commander — Common (37.94%)

### Wiki
Vigilante Armaments is a set mod that increases Multishot for Primary Weapons.
**Notes:**
Stacks with Split Chamber for a total of +150% Multishot.
For Shotguns, stacks with Hell's Chamber for a total of +180% Multishot.
Can stack further for the Hek with Scattered Justice for a total of +380% Multishot.
Works with Razorwing and Artemis Bow. The latter being a very good choice since Artemis Bow benefits greatly from Critical Hits and Multishot.
**Trivia:**
Along with Vigilante Fervor, Vigilante Offense, Hunter Munitions, Hunter Track, and Aero Periphery, this is one of the only mods that can be used on any primary weapon.

The image shows an Ivara using a Rubico that just leveled up.
When it was first released, the mod didn't have the 2x multiplier for Bows present on other Rifle Fire Rate mods.

## Vigilante Supplies
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 4 | **Compatible:** PRIMARY | **Max Rank:** 5

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Converts Secondary ammo pickups to 5% of Ammo Pick Up.
- **Rank 1:** Converts Secondary ammo pickups to 10% of Ammo Pick Up.
- **Rank 2:** Converts Secondary ammo pickups to 15% of Ammo Pick Up.
- **Rank 3:** Converts Secondary ammo pickups to 20% of Ammo Pick Up.
- **Rank 4:** Converts Secondary ammo pickups to 25% of Ammo Pick Up.
- **Rank 5:** Converts Secondary ammo pickups to 30% of Ammo Pick Up.

### Drop Locations
- Plains Commander — Legendary (0.50%)
- Narmer Thumper Bull — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Narmer Thumper Doma — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Narmer Thumper — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Tusk Thumper Bull — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Tusk Thumper Doma — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Tusk Thumper — Uncommon (1.88%)
- Earth/Cetus (Level 20 - 40 Cetus Bounty), Rotation A — Rare (2.21%)
- Earth/Cetus (Level 20 - 40 Cetus Bounty), Rotation A — Rare (6.15%)

### Wiki
Vigilante Supplies is a set mod for Primary Weapons that converts any unused Secondary Ammo type into Primary Ammo. The affected primary weapon will only convert ammo while equipped, and will not convert any ammo type used by Holstered secondary weapons until their own ammo is full.
Converted ammo is denoted by a Mutate symbol. The final amount of ammo restored is rounded to the nearest integer.
**Tips:**
Good for weapons with poor ammo economy, such as the Grakata and the Soma.
Functions well with Robotic's Vacuum or Beast's Fetch, which automatically collect unused ammo as needed.
Does not convert ammo for a Warframe's primary weapon when only equipped on a sentinel's weapon.
Can be equipped on a primary weapon's Exilus slot despite the enhancement to Critical Hits that is the Vigilante Set bonus.

## Vigorous Swap
**Rarity:** Rare | **Polarity:** naramon | **Drain:** 2 | **Compatible:** WARFRAME | **Augment** | **Max Rank:** 10

### Acquisition
Obtainable from the Arbitrations vendor in the Arbiters of Hexis room in Relays for 20 Vitus Essence.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Equip: +15% Damage for 3s
- **Rank 1:** On Equip: +30% Damage for 3s
- **Rank 2:** On Equip: +45% Damage for 3s
- **Rank 3:** On Equip: +60% Damage for 3s
- **Rank 4:** On Equip: +75% Damage for 3s
- **Rank 5:** On Equip: +90% Damage for 3s
- **Rank 6:** On Equip: +105% Damage for 3s
- **Rank 7:** On Equip: +120% Damage for 3s
- **Rank 8:** On Equip: +135% Damage for 3s
- **Rank 9:** On Equip: +150% Damage for 3s
- **Rank 10:** On Equip: +165% Damage for 3s

### Wiki
Vigorous Swap is a Warframe mod that increases weapon damage for 3 seconds upon holstering a weapon.
**Notes:**
Stacks additively with mods like Serration and Hornet Strike, as well as Holster Amp and Arcane Arachne.
If a weapon is swapped while the buff is active, duration will be refreshed.
Triggers on manual and automatic weapon swaps.
Manual
Switching between guns or melee (default F)
Quick swap by:
holding a gun, then using a light melee attack (default E)
holding a melee, then firing a gun (default LMB) or aiming (default RMB)
Automatic
By enabling the "Auto Swap Weapon On Empty" toggle in the Keyboard/Mouse tab.
Also triggered after a Mercy kill.
The buff is applied at the end of the swapping animation.
Archwing weapons can trigger the mod, and are affected by its buff.
Special Interactions
Arcane Arachne#Special Interactions
Peacemaker cannot trigger Vigorous Swap, but can benefit from its buff (additive with base damage mods).
After swapping to melee to trigger Vigorous Swap, Titania can refresh it while it's active by activating Razorwing.
Swapping between Dex Pixia and Diwata in Razorwing does not trigger Vigorous Swap.
**Tips:**
Use Vigorous Swap with the Synth mod set so that your weapon reloads while it is holstered, thus removing downtime between weapon swaps by needing to reload. Similar effects from the Conclave mods Tactical Reload, Lock and Load, or Eject Magazine can be used to replace or stack with the passive reloading of the Synth mods.

## Vik-Anam

### Acquisition
Awarded from The Perita Rebellion missions.
Sold by Marie as part of her rotating shop.
The bonus to maximum Amp energy applies before any reductions, such as from the Plaga Brace.
This is in contrast to Madurai's Inner Gaze Waybound Passive ability, which will apply after such reductions. With both effects active, an amp with the Plaga Brace will have (100 * 1.3 - 20) * 1.4 = 154 energy

- **Rank 4:** +25% Maximum Amp Energy, +5% Amp Energy Regen Rate for each Madurai School Mod
- **Rank 5:** +30% Maximum Amp Energy, +5% Amp Energy Regen Rate for each Madurai School Mod

Vik-Anam is a Zenurik school Antique Mod for Tektolyst Artifacts that increases Amp Maximum Energy, with a bonus to Amp Energy Regen Rate for each Madurai school mod equipped on the Artifact.
