## Arcane Escapist

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Mercy Kill: Gain a stack of Escapist, up to 9x. On taking fatal damage, consume 3 stacks to avoid death and become invulnerable for 2s.
- **Rank 1:** On Mercy Kill: Gain a stack of Escapist, up to 9x. On taking fatal damage, consume 3 stacks to avoid death and become invulnerable for 4s.
- **Rank 2:** On Mercy Kill: Gain a stack of Escapist, up to 9x. On taking fatal damage, consume 3 stacks to avoid death and become invulnerable for 6s.
- **Rank 3:** On Mercy Kill: Gain a stack of Escapist, up to 9x. On taking fatal damage, consume 3 stacks to avoid death and become invulnerable for 8s. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Mercy Kill: Gain a stack of Escapist, up to 9x. On taking fatal damage, consume 3 stacks to avoid death and become invulnerable for 10s. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** On Mercy Kill: Gain a stack of Escapist, up to 9x. On taking fatal damage, consume 3 stacks to avoid death and become invulnerable for 12s. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Temporal Archimedea Legendary Rewards — Arcane Escapist (13.66%)
- Temporal Archimedea Gold Rewards — Arcane Escapist (8.51%)
- Temporal Archimedea Silver Rewards — Arcane Escapist (8.76%)

### Wiki
Arcane Escapist is an Arcane Enhancement for the Warframe that provides the Escapist buff on Mercy Kills, stacking this buff provides a revive and Invulnerability on fatal damage.
Effect
A single copy can be bought each week from Kaya Velasco in Höllvania Central Mall for 5 Pix Chip.
As a random reward from Temporal Archimedea.
**Notes:**
Stacks last indefinitely.
Trading Arcane Escapist requires the trader to be Mastery Rank 11 or higher.
**Tips:**
Proc Impact status to increase health threshold to perform a Mercy Kill.
Swift Mercy increases speed of Mercy Kill.
Pressing and holding Mercy Kill button allows to perform it at the very moment it becomes available on an enemy, which may be helpful when using high damage weapons to not accidentally kill them before seeing the prompt.
Coda Bassocyst allows to perform Mercy Kill from distance using alt fire.
There are special interactions with abilities that similarly save from death:
Dagath's Grave Spirit, Nidus' Passive, Khora's Venari Bodyguard augment, Voruna's Ulfrun's Descent passive, Valkyr's passive, and Vulpaphyla's Martyr Symbiosis precept will be triggered first and won't consume Arcane Escapist's charge.
It will still trigger when Revenant's Mesmer Skin or Garuda's Dread Ward augment are active, though those technically can't receive fatal damage.

## Arcane Expertise

### Acquisition
Can be bought from Roathe at La Cathédrale in the Sanctum Anatomica for 5 Maphica.
May appear as a Steel Path The Descendia reward on a weekly rotational basis.
Infernum 6 and 13 awards 1.
Infernum 20 awards 3.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** 50% of Ability Strength modifiers are also applied to Max Shields.
- **Rank 1:** 60% of Ability Strength modifiers are also applied to Max Shields.
- **Rank 2:** 70% of Ability Strength modifiers are also applied to Max Shields.
- **Rank 3:** 80% of Ability Strength modifiers are also applied to Max Shields. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** 90% of Ability Strength modifiers are also applied to Max Shields. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** 100% of Ability Strength modifiers are also applied to Max Shields. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- The Descendia: Infernum 20 Triple Arcane Rewards (Steel Path) — 3X Arcane Expertise (11.11%)
- The Descendia: Infernum 6 and 13 Arcane Rewards (Steel Path) — Arcane Expertise (11.11%)

### Wiki
Arcane Expertise is an Arcane Enhancement for Warframes that increases Shields based on Ability Strength.
Effect
**Notes:**
Shield bonus is equal to current Ability Strength stat minus 100%. For example, 150% strength will grant +50% shield capacity.
Shield bonus is additive to Redirection and other similar mods.
Ability Strength below 100% will reduce shield maximum.
Temporary strength buffs such as Energy Conversion and Growing Power will grant additional shields while they are active.
Upon a strength buff expiring, shield capacity will be immediately readjusted. Leftover shields past the new maximum capacity will be converted into temporary Overshields.
The temporary shield bonus from single-use strength buffs is removed before the ability is activated. For example, if Energy Conversion is active before casting Parasitic Armor, the +50% shield bonus given by the temporary strength will not be taken into account for Parasitic Armor's buff.
Gaining another instance of the strength buff before the cast animation finishes will allow the ability to scale with the temporary shield bonus. For example with Energy Conversion, picking up another energy orb during the cast animation will allow the +50% shield bonus to be taken into account.
The buff works in Archwing mode.
With the arcane equipped, players will load into the mission with a buff proportional to the Warframe's modded power strength (extra shields will be converted to Overshields). Afterwards, the Archwing's max shields will be increased proportional to the Archwing's modded strength.
The increase in max shields does not appear to scale correctly with either the Warframe's or Archwing's modded strength, further testing needed.

Can be triggered by critical hits from almost any source, including all weapon types, beast and sentinel attacks, and even Warframe abilities (such as Wisp's Breach Surge sparks and all of Gyre's damaging abilities)

## Arcane Grace

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Health Damaged: 9% chance for +1% Health Regeneration/s for 9s
- **Rank 1:** On Health Damaged: 9% chance for +2% Health Regeneration/s for 9s
- **Rank 2:** On Health Damaged: 9% chance for +3% Health Regeneration/s for 9s
- **Rank 3:** On Health Damaged: 9% chance for +4% Health Regeneration/s for 9s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Health Damaged: 9% chance for +5% Health Regeneration/s for 9s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources

- Eidolon Hydrolyst (Capture) — Arcane Grace (5.00%)

### Wiki
Arcane Grace is an Arcane Enhancement that provides a 9% chance whenever the player receives health damage to regenerate a percentage of health per second for 9 seconds.
Can be sold for 3,000.
Effect
Awarded for capturing the Eidolon Hydrolyst.
Dropped in Rotation C of Orphix Veil Proxima missions.
**Notes:**
Trading Arcane Grace requires the trader to be Mastery Rank 11 or higher.
Can be triggered with Combat Discipline.
The amount of health restored refers to health per second, not the total of the duration.
Works best on Warframes with high base Health and Armor, such as Nidus, Grendel or Inaros.
Flat health regeneration like that from Arcane Reaper may be ideal for Warframes with less maximum Health.
category:Orphix Arcanes

## Arcane Guardian

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Damaged: 15% chance for +150 Armor for 20s
- **Rank 1:** On Damaged: 15% chance for +300 Armor for 20s
- **Rank 2:** On Damaged: 15% chance for +450 Armor for 20s
- **Rank 3:** On Damaged: 15% chance for +600 Armor for 20s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Damaged: 15% chance for +750 Armor for 20s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** On Damaged: 15% chance for +900 Armor for 20s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Eidolon Gantulyst (Capture) — Arcane Guardian (11.92%)
- Eidolon Gantulyst — Arcane Guardian (15.68%)
- The Descendia: Infernum 20 Triple Arcane Rewards — 3X Arcane Guardian (3.70%)
- Veil Proxima/Erato (Skirmish), Rotation C — Arcane Guardian (5.63%)
- Neptune/Mammon's Prospect (Skirmish), Rotation C — Arcane Guardian (6.90%)

### Wiki
Arcane Guardian is an Arcane Enhancement that provides a 15% chance whenever the player receives damage to increase the Warframe's armor for 20 seconds.
Can be sold for 500.
Effect
Awarded for killing or capturing the Eidolon Gantulyst.
Dropped in Rotation C of Orphix Neptune Proxima or Veil Proxima missions.
**Notes:**
The additional armor is not affected by mods and is additive to total armor. For example, a Chroma with a max rank Steel Fiber, and active Rank 5 Arcane Guardian will have an armor rating of:Base Armor (1 + Armor Mods) + Arcane Guardian 370 (1 + 1.1) + 900 armor.
The Arcane Duration cannot be refreshed, while one instance is still active.
This Arcane cannot be activated while Revenant's Mesmer Skin or Righteous Negation (granted by Oberon's passive) is active.

## Arcane Hot Shot

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Gain 1% weapon Critical Chance for 10s, when using abilities to inflict Heat Status effect on enemies. Maximum 50x stacks.
- **Rank 1:** Gain 2% weapon Critical Chance for 10s, when using abilities to inflict Heat Status effect on enemies. Maximum 50x stacks.
- **Rank 2:** Gain 3% weapon Critical Chance for 10s, when using abilities to inflict Heat Status effect on enemies. Maximum 50x stacks.
- **Rank 3:** Gain 4% weapon Critical Chance for 10s, when using abilities to inflict Heat Status effect on enemies. Maximum 50x stacks., +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** Gain 5% weapon Critical Chance for 10s, when using abilities to inflict Heat Status effect on enemies. Maximum 50x stacks., +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** Gain 6% weapon Critical Chance for 10s, when using abilities to inflict Heat Status effect on enemies. Maximum 50x stacks., +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Temporal Archimedea Legendary Rewards — Arcane Hot Shot (13.66%)
- Temporal Archimedea Gold Rewards — Arcane Hot Shot (8.51%)
- Temporal Archimedea Silver Rewards — Arcane Hot Shot (8.76%)

### Wiki
Arcane Hot Shot is an Arcane Enhancement for the Warframe that increases weapon Critical Chance for 10 seconds when using abilities to inflict Heat Status on enemies.
Effect
A single copy can be bought each week from Kaya Velasco in Höllvania Central Mall for 5 Pix Chip.
As a random reward from Temporal Archimedea.
With a 1.47% chance, it can be acquired for 200 Vosfor in Loid's Höllvania Arcane Collection.
**Notes:**
Critical Chance applies to all weapon types, including primary, secondary, and melee.
Bonus is additive to mods such as Point Strike, Pistol Gambit and True Steel
Exalted Weapons modded with Heat damage can provide stacks for this arcane (the Atomicycle's Atomi-Barrage and Atomi-Bomb can stack too).
All stacks of the buff expire simultaneously at the end of the duration. Applying a new stack refreshes the buff duration.
A Diriga with Arc Coil or Electro Pulse and a Hound with Synergized Prospectus are able to activate Arcane Hot Shot very reliably with Manifold Bond and a weapon modded for Heat.
An important distinction is that stacks are created per infliction of Heat status, not per proc (i.e., applying two or more procs of Heat at once to one enemy grants only one stack).
Trading Arcane Hot Shot requires the trader to be Mastery Rank 11 or higher.

## Arcane Ice Storm

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Enemy Frozen: Gain +2% Ability Strength and +2% Ability Duration for 15s. Stacks up to 10x.
- **Rank 1:** On Enemy Frozen: Gain +2% Ability Strength and +2% Ability Duration for 15s. Stacks up to 12x.
- **Rank 2:** On Enemy Frozen: Gain +2% Ability Strength and +2% Ability Duration for 15s. Stacks up to 14x.
- **Rank 3:** On Enemy Frozen: Gain +2% Ability Strength and +2% Ability Duration for 15s. Stacks up to 16x. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Enemy Frozen: Gain +2% Ability Strength and +2% Ability Duration for 15s. Stacks up to 18x. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** On Enemy Frozen: Gain +2% Ability Strength and +2% Ability Duration for 15s. Stacks up to 20x. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Sister Of Parvos (Ascension Hard Mode) — Arcane Ice Storm (20.00%)
- Sister Of Parvos (Ascension Mode) — Arcane Ice Storm (6.60%)

### Wiki
Arcane Ice Storm is an Arcane Enhancement for Warframes that grants Ability Strength and Ability Duration when an enemy is frozen from 10 Cold stacks, stacking up to 20x.
Effect
Arcane Ice Storm can be obtained from Ascension's optional Sister of Parvos, summoned by acquiring 3 Sister Beacons during the elevator ride. Alternatively it can be purchased from Ordis in the Drifter's Camp for 10 Vestigial Motes, for a total of 210 for max rank.
**Notes:**
Companion weapons do not trigger this arcane.
All stacks are removed when the duration runs out. All stacks are refreshed upon freezing an enemy.
**Tips:**
Effects that rapidly apply 10 Cold stacks include:
Frost:
Freeze's direct hit
Ice Wave double cast (Helminth subsumable), as each applies 6 Cold stacks
Snow Globe's activation while within its range
Avalanche
Gauss' Thermal Sunder double cast (Helminth subsumable) or with Redline active
Voruna's Fangs of Raksh (applies 5 random status effects which may include Cold)
Lavos's Vial Rush (Helminth subsumable)
Itzal's Cosmic Crush with Cold Snap augment
Melee Careen at Rank 5
Okina's spectral daggers from its incarnon
Enemies are not "frozen" by:
Atlas's Petrify
Harrow's Condemn, however, the ability can grant Arcane Ice Storm stacks when an affected enemy is damaged by the player. This is most likely an unintended interaction.
Follie's Shadowgraph (Corralizer Armament) This is most likely a bug.

## Arcane Impetus

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Unique Status Effects from Abilities grant +1% Ability Strength and +0.5% Ability Efficiency for 20s.
- **Rank 1:** Unique Status Effects from Abilities grant +2% Ability Strength and +1% Ability Efficiency for 20s.
- **Rank 2:** Unique Status Effects from Abilities grant +3% Ability Strength and +1.5% Ability Efficiency for 20s.
- **Rank 3:** Unique Status Effects from Abilities grant +4% Ability Strength and +2% Ability Efficiency for 20s. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** Unique Status Effects from Abilities grant +5% Ability Strength and +2.5% Ability Efficiency for 20s. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** Unique Status Effects from Abilities grant +6% Ability Strength and +3% Ability Efficiency for 20s. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- H-09 Apex — Arcane Impetus (12.50%)
- H-09 Efervon Tank — Arcane Impetus (12.50%)
- Höllvania/Antivirus Bounty (Caches) — Arcane Impetus (12.50%)
- Höllvania/Exterminate: Scaldra (Caches) — Arcane Impetus (12.50%)
- Höllvania/Exterminate: Techrot (Caches) — Arcane Impetus (12.50%)
- Scaldra Screamer — Arcane Impetus (12.50%)

### Wiki
Arcane Impetus is an Arcane Enhancement for Warframes that increases Ability Strength and Ability Efficiency dependent on unique Status Effects from Abilities.
Effect
Can be bought from Eleanor of The Hex for 7,500 Standing at Rank 3 - 2-For-1.
Rewarded from the 1999 Calendar.
Rewarded from Techrot Safes in Höllvania missions.
Rewarded from Scaldra Caches in Höllvania Exterminate missions.
Dropped by the H-09 Efervon Tank in Höllvania Assassination missions.
Rewarded from Höllvania Faceoff missions.
Dropped by the Scaldra Screamer in Höllvania Stage Defense missions.
**Notes:**
Abilities that apply any Status Effect will grant the Ability Strength and Ability Efficiency bonuses.
Buff is refreshed upon any damage from abilities.
Buff stacks for every Status Effect made by Abilities.
Statuses from Sickening Pulse do not stack the buff; however, it can refresh the timer.
Unique "hidden" status effects such as Knockdown do not stack the buff.
Buff is activated and/or refreshed by the following Companion Mods Coolant Leak, Synergized Prospectus, Reflex Denial, Null Audit, Arc Coil, and sometimes Manifold Bond.
Null Audit will only apply stacks from copied Blitz/Volatile and Jade Light Eximus abilities.

## Arcane Intention

### Acquisition
May appear as a Steel Path Circuit Tier 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, or +11 reward on a weekly rotational basis.
May be sold by Acrithis for 10 Pathos Clamp on a daily rotational basis, requiring Drifter Intrinsics Opportunity Rank 9 for the arcanes to appear in her shop.
One of possible rewards from completing the optional Undercroft Portals in Duviri while on the Steel Path.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Gain +40 Max Health per active channeled ability.
- **Rank 1:** Gain +80 Max Health per active channeled ability.
- **Rank 2:** Gain +120 Max Health per active channeled ability.
- **Rank 3:** Gain +160 Max Health per active channeled ability., +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** Gain +200 Max Health per active channeled ability., +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** Gain +250 Max Health per active channeled ability., +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Duviri Static Undercroft Portal (Steel Path) — Arcane Intention (10.19%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 1 (Hard) — Arcane Intention (4.43%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 3 (Hard) — Arcane Intention (4.43%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 4 (Hard) — Arcane Intention (4.43%)
- Duviri/Endless: Repeated Rewards (Hard) — Arcane Intention (9.09%)

### Wiki
Arcane Intention is an Arcane Enhancement that increases maximum health for every active channeled ability.
Effect
**Notes:**
The bonus stacks for every channeled ability simultaneously active, up to a maximum of 4 stacks (+1000 Health at max rank).
Besides increasing maximum health, activating this Arcane also heals the Warframe by the same amount of hitpoints.
After the ability that sustained this Arcane's effect ends, there is a 1 second delay during which said ability cannot be reactivated.
Eligible Abilities
Only the following abilities can trigger this effect:
**Tips:**
Many Warframes lack channeled abilities altogether, making it impossible to use this Arcane with them. Certain abilities can be transferred via Helminth to circumvent this:
Gloom can be infused onto any Warframe in order to give them a channeled ability and enable the use of this Arcane.
Mind Control and Parasitic Armor are abilities with high base duration that can maintain this Arcane's effect without constant energy drain.
Pillage, Coil Horizon and Quiver are also Helminth-compatible and can make use of this Arcane's secondary effect of instant healing upon ability activation.

## Arcane Momentum

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Critical Hit: 60% chance for +25% Reload Speed to Sniper Rifles for 12s
- **Rank 1:** On Critical Hit: 60% chance for +50% Reload Speed to Sniper Rifles for 12s
- **Rank 2:** On Critical Hit: 60% chance for +75% Reload Speed to Sniper Rifles for 12s
- **Rank 3:** On Critical Hit: 60% chance for +100% Reload Speed to Sniper Rifles for 12s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Critical Hit: 60% chance for +125% Reload Speed to Sniper Rifles for 12s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** On Critical Hit: 60% chance for +150% Reload Speed to Sniper Rifles for 12s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 1 (Normal) — Arcane Momentum (0.67%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 3 (Normal) — Arcane Momentum (0.67%)
- Pluto/Khufu Envoy (Skirmish), Rotation C — Arcane Momentum (10.00%)
- Neptune/Mammon's Prospect (Skirmish), Rotation C — Arcane Momentum (10.34%)
- Venus/Vesper Strait (Skirmish), Rotation C — Arcane Momentum (10.34%)
- Eidolon Teralyst (Capture) — Arcane Momentum (12.05%)
- Eidolon Teralyst — Arcane Momentum (14.95%)
- The Descendia: Infernum 20 Triple Arcane Rewards — 3X Arcane Momentum (3.70%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 9 (Normal) — Arcane Momentum (4.00%)

### Wiki
Arcane Momentum is an Arcane Enhancement that provides a 60% chance to increase the Reload Speed for 12 seconds on Sniper-type weapons whenever the player achieves a Critical Hit. This effect's duration can be refreshed while active.
Can be sold for 200.
Effect
Awarded for killing or capturing the Eidolon Teralyst.
Dropped in Rotation C of Orphix Venus Proxima, Neptune Proxima, and Pluto Proxima missions.
**Notes:**
Stacks additively with reload speed from mods such as Fast Hands.
Can be triggered by critical hits from almost any source, including all weapon types, beast and sentinel attacks, and even Warframe abilities (such as Wisp's Breach Surge sparks and all of Gyre's damaging abilities)
**Tips:**
Using a Sentinel weapon with a high sustained critical hit rate is a good way making use of this Arcane, such as: Prime Laser Rifle, Deth Machine Rifle, or Sweeper Prime.
Sentinels such as Diriga and Djinn can be used for their increased attack range. Alternatively, applying zoom mods like Eagle Eye to a sentinel's weapon will also increase their attack range.
It's recommended to avoid using mods like Vicious Spread or Heavy Caliber as sentinel weapons tend to already have low accuracy.
It should be noted for stealth frames that going invisible will cause sentinels to stop attacking enemies.

## Arcane Persistence

### Acquisition
Can be bought from Roathe at La Cathédrale in the Sanctum Anatomica for 5 Maphica.
May appear as a Steel Path The Descendia reward on a weekly rotational basis.
Infernum 6 and 13 awards 1.
Infernum 20 awards 3.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Remove all Shields. If Armor is above 700: Cannot be hit for more than 750 Damage/s. Magnetic Status and Ability Nullifying Effects disable this protection.
- **Rank 1:** Remove all Shields. If Armor is above 700: Cannot be hit for more than 700 Damage/s. Magnetic Status and Ability Nullifying Effects disable this protection.
- **Rank 2:** Remove all Shields. If Armor is above 700: Cannot be hit for more than 650 Damage/s. Magnetic Status and Ability Nullifying Effects disable this protection.
- **Rank 3:** Remove all Shields. If Armor is above 700: Cannot be hit for more than 600 Damage/s. Magnetic Status and Ability Nullifying Effects disable this protection. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** Remove all Shields. If Armor is above 700: Cannot be hit for more than 550 Damage/s. Magnetic Status and Ability Nullifying Effects disable this protection. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** Remove all Shields. If Armor is above 700: Cannot be hit for more than 500 Damage/s. Magnetic Status and Ability Nullifying Effects disable this protection. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- The Descendia: Infernum 20 Triple Arcane Rewards (Steel Path) — 3X Arcane Persistence (11.11%)
- The Descendia: Infernum 6 and 13 Arcane Rewards (Steel Path) — Arcane Persistence (11.11%)

### Wiki
Arcane Persistence is an Arcane Enhancement for Warframes that restricts damage taken while above 700 Armor, at the cost of losing all Shields.
Effect
**Notes:**
Arcane Persistence's effects can be lost if the user's Armor is reduced below 700, such as from Corrosive or Heat status effects. To fully withstand Heat, a minimum of 1400 Armor is needed.
Arcane Persistence is disabled if the user receives a Magnetic status effect or is within an ability nullification field such as Nullifiers.
While they contribute to hitting the gate threshold, True Damage such as Life Leech Eximus and Slash will bypass the 500 damage cap. This means that a high enough damage Slash proc can oneshot despite using the arcane.
Does not work on self inflicted sources of damage;
The Slash proc from Inaros Negation Armor ignores Persistence entirely, dealing full damage.
Garuda's Bloodletting will not reduce the health drain.
Changes Hijack's Shield drain to Health drain.
**Tips:**
Health Conversion allows any Warframe to meet the 700 armor condition.
4x Azure Archon Shard grants +600 Armor. 3x Azure Archon Shard grants +675 Armor.
Arcane Grace requires 8334 Health to reach 500 Health/second. This assumes 100% uptime on Grace which is unrealistic, so more health to give the arcane a chance to trigger is advised.

## Arcane Pistoleer

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Pistol Headshot Kill: 60% chance for +17% Ammo Efficiency for 12s
- **Rank 1:** On Pistol Headshot Kill: 60% chance for +34% Ammo Efficiency for 12s
- **Rank 2:** On Pistol Headshot Kill: 60% chance for +51% Ammo Efficiency for 12s
- **Rank 3:** On Pistol Headshot Kill: 60% chance for +68% Ammo Efficiency for 12s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Pistol Headshot Kill: 60% chance for +85% Ammo Efficiency for 12s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** On Pistol Headshot Kill: 60% chance for +102% Ammo Efficiency for 12s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Arbitrations, Rotation A — Arcane Pistoleer (5.00%)
- Arbitrations, Rotation C — Arcane Pistoleer (5.00%)

### Wiki
Arcane Pistoleer is an Arcane Enhancement that provides a 60% chance on killing an enemy with a headshot from a secondary weapon to increase Ammo Efficiency by 102% for 12 seconds.
Can be sold for 1,000.
Effect
Awarded from Arbitrations missions.
Can be purchased from the Arbitrations vendor in the Arbiters of Hexis room in Relays for 10 Vitus Essence.
**Notes:**
Directly reduces ammo cost by a percentage, while active. At rank 5 no ammo will be consumed.
After being activated by the secondary, the buff also works on primary weapons.
The buff doesn't affect special weapons, like the Thermian RPG.
Getting another proc does not refresh the timer. The current instance of Arcane Pistoleer must run out before another can be started.
In order for the arcane to activate enemy must be killed with direct damage, Gas or Electric status effects. Other damage over time effects will not trigger the buff.
Alt-fire modes that shoot all remaining bullets in an automatic burst (Cyanex, Nagantaka, or Pandero) shoot the current number of bullets left in the magazine while conserving them, allowing for an ammo-efficient, repeated use of these modes.
Azima alt-fire still consumes the entire magazine as normal, but the turrets themselves benefit from partial ammo efficiency, expending their ammo more slowly and therefore lasting much longer. However, 100% ammo efficiency does not benefit turrets in any way and they will last their normal duration.
Is also capable of being toggled by pistol Exalted Weapons like the Dex Pixia.
**Tips:**
Can greatly improve the performance of weapons that otherwise have low magazine size like Akbronco (Akbronco Prime) or Twin Rogga.
The same applies to primaries like (Sancti Tigris) Tigris (Tigris Prime), (Kuva Tonkor)Tonkor, and Vectis (Vectis Prime).
Synergizes well with Pyrana Prime's passive, allowing the wielder to make more use of the fire rate/akimbo buff without sacrificing the buff's duration to reloads.

## Arcane Power Ramp

### Acquisition
May appear as a Steel Path Circuit Tier 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, or +11 reward on a weekly rotational basis.
May be sold by Acrithis for 10 Pathos Clamp on a daily rotational basis, requiring Drifter Intrinsics Opportunity Rank 9 for the arcanes to appear in her shop.
One of possible rewards from completing the optional Undercroft Portals in Duviri while on the Steel Path.
Dropped by Captain Vor in Tolstoj (Mercury) in The Steel Path.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Ability Cast: Next Ability cast gains +2% Ability Strength, stacking up to 4x. Resets when the same ability is recast consecutively.
- **Rank 1:** On Ability Cast: Next Ability cast gains +3% Ability Strength, stacking up to 4x. Resets when the same ability is recast consecutively.
- **Rank 2:** On Ability Cast: Next Ability cast gains +4.5% Ability Strength, stacking up to 4x. Resets when the same ability is recast consecutively.
- **Rank 3:** On Ability Cast: Next Ability cast gains +6% Ability Strength, stacking up to 4x. Resets when the same ability is recast consecutively., +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Ability Cast: Next Ability cast gains +7.5% Ability Strength, stacking up to 4x. Resets when the same ability is recast consecutively., +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** On Ability Cast: Next Ability cast gains +9% Ability Strength, stacking up to 4x. Resets when the same ability is recast consecutively., +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Duviri Static Undercroft Portal (Steel Path) — Arcane Power Ramp (10.19%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 1 (Hard) — Arcane Power Ramp (4.43%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 3 (Hard) — Arcane Power Ramp (4.43%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 4 (Hard) — Arcane Power Ramp (4.43%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 6 (Hard) — Arcane Power Ramp (6.00%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 7 (Hard) — Arcane Power Ramp (6.00%)
- Duviri/Endless: Repeated Rewards (Hard) — Arcane Power Ramp (9.09%)

### Wiki
Arcane Power Ramp is an Arcane Enhancement that grants additional Ability Strength for every Ability cast.
Effect
**Notes:**
The bonus resets after casting the same ability consecutively.
Toggle abilities like Peacemaker and Pulverize seem to be counted on activation only, and not on deactivation. The bonus will still be active after exiting the toggled ability state, but activating the ability again will cause a reset.
Cycle abilities like Reservoirs do not reset on cycling, but do reset if the same ability is used twice, even with a different sub-ability selected. For example, after placing a Vitality mote, cycling to an Agility mote is fine, but placing the Agility mote will cause a reset.
Abilities with differing tap and hold behaviors, like Eclipse and Molecular Prime are treated as the same ability regardless of the tap or hold modifier.
**Tips:**
Garuda with sufficient healing can use Bloodletting to maintain the bonus.

## Arcane Precision

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Headshot: +50% Damage for 18s on Secondary Weapon
- **Rank 1:** On Headshot: +100% Damage for 18s on Secondary Weapon
- **Rank 2:** On Headshot: +150% Damage for 18s on Secondary Weapon
- **Rank 3:** On Headshot: +200% Damage for 18s on Secondary Weapon +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Headshot: +250% Damage for 18s on Secondary Weapon +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** On Headshot: +300% Damage for 18s on Secondary Weapon +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 1 (Normal) — Arcane Precision (0.67%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 3 (Normal) — Arcane Precision (0.67%)
- Veil Proxima/Erato (Skirmish), Rotation C — Arcane Precision (2.82%)
- Venus/Vesper Strait (Skirmish), Rotation C — Arcane Precision (3.45%)
- The Descendia: Infernum 20 Triple Arcane Rewards — 3X Arcane Precision (3.70%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 9 (Normal) — Arcane Precision (4.00%)
- Eidolon Gantulyst (Capture) — Arcane Precision (5.92%)
- Eidolon Gantulyst — Arcane Precision (7.02%)

### Wiki
Arcane Precision is an Arcane Enhancement that increases Damage for secondaries for 18 seconds upon achieving a headshot.
Can be sold for 1,000.
Effect
Awarded for killing or capturing the Eidolon Gantulyst.
Dropped in Rotation C of Orphix Venus Proxima or Veil Proxima missions.
**Notes:**
The increase in damage stacks additively with mods that increase base damage e.g. Hornet Strike.
Works with Mesa's Peacemaker but practically requires activation beforehand, as Regulators almost always do body shots.
Works with Titania's Dex Pixia, can be activated while in Razorwing mode.
Works with Dante's Noctua.
Only works with Hildryn's Balefire Charger or Jade's Glory if it procs a status effect that can headshot, like Electricity or Gas, or by activation beforehand.
Headshots from any weapon can activate the buff. This includes primary, secondary, and melee weapons, also Archguns, and gear tools such as the Tranq Rifle and Nosam Cutter, including companion attacks (including those summoned from Duplex Bond) by direct hit or status effect that can headshot.
Further headshots will not refresh the duration of the buff, unlike other headshot-based arcanes, such as Arcane Consequence and Arcane Rage.

## Arcane Primary Charger

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Melee Kill: 30% chance for +50% Primary Weapon Damage for 12s
- **Rank 1:** On Melee Kill: 30% chance for +100% Primary Weapon Damage for 12s
- **Rank 2:** On Melee Kill: 30% chance for +150% Primary Weapon Damage for 12s
- **Rank 3:** On Melee Kill: 30% chance for +200% Primary Weapon Damage for 12s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Melee Kill: 30% chance for +250% Primary Weapon Damage for 12s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** On Melee Kill: 30% chance for +300% Primary Weapon Damage for 12s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Arbitrations, Rotation B — Arcane Primary Charger (5.00%)
- Arbitrations, Rotation C — Arcane Primary Charger (5.00%)

### Wiki
Arcane Primary Charger is an Arcane Enhancement that provides a 30% chance on killing an enemy with a melee weapon to increase the damage of primary weapons for 12 seconds.
Can be sold for 1,000.
Effect
Awarded from Arbitrations missions.
Can be purchased from the Arbitrations vendor in the Arbiters of Hexis room in Relays for 10 Vitus Essence.
**Notes:**
The buff is additive to damage mods.
For example, Braton with max Serration and 200% bonus from Arcane Primary Charger will have: 24.0 (1 + 165% + 200%) damage

## Arcane Pulse

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Health Pickup: 60% chance to restore 50 Health to allies within 25m 15s cooldown
- **Rank 1:** On Health Pickup: 60% chance to restore 100 Health to allies within 25m 15s cooldown
- **Rank 2:** On Health Pickup: 60% chance to restore 200 Health to allies within 25m 15s cooldown
- **Rank 3:** On Health Pickup: 60% chance to restore 300 Health to allies within 25m 15s cooldown +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Health Pickup: 60% chance to restore 400 Health to allies within 25m 15s cooldown +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** On Health Pickup: 60% chance to restore 500 Health to allies within 25m 15s cooldown +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 1 (Normal) — Arcane Pulse (0.67%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 3 (Normal) — Arcane Pulse (0.67%)
- Veil Proxima/Erato (Skirmish), Rotation C — Arcane Pulse (2.82%)
- Venus/Vesper Strait (Skirmish), Rotation C — Arcane Pulse (3.45%)
- The Descendia: Infernum 20 Triple Arcane Rewards — 3X Arcane Pulse (3.70%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 9 (Normal) — Arcane Pulse (4.00%)
- Eidolon Gantulyst (Capture) — Arcane Pulse (5.29%)
- Duviri Static Undercroft Portal — Arcane Pulse (7.14%)

### Wiki
Arcane Pulse is an Arcane Enhancement that provides a 60% chance to replenish additional health for you and nearby allies within 25m whenever a Health Orb is picked up. This effect has a 15 second cooldown.
Can be sold for 1,000.
Effect
Awarded for capturing the Eidolon Gantulyst.
Dropped in Rotation C of Orphix Venus Proxima or Veil Proxima missions.
**Notes:**
This enhancement synergizes with Nekros' Despoil Augment, as it makes Desecrate use Nekros' health to cast instead of his energy. Coupled with the health orbs generated with Desecrate this allows Nekros to heal nearby allies as he replenishes his own health.
The extra health from Arcane Pulse is not considered as being from a health orb, and thus will not affect Equinox's passive or Equilibrium.
Affected allies includes all Warframes, Companions, Eidolon Lures, summoned allied units such as Specters, allied Invasion units, Hostages, Kavor Defectors, Sortie and Arbitrations Defense Operatives, and Defense Objects.
This enhancement can also use Synth Fiber, which allows health orbs to be picked up with any health value, to reliably proc the radial without needing to take damage.
Universal Orbs created by Lavos's Transmutation Probe can trigger this arcane.

## Arcane Rise

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Reload: 60% chance for +25% Damage to Primary Weapons for 24s
- **Rank 1:** On Reload: 60% chance for +50% Damage to Primary Weapons for 24s
- **Rank 2:** On Reload: 60% chance for +75% Damage to Primary Weapons for 24s
- **Rank 3:** On Reload: 60% chance for +100% Damage to Primary Weapons for 24s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Reload: 60% chance for +125% Damage to Primary Weapons for 24s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** On Reload: 60% chance for +150% Damage to Primary Weapons for 24s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Lua/Circulus (Survival), Rotation B — Arcane Rise (7.94%)

### Wiki
Arcane Rise is an Arcane Enhancement for Warframes that provides a 60% chance on reloading any weapon to increase the damage of primary weapons for 24 seconds.
Effect
Arcane Rise can be obtained from Conjunction Survival Circulus on Lua as a Rotation B reward. Alternatively it can be purchased from Archimedean Yonta for 15 Lua Thrax Plasm each, with a total of 315 for max rank.
Note
The increase in damage stacks additively with mods that increase base damage e.g. Serration.
Triggers at the end of the reload.
Weapons that cannot reload, such as Bows, Epitaph, and Battery Weapons, cannot activate the buff.
Weapons that reload one round at a time like the Zarr, Felarx, or Corinth can proc this with each reload cycle, making it nearly guaranteed to proc on those types of weapons.
Also triggers upon engaging Incarnon mode.
**Tips:**
Particularly effective for primary weapons with very low magazine size - most notably the Vectis and the Exergis, as these guns will always have to be reloaded per shot.
Also effective for primaries with alt-fire that unload their magazines in a single burst, such as the Kuva Hek, the Nagantaka, and the Grakata with Wild Frenzy.

## Arcane Shield

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** +17% chance to resist an Impact Status effect.
- **Rank 1:** +34% chance to resist an Impact Status effect.
- **Rank 2:** +51% chance to resist an Impact Status effect.
- **Rank 3:** +68% chance to resist an Impact Status effect., +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** +85% chance to resist an Impact Status effect., +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** +102% chance to resist an Impact Status effect., +1 Arcane Revive

## Arcane Steadfast

### Drop Sources
- Mars/Tyana Pass (Defense), Rotation C — Arcane Steadfast (5.70%)

### Wiki
Arcane Steadfast is an Arcane Enhancement for Warframes that provides a chance for the next 3 Ability casts to not cost Energy upon using an Ability.
Effect
Arcane Steadfast can be obtained from Mirror Defense as a Rotation C reward. Alternatively it can be purchased from Otak for 60 Belric Crystal Fragment and Rania Crystal Fragment each, for a total of 1,260 of each for max rank.
Dropped by Captain Vor in Tolstoj (Mercury) in The Steel Path.
**Notes:**
Channeled Abilities will only have their initial cast be free. Energy drain works as normal.
Toggleable abilities, such as Pacify & Provoke or Spectral Scream can trigger the Arcane during initial ability activation.
Abilities that have no initial energy cost AND cost less than 3 modded energy per second will not proc nor drain the charges of the Arcane, such as Mach Rush, Pulverize, or Parasitic Link.
Stacks with Inner Might, allowing for an effective fourth charge when both effects are active.
Likewise with Inner Might, Arcane Steadfast doesn't have any effect when casting Railjack abilities.
Abilities that have had their cost negated by Arcane Steadfast will not be able to activate Arcane Steadfast again when cast. Thus, it is impossible to experience an extended chain of zero-cost ability casts refreshing the Arcane; there must be at least one non-negated ability cast in between each set of three negated abilities.
When Arcane Steadfast is active, 3 orbs of energy will orbit the Warframe, decaying after each "charge" is used.
As neither Hildryn nor Lavos use energy, this Arcane has no benefit for them.

## Arcane Strike

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Hit: 15% chance for +10% Attack Speed to Melee Weapons for 18s
- **Rank 1:** On Hit: 15% chance for +20% Attack Speed to Melee Weapons for 18s
- **Rank 2:** On Hit: 15% chance for +30% Attack Speed to Melee Weapons for 18s
- **Rank 3:** On Hit: 15% chance for +40% Attack Speed to Melee Weapons for 18s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Hit: 15% chance for +50% Attack Speed to Melee Weapons for 18s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** On Hit: 15% chance for +60% Attack Speed to Melee Weapons for 18s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

- Eidolon Gantulyst — Arcane Strike (18.25%)

### Wiki
Arcane Strike is an Arcane Enhancement that provides a 15% chance on each hit with any weapon to increase the speed of melee attacks for 18 seconds.
Can be sold for 500.
Effect
Awarded for killing or capturing the Eidolon Gantulyst.
Dropped in Rotation C of Orphix Venus Proxima or Veil Proxima missions.

**Notes:**
The increase in attack speed is additive to mods like Fury.
Also triggers on hits by ranged weapons, Warframe powers, or sentinels.
Arcane Strike also affects the attack speed of Exalted Blade, Hysteria, Primal Fury, and Blade Storm.
**Tips:**
Particularly effective with area effects that hit many times.
Vauban's Bastille
Gauss' Thermal Sunder, which can be subsumed to Helminth
Saryn's Spores
Equinox's Mend & Maim while she is in day form
Titania's Razorwing
Torid

## Arcane Tanker

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Archgun Equipped: +200 Armor for 60s
- **Rank 1:** On Archgun Equipped: +400 Armor for 60s
- **Rank 2:** On Archgun Equipped: +600 Armor for 60s
- **Rank 3:** On Archgun Equipped: +800 Armor for 60s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** On Archgun Equipped: +1,000 Armor for 60s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** On Archgun Equipped: +1,200 Armor for 60s +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Arbitrations, Rotation A — Arcane Tanker (5.00%)
- Arbitrations, Rotation C — Arcane Tanker (5.00%)

### Wiki
Arcane Tanker is an Arcane Enhancement that provides additional Armor for 60 seconds upon equipping an Archgun.
Can be sold for 1,000.
Effect
Awarded from Arbitrations missions.
Can be purchased from the Arbitrations vendor in the Arbiters of Hexis room in Relays for 10 Vitus Essence.
**Notes:**
The additional armor is not affected by mods and is additive to total armor. For example, a Chroma with a max rank Steel Fiber, and active Rank 5 Arcane Tanker will have an armor rating of:Base Armor (1 + Armor Mods) + Arcane Tanker 350 (1 + 1.0) + 1200 armor
**Tips:**
As Arcane Tanker increases total armor, it can significantly boost any ability that relies on total armor, when casting while under its effect. These include:
Rhino's Iron Skin, which can be further amplified with Ironclad Charge.
Atlas' Tectonics and Rumblers
Frost's Snow Globe
Gara's Mass Vitrify
Nezha's Warding Halo

## Arcane Truculence

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** When gaining 3,000 or more Overguard threshold, release a 5m Radial Attack that applies max Viral Status stacks.
- **Rank 1:** When gaining 3,000 or more Overguard threshold, release a 10m Radial Attack that applies max Viral Status stacks.
- **Rank 2:** When gaining 3,000 or more Overguard threshold, release a 15m Radial Attack that applies max Viral Status stacks.
- **Rank 3:** When gaining 3,000 or more Overguard threshold, release a 20m Radial Attack that applies max Viral Status stacks. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** When gaining 3,000 or more Overguard threshold, release a 25m Radial Attack that applies max Viral Status stacks. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** When gaining 3,000 or more Overguard threshold, release a 30m Radial Attack that applies max Viral Status stacks. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- H-09 Apex — Arcane Truculence (12.50%)
- H-09 Efervon Tank — Arcane Truculence (12.50%)
- Höllvania/Antivirus Bounty (Caches) — Arcane Truculence (12.50%)
- Höllvania/Exterminate: Scaldra (Caches) — Arcane Truculence (12.50%)
- Höllvania/Exterminate: Techrot (Caches) — Arcane Truculence (12.50%)
- Scaldra Screamer — Arcane Truculence (12.50%)

### Wiki
Arcane Truculence is an Arcane Enhancement for Warframes that releases a radial attack applying 10 stacks of Viral damage for every 3,000 Overguard they obtain.
Effect
Can be bought from Eleanor of The Hex for 7,500 Standing at Rank 4 - Hot & Fresh.
Rewarded from the 1999 Calendar.
Rewarded from Techrot Safes in Höllvania missions.
Rewarded from Scaldra Caches in Höllvania Exterminate missions.
Dropped by the H-09 Efervon Tank in Höllvania Assassination missions.
Rewarded from Höllvania Faceoff missions.
Dropped by the Scaldra Screamer in Höllvania Stage Defense missions.
**Notes:**
The viral wave is created every time you achieve a multiple of 3,000 Overguard (including 6,000, 9,000, and so on), whether you had no Overguard before or if you already had an existing amount applied to you.
In the top-right side of your screen the arcane's icon will appear with a percentage counter indicating your progress towards the next overguard threshold, and thus the next viral wave.
The viral wave respects the line-of-sight requirement and does not bypass walls and obstacles.

- **Rank 1:** On Finisher Kill: +400 Armor for 45s

### Wiki
Arcane Ultimatum is an Arcane Enhancement that, upon performing a Finisher kill, increases the Warframe's Armor for 45 seconds.
Can be sold for 1,000.
Effect
Awarded for capturing the Eidolon Gantulyst.
Dropped in Rotation C of Orphix Neptune Proxima or Veil Proxima missions.
**Notes:**
The additional armor is unaffected by mods. For example, a Chroma with a max rank Steel Fiber, and an active rank-5 Arcane Ultimatum will have an armor rating of:
Armor Base Armor (1 + Armor Mod) + Arcane Ultimatum
Armor 350 (1 + 1.1) + 1200
Armor 1935
Parazon Mercy kills will activate the effect.
Duration can be refreshed.
Will not work for Mercy's Kiss on regular units, ie enemies who don't have parazon finishers, despite the ability counting as a finisher attack for Arcane Trickery.

## Arcane Universal Fallout

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Each Radiation Status Effect inflicted on enemies by Abilities gives a 1% chance to drop a Universal Orb on enemy death.
- **Rank 1:** Each Radiation Status Effect inflicted on enemies by Abilities gives a 2% chance to drop a Universal Orb on enemy death.
- **Rank 2:** Each Radiation Status Effect inflicted on enemies by Abilities gives a 3% chance to drop a Universal Orb on enemy death.
- **Rank 3:** Each Radiation Status Effect inflicted on enemies by Abilities gives a 4% chance to drop a Universal Orb on enemy death. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 4:** Each Radiation Status Effect inflicted on enemies by Abilities gives a 5% chance to drop a Universal Orb on enemy death. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive
- **Rank 5:** Each Radiation Status Effect inflicted on enemies by Abilities gives a 6% chance to drop a Universal Orb on enemy death. +1 Arcane Revive, +1 Arcane Revive

### Drop Sources
- Temporal Archimedea Legendary Rewards — Arcane Universal Fallout (13.66%)
- Temporal Archimedea Gold Rewards — Arcane Universal Fallout (8.51%)
- Temporal Archimedea Silver Rewards — Arcane Universal Fallout (8.76%)

### Wiki
Arcane Universal Fallout is an Arcane Enhancement for the Warframe that gives enemies a chance to drop a large Universal Orb per Radiation Status Effect on death.
Effect
A single copy can be bought each week from Kaya Velasco in Höllvania Central Mall for 5 Pix Chip.
As a random reward from Temporal Archimedea.
**Notes:**
Applying a Radiation status effect on an enemy permanently increases the chance for an enemy to drop a Universal Orb when killed.
Chance is capped at 60% for all ranks of the arcane.
Drop chance increase persists after Radiation status effect wears off; No Radiation status effect need be present when an affected enemy is killed.
Universal orbs created from this Arcane give 50 health and 50 energy.
The following abilities can apply the Radiation status effects:
Trading Arcane Universal Fallout requires the trader to be Mastery Rank 11 or higher.

## Cascadia Empowered

### Acquisition
Cascadia Empowered can be purchased from Cavalero for 7,500 Standing, requiring Rank 3 - Guardian with The Holdfasts. It can also be dropped by Thrax Centurion, Thrax Legatus, and Void Angels on the Zariman Ten Zero.
Farming Tips
Thrax enemies are abundant in Mobile Defense and Void Cascade missions.
The Zariman Arcane drop is considered as a mod drop, and is thus affected by The Steel Path and Mod Drop Chance Booster.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Status Effect: Deals +250 Damage matching the Damage Type of the Status Effect
- **Rank 1:** On Status Effect: Deals +350 Damage matching the Damage Type of the Status Effect
- **Rank 2:** On Status Effect: Deals +450 Damage matching the Damage Type of the Status Effect
- **Rank 3:** On Status Effect: Deals +550 Damage matching the Damage Type of the Status Effect
- **Rank 4:** On Status Effect: Deals +650 Damage matching the Damage Type of the Status Effect
- **Rank 5:** On Status Effect: Deals +750 Damage matching the Damage Type of the Status Effect

### Drop Sources
- Thrax Centurion — Cascadia Empowered (0.33%)
- Thrax Legatus — Cascadia Empowered (0.33%)
- Ravenous Void Angel — Cascadia Empowered (0.67%)
- Void Angel — Cascadia Empowered (1.67%)
- The Holdfasts (Cavalero), Guardian — Cascadia Empowered (100.00%)

### Wiki
Cascadia Empowered is an Arcane Enhancement for Secondary weapons that deals a flat amount of damage based on Status Effect, matching the status's damage type.
Effect
**Notes:**
Creates an extra instance of damage when proccing a status effect.
More than 1 status proc on a single hit (>100% Status chance) will properly add extra damage, but will be displayed as a single damage number.
Not affected by damage, element, physical, Galvanized Shot stacks, Synth Charge, or critical mods and bonuses.
Affected by faction mods and bonuses once.
Not affected by Eclipse or Garuda's passive.
Triggers on Toxin procs by Toxic Lash.
Doesn't trigger on Void procs by Xata's Whisper.
Affected by Damage Vulnerability like Caliban's Sentient Wrath, Gara's Mass Vitrify and Splinter Storm.
Not affected by weakspots, but is affected by enemy damage reduction. For example, striking a Nox in the face will still have Cascadia Empowered's damage reduced by its body's damage reduction.
Not affected by weapon falloff such as on shotguns and explosions.
Can proc off of Zenurik's Temporal Shot bonus when used with Seeking Talons.

## Cascadia Flare

### Acquisition
Cascadia Flare can be purchased from Cavalero for 5,500 Standing, requiring Rank 2 - Watcher with The Holdfasts. It can also be dropped by Thrax Centurion, Thrax Legatus, and Void Angels on the Zariman Ten Zero.
Dropped by Captain Vor in Tolstoj (Mercury) in The Steel Path.
Farming Tips
Thrax enemies are abundant in Mobile Defense and Void Cascade missions.
The Zariman Arcane drop is considered as a mod drop, and is thus affected by The Steel Path and Mod Drop Chance Booster.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Heat Status Effect: +2% Damage for 10s. Stacks up to 80%.
- **Rank 1:** On Heat Status Effect: +4% Damage for 10s. Stacks up to 160%.
- **Rank 2:** On Heat Status Effect: +6% Damage for 10s. Stacks up to 240%.
- **Rank 3:** On Heat Status Effect: +8% Damage for 10s. Stacks up to 320%.
- **Rank 4:** On Heat Status Effect: +10% Damage for 10s. Stacks up to 400%.
- **Rank 5:** On Heat Status Effect: +12% Damage for 10s. Stacks up to 480%.

### Drop Sources
- Thrax Centurion — Cascadia Flare (0.33%)
- Thrax Legatus — Cascadia Flare (0.33%)
- Ravenous Void Angel — Cascadia Flare (0.67%)
- Void Angel — Cascadia Flare (1.67%)
- The Holdfasts (Cavalero), Watcher — Cascadia Flare (100.00%)

### Wiki
Cascadia Flare is an Arcane Enhancement for Secondary weapons, that grants increased secondary weapon damage for 10 seconds when applying Heat procs.
Effect
**Notes:**
Damage bonus is additive to damage mods like Hornet Strike.
At all ranks, it will take 40 Heat procs to reach the maximum damage bonus.
The bonus damage is applied on all damage types present in the secondary, and not just Heat damage.
Stacking Cascadia Flare does not require the Heat proc to come from the secondary: it can come from Warframe abilities such as Ember's ability kit and Protea's Blaze Artillery, or any weapon or companion that can proc Heat - even if the secondary is holstered.
Unless one is riding Merulina, in which case, only procs from the weapon itself will count.
Unlike other weapon Arcanes, Cascadia Flare stacks expire all at once after 10 seconds of no procs, rather than only 1 stack every 10 seconds.

## Cascadia Overcharge

### Acquisition
Cascadia Overcharge can be purchased from Cavalero for 10,000 Standing, requiring Rank 5 - Angel with The Holdfasts. It can also be dropped by Thrax Centurion, Thrax Legatus, and Void Angels on the Zariman Ten Zero.
Farming Tips
Thrax enemies are abundant in Mobile Defense and Void Cascade missions.
The Zariman Arcane drop is considered as a mod drop, and is thus affected by The Steel Path and Mod Drop Chance Booster.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** While Overshields Active: +50% Critical Chance
- **Rank 1:** While Overshields Active: +100% Critical Chance
- **Rank 2:** While Overshields Active: +150% Critical Chance
- **Rank 3:** While Overshields Active: +200% Critical Chance
- **Rank 4:** While Overshields Active: +250% Critical Chance
- **Rank 5:** While Overshields Active: +300% Critical Chance

### Drop Sources
- Thrax Centurion — Cascadia Overcharge (0.33%)
- Thrax Legatus — Cascadia Overcharge (0.33%)
- Ravenous Void Angel — Cascadia Overcharge (0.67%)
- Void Angel — Cascadia Overcharge (1.67%)
- The Holdfasts (Cavalero), Angel — Cascadia Overcharge (100.00%)

### Wiki
Cascadia Overcharge is a Secondary Arcane that grants additional Critical Chance to the secondary weapon while Overshields are active.
Effect
**Notes:**
Cascadia Overcharge stacks additively with mods like Pistol Gambit and Creeping Bullseye. For example, a Lex Prime with a max rank Pistol Gambit and Cascadia Overcharge would have a 25% (1 + 120% + 300%) critical chance on attacks.
The bonus to critical chance only applies to the secondary or exalted weapon on which it is equipped, not to other weapons or Warframe abilities.
**Tips:**
Shield Charger can be used to gain overshields.
The Augur Mods set bonus can consistently generate Overshields for many Warframes as long as they use energy and have shields.
Warframes with abilities that generate Overshields can efficiently make use of this Arcane, such as Harrow's Condemn, Hildryn's Pillage, and Protea's long-press Grenade Fan. Condemn and Pillage can also be used by any Warframe via the Helminth.
Warframes with abilities that can prevent their shields from taking damage, such as Revenant and Rhino, can keep this Arcane's benefits active potentially indefinitely. Revenant in particular, while Mesmer Skin is active, has functional invincibility to enemy damage and Magnetic status effects and can sometimes generate shields for himself with Reave, but can still take damage from environmental hazards.
Certain Warframe Augment Mods can be used to generate overshields or Overguard to protect any overshields you may have, such as Volt's Capacitance, Trinity's Vampire Leech, or Frost's Icy Avalanche.

- **Rank 4:** On Electricity Status Effect: +1.25% Reload Speed and +2.5% Multishot for 12s. Stacks up to 40x.
- **Rank 5:** On Electricity Status Effect: +1.5% Reload Speed and +3% Multishot for 12s. Stacks up to 40x.

### Drop Sources
- Nokko: Corporate Restructuring (Steel Path), Rotation C — Conjunction Voltage (10.00%)

- Lua/Circulus (Survival), Rotation B — Conjunction Voltage (7.94%)
- Nokko: Corporate Restructuring (Steel Path), Rotation B — Conjunction Voltage (8.00%)
- Nokko: Corporate Restructuring Rewards, Rotation C — Conjunction Voltage (8.00%)
- Nokko: Critter Liberation Rewards (Steel Path), Rotation B — Conjunction Voltage (8.00%)
- Nokko: Critter Liberation Rewards, Rotation C — Conjunction Voltage (8.00%)
- Nokko: Weed The Gardens Rewards (Steel Path), Rotation B — Conjunction Voltage (8.00%)
- Nokko: Weed The Gardens Rewards, Rotation C — Conjunction Voltage (8.00%)

### Wiki
Conjunction Voltage is an Arcane Enhancement for secondary weapons that increases secondary weapon reload speed and multishot for 12 seconds when applying Electricity procs.
Effect
Conjunction Voltage can be obtained from Conjunction Survival Circulus on Lua as a Rotation B reward.
Purchaseable from Archimedean Yonta in the Zariman for 15 Lua Thrax Plasm each, with a total of 315 for max rank.
Possible reward from Deepmines Bounties from Nightcap.
Purchaseable from Nightcap in Fortuna for 10 Fergolyte each, with a total of 210 for max rank.
Note
At all ranks, it will take 40 Electricity procs to reach the maximum bonus.
Stacking Conjunction Voltage does not require the Electricity proc to come from the secondary: it can come from Warframe abilities such as Volt's or Gyre's ability kit, or any weapon that can proc Electricity - even if the secondary is holstered.
Unlike other weapon arcanes, Conjunction Voltage stacks expire all at once after 12 seconds of no procs, rather than only 1 stack every 12 seconds.
Electricity procs that are created by Magnetic status do not give stacks
**Tips:**
With high fire rate weapons such as Afuris, Regulators, or Quatz, Conjunction Voltage's max stack can be reached rather quickly despite its tendency to lose all its stacks upon expiry.

## Emergence Dissipate

### Acquisition
Emergence Dissipate can be purchased from Cavalero for 10,000 Standing, requiring Rank 5 - Angel with The Holdfasts. It can also be dropped by Thrax Centurion, Thrax Legatus, and Void Angels on the Zariman Ten Zero.
Farming Tips
Thrax enemies are abundant in Mobile Defense and Void Cascade missions.
The Zariman Arcane drop is considered as a mod drop, and is thus affected by The Steel Path and Mod Drop Chance Booster.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** WHILE IN VOID SLING: Press to dissipate the endpoint in a 10m radius. Enemies hit create a short lived Void Mote that replenishes 5 Energy on pick up.
- **Rank 1:** WHILE IN VOID SLING: Press to dissipate the endpoint in a 10m radius. Enemies hit create a short lived Void Mote that replenishes 6 Energy on pick up.
- **Rank 2:** WHILE IN VOID SLING: Press to dissipate the endpoint in a 10m radius. Enemies hit create a short lived Void Mote that replenishes 7 Energy on pick up.
- **Rank 3:** WHILE IN VOID SLING: Press to dissipate the endpoint in a 10m radius. Enemies hit create a short lived Void Mote that replenishes 8 Energy on pick up.
- **Rank 4:** WHILE IN VOID SLING: Press to dissipate the endpoint in a 10m radius. Enemies hit create a short lived Void Mote that replenishes 9 Energy on pick up.
- **Rank 5:** WHILE IN VOID SLING: Press to dissipate the endpoint in a 10m radius. Enemies hit create a short lived Void Mote that replenishes 10 Energy on pick up.

### Drop Sources
- Thrax Centurion — Emergence Dissipate (0.33%)
- Thrax Legatus — Emergence Dissipate (0.33%)
- Ravenous Void Angel — Emergence Dissipate (0.67%)
- Void Angel — Emergence Dissipate (1.67%)
- The Holdfasts (Cavalero), Angel — Emergence Dissipate (100.00%)

### Wiki
Emergence Dissipate is an Arcane Enhancement for the Operator that allows Void Sling to be cancelled via the fire button (default Mouse 1), causing the end point to dissipate within 10 meters. Enemies hit by the dissipation spawn Energy Mote pickups.
Effect
**Notes:**
There is a 1.5 second delay before the same enemy can generate additional Motes.
Regenerates energy for Operators, Warframes, and Necramechs.
Regenerates energy during channeling abilities such as Danse Macabre.
Motes will float in the air and drift off into a random direction upon spawning. They will despawn after 10 seconds if not picked up.
Motes are attracted by Vacuum and Fetch.
Motes are not attracted by vortex abilities, such as Void Snare.
Motes do not trigger Arcane Energize or Arcane Eruption.
Motes are not affected by Amber Archon Shard energy orb effectiveness.
While under the effects of Nourish, the amount of energy in the pickup text at the bottom of the screen is unchanged from the original amount.
This is purely a visual bug, and energy is correctly increased.

## Emergence Renewed

### Acquisition
Emergence Renewed can be purchased from Cavalero for 7,500 Standing, requiring Rank 3 - Guardian with The Holdfasts. It can also be dropped by Thrax Centurion, Thrax Legatus, and Void Angels on the Zariman Ten Zero.
Farming Tips
Thrax enemies are abundant in Mobile Defense and Void Cascade missions.
The Zariman Arcane drop is considered as a mod drop, and is thus affected by The Steel Path and Mod Drop Chance Booster.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Energy Depleted: Increase Energy Regeneration by 50% over 5s. Cooldown: 30s
- **Rank 1:** On Energy Depleted: Increase Energy Regeneration by 100% over 5s. Cooldown: 30s
- **Rank 2:** On Energy Depleted: Increase Energy Regeneration by 150% over 5s. Cooldown: 30s
- **Rank 3:** On Energy Depleted: Increase Energy Regeneration by 200% over 5s. Cooldown: 30s
- **Rank 4:** On Energy Depleted: Increase Energy Regeneration by 250% over 5s. Cooldown: 30s
- **Rank 5:** On Energy Depleted: Increase Energy Regeneration by 300% over 5s. Cooldown: 30s

### Drop Sources
- Thrax Centurion — Emergence Renewed (0.33%)
- Thrax Legatus — Emergence Renewed (0.33%)
- Ravenous Void Angel — Emergence Renewed (0.67%)
- Void Angel — Emergence Renewed (1.67%)
- The Holdfasts (Cavalero), Guardian — Emergence Renewed (100.00%)

### Wiki
Emergence Renewed is an Arcane Enhancement for the Operator that increases Energy regeneration for 5 seconds after depleting energy with a 30 second cooldown.
Effect
**Notes:**
Activates when energy depletes to ~10%.
Energy refers to the Operator's energy, not the Amp's.

## Exodia Brave

### Acquisition
Can be bought from Hok for 10,000 Standing per arcane upon reaching the rank of Kin with the Ostrons.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Heavy Attack Kill: +1.3 Energy Rate for 4s. Stacks up to 3x.
- **Rank 1:** On Heavy Attack Kill: +2.5 Energy Rate for 4s. Stacks up to 3x.
- **Rank 2:** On Heavy Attack Kill: +3.8 Energy Rate for 4s. Stacks up to 3x.
- **Rank 3:** On Heavy Attack Kill: +5 Energy Rate for 4s. Stacks up to 3x.

### Drop Sources
- Ostron (Hok), Kin — Exodia Brave (100.00%)

### Wiki
Exodia Brave is an Arcane Enhancement for Zaws that grants a 4-second energy regeneration on heavy attack kills.
Effect
**Notes:**
Grants a buff that regenerates energy over time
The killing blow must be from the weapon's direct damage; status kills will not trigger the buff.
Casting an ability will stop the energy generation for 1 second.
Channeled Abilities that drain energy over time, such as Immolation, Sound Quake, and Renewal will completely prevent energy generation for as long as they are active.
Stacks up to three times for 15 energy/sec, for a total of 60 energy over 4 sec.
(bug?) Obtaining the 2nd and 3rd stacks refreshes the buff, but killing an enemy while the buff is active at max stacks (x3) does not refresh the timer.
**Trivia:**
Prior to Update 24.6, Exodia Brave was purchasable as a blueprint with the following requirements to build:

## Exodia Contagion

### Acquisition
Exodia Contagion is obtainable from limited-time events:
Operation: Plague Star sold Exodia Contagion from Nakak for 5,000 Standing + 1,500, requiring Rank 2 - Defender with Operational Supply.
The October 2020, 2022 and 2024 Nights of Naberus event sold Exodia Contagion from Daughter for 50 Mother Token each.
Mechanics
Upon performing a mid-air attack while Aim Gliding after Bullet Jumping or Double Jumping, an Infested projectile is launched. After traveling 30 meters, the damage of the projectile is increased by 0% / 100% / 200% / 300% plus (combo level - 1) / 4
The increased damage is indicated by a small burst of energy at that point.
The projectile is not limited by range.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** After a Bullet Jump or Double Jump: Melee while Aim Gliding launches a projectile that explodes on impact
- **Rank 1:** After a Bullet Jump or Double Jump: Melee while Aim Gliding launches a projectile that explodes on impact
- **Rank 2:** After a Bullet Jump or Double Jump: Melee while Aim Gliding launches a projectile that explodes on impact
- **Rank 3:** After a Bullet Jump or Double Jump: Melee while Aim Gliding launches a projectile that explodes on impact

### Drop Sources
- Operational Supply, Defender — Exodia Contagion (100.00%)

### Wiki
Exodia Contagion is an Arcane Enhancement for Zaws that unleashes a projectile of Infested energy upon performing an aerial melee attack while aim gliding after a bullet jump or double jump. Increasing the Enhancement's Rank gives the projectile additional damage if it travels 30 meters before it contacts an enemy or a surface.
Effect

## Exodia Epidemic

### Acquisition
Exodia Epidemic is obtainable from limited-time events:
Operation: Plague Star sold Exodia Epidemic from Nakak for 5,000 Standing + 1,500, requiring Rank 2 - Defender with Operational Supply.
The October 2020, 2022 and 2024 Nights of Naberus event sold Exodia Epidemic from Daughter for 50 Mother Token each.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** After a Bullet Jump or Double Jump: Slam emits a shockwave forwards that suspends enemies in the air for a short period
- **Rank 1:** After a Bullet Jump or Double Jump: Slam emits a shockwave forwards that suspends enemies in the air for a short period
- **Rank 2:** After a Bullet Jump or Double Jump: Slam emits a shockwave forwards that suspends enemies in the air for a short period
- **Rank 3:** After a Bullet Jump or Double Jump: Slam emits a shockwave forwards that suspends enemies in the air for a short period

### Drop Sources
- Operational Supply, Defender — Exodia Epidemic (100.00%)

### Wiki
Exodia Epidemic is an Arcane Enhancement for Zaws that unleashes a wave of Infested energy that suspends enemies caught in the blast radius, generated from the melee ground slam performed immediately after a bullet jump or double jump.
Effect
**Notes:**
Perform a bullet jump (Ctrl + Spacebar) or double jump (Spacebar x2) then perform a ground slam (look downward and press E) to create a wave of energy that applies the Rhino Stomp effect to enemies.
Enemies affected by this effect take increased damage from Rhino Charge but will not restore overguard while Reinforcing Stomp is equipped.
This effect cannot activate the effects of the Saxum Set mods or Melee Afflictions.
This effect does not add damage to weapons via Condition Overload (Mechanic).
Unaffected by Ability Strength, Archon Shard ability damage bonuses,
The wave is ~5 meters wide, and will travel forward for ~31 meters, going over terrain elevations and passing through enemies, dealing 10 Blast Damage, before exploding at the end and dealing Viral damage in a ~7 meters radius.

## Exodia Force

### Acquisition
Can be bought from Hok for 10,000 Standing per arcane upon reaching the rank of Kin with the Ostrons.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Status Effect: 50% chance to deal 50% Weapon Damage to enemies within 6m.
- **Rank 1:** On Status Effect: 50% chance to deal 100% Weapon Damage to enemies within 6m.
- **Rank 2:** On Status Effect: 50% chance to deal 150% Weapon Damage to enemies within 6m.
- **Rank 3:** On Status Effect: 50% chance to deal 200% Weapon Damage to enemies within 6m.

### Drop Sources
- Ostron (Hok), Kin — Exodia Force (100.00%)

### Wiki
Falloff distance
Exodia Force is an Arcane Enhancement for Zaws that grants a 50% chance when inflicting a Status Effect to cause a radial blast around the player, inflicting a percentage of weapon damage to targets within a 6m range. The damage scales with melee mods and combo multipliers.
Effect
**Notes:**
The radius appears from your warframe, not your weapon.
Damage has a 100% falloff scaling across 6m.
The area of effect damage has 1.0 follow through.
Affected by the combo counter, Stance damage multipliers, base damage, elemental damage and faction damage mods.
Follows the same scaling from combo counter as pseudo-exalted abilities likeBlade Storm, Landslide, Shattered Lash, Slash Dash and Whipclaw: 1 + (combo level - 1) / 4
Not affected by most other melee mods such as Condition Overload, and Reach.
Not affected by the melee stealth multiplier.
Scoring a critical hit with a weapon will not affect Exodia Force's damage.
Unable to produce critical hits or status effects, even with flat bonuses such as those from Arcane Avenger, Cat's Eye or Covenant.
**Trivia:**
Prior to Update 24.6, Exodia Force was purchasable as a blueprint with the following requirements to build:

## Exodia Hunt

### Acquisition
Can be bought from Hok for 10,000 Standing per arcane upon reaching the rank of Kin with the Ostrons.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Ground Slam: 50% chance to pull enemies within 6m into melee range.
- **Rank 1:** On Ground Slam: 50% chance to pull enemies within 8m into melee range.
- **Rank 2:** On Ground Slam: 50% chance to pull enemies within 10m into melee range.
- **Rank 3:** On Ground Slam: 50% chance to pull enemies within 12m into melee range.

### Drop Sources
- Ostron (Hok), Kin — Exodia Hunt (100.00%)

### Wiki
Exodia Hunt is an Arcane Enhancement for Zaws that grants a 50% chance to pull in nearby enemies on slam attacks.
Effect
**Notes:**
Enemies pulled in by the effect, assuming they are not already under some kind of animation lock, are staggered and will be opened up to finishers.
Rather than the slam itself being the trigger for pulling in enemies, the slam appears to activate an invisible buff which will, in turn, pull in and stagger enemies that enter into range, even as the player moves. The buff appears to last for roughly 1-2 seconds from testing.
The effect is treated as an ability, which means that it will bypass Limbo's Rift Plane mechanic and will not affect targets affected by a nullification effect.
Combos which include slam attacks can trigger Exodia Hunt.
Applies an implosion graphical effect in bright orange and green on targets affected by the pull.
Implosion effect colors might be modifiable, however this seems buggy.

## Exodia Might

### Acquisition
Can be bought from Hok for 10,000 Standing per arcane upon reaching the rank of Kin with the Ostrons.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Finisher Kill: 50% chance for +7.5% Life Steal for 8s
- **Rank 1:** On Finisher Kill: 50% chance for +15% Life Steal for 8s
- **Rank 2:** On Finisher Kill: 50% chance for +22.5% Life Steal for 8s
- **Rank 3:** On Finisher Kill: 50% chance for +30% Life Steal for 8s

### Drop Sources
- Ostron (Hok), Kin — Exodia Might (100.00%)

### Wiki
Exodia Might is an Arcane Enhancement for Zaws that has a 50% chance to grant lifesteal on Finishers for 8 seconds.
Effect
**Notes:**
While the buff is active, only melee damage will siphon health. This includes damage over time status effects such as Slash, Toxin, Gas, and Heat procs.
Ground finishers will not grant lifesteal buff.
The initial finisher that procs the buff will only grant healing if the player is the host.
Synergizes well with Dizzying Rounds as close range finishers will be guaranteed after hitting an enemy with the augment-modded Bronco/Bronco Prime.
**Trivia:**

## Longbow Sharpshot

### Acquisition
May appear as a Steel Path Circuit Tier 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, or 8 reward on a weekly rotational basis.
May be sold by Acrithis for 20 Pathos Clamp on a daily rotational basis, requiring Drifter Intrinsics Opportunity Rank 9 for the arcanes to appear in her shop.
May drop from Undercroft portals in the Duviri Experience while on The Steel Path (2.78%).

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Headshot: Gain +50% damage on your next shot.
- **Rank 1:** On Headshot: Gain +100% damage on your next shot.
- **Rank 2:** On Headshot: Gain +150% damage on your next shot.
- **Rank 3:** On Headshot: Gain +200% damage on your next shot.
- **Rank 4:** On Headshot: Gain +250% damage on your next shot.
- **Rank 5:** On Headshot: Gain +300% damage on your next shot.

### Drop Sources
- Duviri Static Undercroft Portal (Steel Path) — Longbow Sharpshot (2.78%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 2 (Hard) — Longbow Sharpshot (33.33%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 8 (Hard) — Longbow Sharpshot (33.33%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 6 (Hard) — Longbow Sharpshot (6.00%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 7 (Hard) — Longbow Sharpshot (6.00%)

### Wiki
Longbow Sharpshot is a Primary Arcane for bows that, on landing a headshot, increases the damage of the next shot.
Effect
**Notes:**
Trading Longbow Sharpshot requires the trader to be Mastery Rank 11 or higher.
Damage bonus is multiplicative to mods like Serration.
Cannot be equipped on crossbows such as Attica, Nagantaka (Nagantaka Prime), and Zhuge (Zhuge Prime).
As long as every consecutive shot is a headshot, the buff is always active.
If the buff is not active, the first headshot does not benefit from it, even if the bow has multishot.
Where Galvanized Aptitude adds with damage mods, will not multiply GunCO's bonus portion.
Explanation: Galvanized Aptitude does not always add with damage mods like Serration, but with weapon cases where it does add such as Daikyu, Galvanized Aptitude's entire contribution to damage is a recalculation of all bonuses minus +damage, thus making it mathematically additive to that particular bonus.
However, this recalculation is outdated and does not include many damage bonuses, one of which is Longbow Sharpshot's multiplying effect.
Its additive formula regarding Longbow Sharpshot is as follows:
Damage bonus% = [(1 + Serration) (1 + Longbow Sharpshot)] + Galvanized Aptitude

## Magus Accelerant

### Acquisition
Can be bought from Vox Solaris (Syndicate) for 10,000 Standing upon reaching the rank of Shadow.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Void Sling: Reduce Enemy Resistance to Heat Damage by 12%.
- **Rank 1:** On Void Sling: Reduce Enemy Resistance to Heat Damage by 25%.
- **Rank 2:** On Void Sling: Reduce Enemy Resistance to Heat Damage by 37%.
- **Rank 3:** On Void Sling: Reduce Enemy Resistance to Heat Damage by 50%.
- **Rank 4:** On Void Sling: Reduce Enemy Resistance to Heat Damage by 60%.
- **Rank 5:** On Void Sling: Reduce Enemy Resistance to Heat Damage by 65%.

### Drop Sources
- Vox Solaris, Shadow — Magus Accelerant (100.00%)

### Wiki
Magus Accelerant is an Arcane Enhancement for the Operator. Whenever the Operator performs Void Sling on an enemy, they will become more vulnerable to Heat damage.
Effect
**Notes:**
The effect will apply a permanent stacking Damage Vulnerability debuff for all Heat damage done to an enemy.
Can be applied multiple times with no limit, with each application stacking additively with each other.
For example, using an Ignis Wraith modded with Serration and Hellfire will against an enemy affected with 3 stacks of a max rank Magus Accelerant with deal
35 * (1 + Serration) * (1 + Hellfire) * (1 + 3 * Magus Accelerant) damage before any damage reduction or resistances.
Has no effect on Eidolons.
**Tips:**
Synergizes with Virtuos Forge, Magus Melt, Magus Cloud and many Madurai nodes.

## Magus Aggress

### Acquisition
May appear as a The Circuit's The Steel Path Tier 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, or +11 reward on a weekly rotational basis.
May be sold by Acrithis for 10 Pathos Clamp on a daily rotational basis, requiring Drifter Intrinsics Opportunity Rank 9 for the arcanes to appear in her shop.
May drop from Undercroft portals in The Duviri Experience while on Steel Path.

- **Rank 0:** On Warframe Melee Transference: Heavy Blades deal +50% Critical Damage for 4 consecutive attacks. Cooldown 20s.
- **Rank 1:** On Warframe Melee Transference: Heavy Blades deal +100% Critical Damage for 4 consecutive attacks. Cooldown 20s.
- **Rank 2:** On Warframe Melee Transference: Heavy Blades deal +150% Critical Damage for 4 consecutive attacks. Cooldown 20s.
- **Rank 3:** On Warframe Melee Transference: Heavy Blades deal +200% Critical Damage for 4 consecutive attacks. Cooldown 20s.
- **Rank 4:** On Warframe Melee Transference: Heavy Blades deal +250% Critical Damage for 4 consecutive attacks. Cooldown 20s.
- **Rank 5:** On Warframe Melee Transference: Heavy Blades deal +300% Critical Damage for 4 consecutive attacks. Cooldown 20s.

### Wiki
Magus Aggress is an Arcane Enhancement for the Operator that, on Warframe Melee Transfer, causes Heavy Blades and Hammers to deal bonus Critical Damage for the next 4 attacks, with a 20 second cooldown.
Effect
**Notes:**
Bonus is additive to mods such as Organ Shatter.
Exalted Weapons don't benefit from the increased Critical Damage but also don't consume charges.
Pseudo Exalted Weapons don't benefit from the increased Critical Damage but still consume charges after 5 seconds.

## Magus Anomaly

### Acquisition

- **Rank 2:** On Transference In: Enemies within 15m are pulled towards Warframe.

### Drop Sources

### Wiki
Magus Anomaly is an Arcane Enhancement for the Operator. Whenever the Operator transfers back into their Warframe, nearby enemies are pulled towards it.
Effect
**Notes:**
Pulled enemies are moved 5 meters closer to the Warframe.
The pull does not ragdoll enemies: they simply "slide" towards the Warframe.
The pull does not alert enemies.
Transference Static does not trigger the arcane's effect.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Void Mode: +50% Void Sling Radius for 6s
- **Rank 1:** On Void Mode: +100% Void Sling Radius for 6s
- **Rank 2:** On Void Mode: +150% Void Sling Radius for 6s
- **Rank 3:** On Void Mode: +200% Void Sling Radius for 6s
- **Rank 4:** On Void Mode: +250% Void Sling Radius for 6s
- **Rank 5:** On Void Mode: +300% Void Sling Radius for 6s

### Drop Sources
- The Quills, Instrument — Magus Cloud (100.00%)

### Wiki
Magus Cloud is an Arcane Enhancement for the operator that temporarily increases Void Sling radius for 6 seconds after using Void Mode.
Effect
**Notes:**
The operator's Void Mode ability triggers a buff that increases Void Sling radius.
It affects hitbox radius, not dashing distance.
Increases hitbox radius from 2 meters to 8 meters.
The width increase stacks additively with other increases.
Duration can be triggered again with no cooldown.
The maximum possible radius of Void Sling is 12 meters, achievable by combining Magus Cloud with Sling Stun.
See Void Sling#Enhancements for related upgrades.
**Tips:**
Pairing Magus Cloud with Vazarin's Protective Sling allows for much easier application of the ability.
**Trivia:**
Prior to Update 24.6, Magus Cloud was purchasable as a blueprint with the following requirements to build:

## Magus Destruct

### Acquisition
Can be bought from Vox Solaris for 10,000 Standing upon reaching the rank of Instrument.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Void Sling: Reduce Enemy Resistance to Puncture Damage by 12%.
- **Rank 1:** On Void Sling: Reduce Enemy Resistance to Puncture Damage by 25%.
- **Rank 2:** On Void Sling: Reduce Enemy Resistance to Puncture Damage by 37%.
- **Rank 3:** On Void Sling: Reduce Enemy Resistance to Puncture Damage by 50%.
- **Rank 4:** On Void Sling: Reduce Enemy Resistance to Puncture Damage by 60%.
- **Rank 5:** On Void Sling: Reduce Enemy Resistance to Puncture Damage by 65%.

### Drop Sources
- Vox Solaris, Instrument — Magus Destruct (100.00%)

### Wiki
Magus Destruct is an Arcane Enhancement for the Operator. Whenever the Operator performs a Void Sling on an enemy, they will become more vulnerable to Puncture damage.
Effect
**Notes:**
The effect will apply a permanent stacking Damage Vulnerability debuff for all Puncture damage done to an enemy.
Can be applied multiple times with no limit, with each application stacking additively with each other.
For example, using an AX-52 modded with Serration and Piercing Caliber will against an enemy affected with 3 stacks of a max rank Magus Destruct with deal
40 * (1 + Serration) * (1 + Piercing Caliber) * (1 + 3 * Magus Destruct) damage before any damage reduction or resistances.
Has no effect on Eidolons.
**Tips:**
Synergizes with Virtuos Spike.
