## Secondary Outburst

### Acquisition
May appear as a Steel Path Circuit Tier 1, 3, 4, 6, or 7 reward on a weekly rotational basis.
May be sold by Acrithis for 10 Pathos Clamps on a daily rotational basis, requiring Drifter Intrinsics Opportunity Rank 9 for the arcanes to appear in her shop.
May drop from Undercroft portals in the Duviri Experience while on Steel Path.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On swapping to Secondary Weapon, consume all Combo Multipliers to increase Secondary Weapon Critical Chance and Critical Damage by 5% per Combo consumed for 30s.
- **Rank 1:** On swapping to Secondary Weapon, consume all Combo Multipliers to increase Secondary Weapon Critical Chance and Critical Damage by 7% per Combo consumed for 30s.
- **Rank 2:** On swapping to Secondary Weapon, consume all Combo Multipliers to increase Secondary Weapon Critical Chance and Critical Damage by 9% per Combo consumed for 30s.
- **Rank 3:** On swapping to Secondary Weapon, consume all Combo Multipliers to increase Secondary Weapon Critical Chance and Critical Damage by 12% per Combo consumed for 30s.
- **Rank 4:** On swapping to Secondary Weapon, consume all Combo Multipliers to increase Secondary Weapon Critical Chance and Critical Damage by 16% per Combo consumed for 30s.
- **Rank 5:** On swapping to Secondary Weapon, consume all Combo Multipliers to increase Secondary Weapon Critical Chance and Critical Damage by 20% per Combo consumed for 30s.

### Drop Sources
- Duviri Static Undercroft Portal (Steel Path) — Secondary Outburst (10.19%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 1 (Hard) — Secondary Outburst (4.43%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 3 (Hard) — Secondary Outburst (4.43%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 4 (Hard) — Secondary Outburst (4.43%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 6 (Hard) — Secondary Outburst (6.00%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 7 (Hard) — Secondary Outburst (6.00%)
- Duviri/Endless: Repeated Rewards (Hard) — Secondary Outburst (9.09%)

### Wiki
Secondary Outburst is a Secondary Arcane that consumes all melee combo multipliers to increase secondary weapon Critical Chance and Critical Damage upon swapping to a secondary weapon.
Effect
**Notes:**
The values are additive with mods like Pistol Gambit and Target Cracker.
While the buff is active, swapping to secondary will not override the Outburst buff unless it would provide a higher buff than the active one.
For example, if the current buff is +100% (swapping from a 5x combo), the arcane will not override the buff if current combo level is 5x or below when the weapon swap occurs.
Melee combo is consumed every time the player swaps to a secondary with Outburst.
The buff does not affect any of the secondary exalted weapons if the arcane is not equipped directly on secondary exalted weapons.
It is not possible to consume combo count from both a normal and exalted melee simultaneously, only whichever is currently active.
The Venka Prime's increased maximum combo count works with this arcane, allowing for a slightly larger buff than is possible with other melee weapons.
**Tips:**
Can use the Gun and Blade perk of Ceramic Dagger as well as Corrupt Charge and Covert Lethality.
The full effect can be obtained through Melee Crescendo, which is easily stacked by opening enemies to ground finishers with ragdoll grouping from Void Snare, Airburst, Coil Horizon, Pull, etc.

## Secondary Shiver

### Acquisition
May appear as a Steel Path Circuit Tier 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, or 8 reward on a weekly rotational basis.
May be sold by Acrithis for 20 Pathos Clamp on a daily rotational basis, requiring Drifter Intrinsics Opportunity Rank 9 for the Arcanes to appear in her shop.
May drop from Undercroft portals in the Duviri Experience while on The Steel Path (2.78%).

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** Enemies take +7.5% damage per Cold Status
- **Rank 1:** Enemies take +15% damage per Cold Status
- **Rank 2:** Enemies take +22.5% damage per Cold Status
- **Rank 3:** Enemies take +30% damage per Cold Status
- **Rank 4:** Enemies take +37.5% damage per Cold Status
- **Rank 5:** Enemies take +45% damage per Cold Status

### Drop Sources
- Duviri Static Undercroft Portal (Steel Path) — Secondary Shiver (2.78%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 2 (Hard) — Secondary Shiver (33.33%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 8 (Hard) — Secondary Shiver (33.33%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 6 (Hard) — Secondary Shiver (6.00%)
- Duviri/Endless: Tier 7 (Hard) — Secondary Shiver (6.00%)

### Wiki
Secondary Shiver is a Secondary Arcane that inflicts bonus damage per active Cold status effect on the target.
Effect
**Notes:**
Trading Secondary Shiver requires the trader to be Mastery Rank 11 or higher.
Does not apply to radial damage.
Despite the wording being specific to an enemy target, only the Shiver-equipped weapon receives benefit.
Additive to Hornet Strike on most weapons, has reduced effect on some (Ballistica series charge attacks, Incarnon-modified secondaries) and is multiplicative to Hornet Strike on others (Cyanex, Catchmoon, Epitaph, Seer series, Sepulcrum, Tenet Spirex), consistent with other GunCO sources such as Galvanized Shot.
Bonus is additive to damage per status type from Galvanized Shot.
**Tips:**
Effects that rapidly apply a number of Cold stacks include:
Frost:
Freeze's direct hit (10 Cold stacks)
Ice Wave (Helminth subsumable), (6 Cold stacks)
Augment mod Ice Wave Impedance adds a lingering effect to the ability, which applies an additional Cold stack per second.
Snow Globe's activation while within its range (10 Cold stacks)
Avalanche (10 Cold stacks)
Gauss' Thermal Sunder double cast (Helminth subsumable) or with Redline active (10 Cold stacks)
Lavos's Vial Rush (Helminth subsumable) (3 Cold stacks on hit, plus pools that inflict 1 Cold per second)
Melee Careen at Rank 5 (10 Cold stacks)

### Wiki
Secondary Surge is a Secondary Arcane that on ability cast increases the next shot's damage for every 200 current energy, up to 8x damage.
Effect
Secondary Surge can be obtained from Ascension's optional Sister of Parvos, summoned by acquiring 3 Sister Beacons during the elevator ride. Alternatively it can be purchased from Ordis in the Drifter's Camp for 10 Vestigial Motes, for a total of 210 for max rank.

**Notes:**
Gives +0.5% damage per point of energy that remains after casting an ability, up to +700% damage at max rank.
Repeated casts will stack damage bonus up to the cap.
Damage bonus is multiplicative to Hornet Strike and similar bonuses.
Damage bonus applies to all additional pellets from multishot.
Bonus is consumed on firing the weapon, even if it does not hit an enemy.

The globes will strike the nearest enemy within 15m dealing 150 damage increasing their vulnerability to the globe's damage type by 50% for 6s. Globes will persist for 30s upon leaving the zone.

Globes will persist for 30s upon leaving the zone., +1 Arcane Revive

Globes will persist for 30s upon leaving the zone., +1 Arcane Revive

### Wiki
Theorem Contagion is an Arcane Enhancement for Warframes that grants them the ability to spawn orbiting globes upon contact with the area of effect caused by Residual Boils, Residual Malodor, Residual Shock, or Residual Viremia. These globes will target the closest enemy within 15 meters, dealing damage and increasing their vulnerability to the globe's damage type.
Can be sold for 1,000.
Effect
**Notes:**
Activates using Residual Arcanes.
Stacks are gained on time with the area's damage ticks, and multiple areas increase the rate of stacking.
Different elemental Residual areas will result in separate stacks.
Orbiting globes resemble Nova's Null Star particles with trail colors matching the Residual's element.
Multiple globe stack additively.
Globe damage is considered ability damage, triggering Arcane Impetus and the respective Archon Mods.

### Wiki
Theorem Demulcent is an Arcane Enhancement for Warframes that increases weapon damage for 20 seconds upon contact with the area of effect caused by Residual Boils, Residual Malodor, Residual Shock, or Residual Viremia. This effect stacks up to 15 times.
Can be sold for 1,000.
Effect
**Notes:**
Activates using Residual Arcanes.
Stacks are gained on time with the area's damage ticks, and multiple areas increase the rate of stacking.
Different elemental Residual areas will result in separate stacks.
Full damage bonuses at ranks 0 / 1 / 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 are 30% / 60% / 90% / 120% / 150% / 180% respectively.
Damage bonus is additive with elemental mods with the element of the paired Residual Arcane, and combines with modded elements.
For example, a Battacor with fully ranked Serration, Cryo Rounds and fully ranked Theorem Demulcent with full stacks from a Residual Viremia deals:
66 (1 + Serration) (1 + Cryo Rounds + Theorem Demulcent)
Cryo Rounds Cold combines with Residual Viremia's Toxin to make Viral.

- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 40 - 50 Arcana Isolation Vault), Rotation C — Theorem Infection (15.00%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 40 - 50 Isolation Vault), Rotation C — Theorem Infection (15.00%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 50 - 60 Arcana Isolation Vault), Rotation C — Theorem Infection (15.00%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 50 - 60 Isolation Vault), Rotation C — Theorem Infection (15.00%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Arcana Isolation Vault), Rotation C — Theorem Infection (18.75%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 40 - 50 Arcana Isolation Vault), Rotation C — Theorem Infection (18.75%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 50 - 60 Arcana Isolation Vault), Rotation C — Theorem Infection (18.75%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Arcana Isolation Vault), Rotation C — Theorem Infection (30.00%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 40 - 50 Arcana Isolation Vault), Rotation C — Theorem Infection (30.00%)
- Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 50 - 60 Arcana Isolation Vault), Rotation C — Theorem Infection (30.00%)

### Wiki
Theorem Infection is an Arcane Enhancement for Warframes that increases Companion and summoned allies' damage for 20 seconds upon contact with the area of effect caused by Residual Boils, Residual Malodor, Residual Shock, or Residual Viremia. This effect stacks up to 15 times.
Can be sold for 1,000.
Effect
**Notes:**
More research is needed
Activated by standing in the AoE zones created by Residual Arcanes.
A stack is gained once per second while standing in a zone, in time with the zone's damage ticks.
Standing in multiple zones at once will grant multiple stacks per second. Only 2 Residual zones may be active at a time, even when using both a primary and secondary kitgun, each with a different Residual arcane equipped.
Different elemental Residual areas will result in separate buffs, with each of the 4 possible buffs maxing out at 15 stacks.
Only one buff will have its buff icon shown in the UI at a time (whichever one most recently gained a new stack), but the other buffs will still be active and last their normal duration.
The buff grants elemental damage matching the elemental type of the Residual arcane used.
Bonus stacks additively with elemental bonuses modded onto Companion weapons, as well as other elemental buffs that can be applied to allied units, such as Fireball Frenzy.
The buffs from two different Residual arcanes can be used to create combined elements.
Duration will stop refreshing once 15 stacks have been reached.
Duration will only appear to stop refreshing. The damage bonus itself will remain present so long as the player continues to chain together residual zones within the arcane's duration, even after it has appeared to fall off the buff tracker.
Until the player allows the now untracked buff to expire, the icon tracking it on the buff bar cannot be reacquired.

## Virtuos Forge

### Acquisition
Can be bought from Vox Solaris for 7,500 Standing upon reaching the rank of Hand.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Hit: Converts 24% Void Damage to Heat Damage.
- **Rank 1:** On Hit: Converts 48% Void Damage to Heat Damage.
- **Rank 2:** On Hit: Converts 72% Void Damage to Heat Damage.
- **Rank 3:** On Hit: Converts 98% Void Damage to Heat Damage.

### Drop Sources
- Vox Solaris, Hand — Virtuos Forge (100.00%)

### Wiki
Virtuos Forge is an Arcane Enhancement for Operator Amps that converts Void damage to Heat.
Effect
**Notes:**
Amps can still destroy Kuva clouds.
Rank 3 conversion percent is actually 96%, not 98% as shown in-game.
When using multiple conversion arcanes, the damage is determined by base damage of the amp multiplied by the conversion percent of the arcane divided by the sum of all the conversion percent. This value is then multiplied by the lesser of the following two values: the sum of the conversion % or 98%.
For example, using a max rank Virtuos Forge (96% conversion) with a rank 2 Virtuos Trojan (72% conversion) on a Rahn Prism will result in
1000 * 96% / (96% + 72%) * 98% Heat damage and
1000 * 72% / (96% + 72%) * 98% Viral damage.
28.3

### Wiki
Virtuos Fury is an Arcane Enhancement for Operator Amps that grants a 20% chance at increased damage for 4 seconds after inflicting a Status Effect. The increased damage is additive before any multipliers.
Effect
**Tips:**
The damage bonus is additive to Unairu Wisp.
Virtuos Fury synergizes well with Shwaak Prism and Shraksun Scaffold, as these Amps deal a guaranteed Impact proc per hit.
Against Eidolons, both the Prism and the Scaffold can score multi-hits, and in turn, multiple procs per shot, potentially allowing for the bonus to be kept up indefinitely.
Virtuos Fury can also proc from the damage dealt by Void Slinging through enemies.
**Trivia:**
Prior to Update 24.6, Virtuos Fury was purchasable as a blueprint with the following requirements to build:

## Virtuos Ghost

Can be bought from The Quills for 10,000 Standing upon reaching the rank of Architect.

- **Rank 1:** On Headshot: 40% chance for +30% Status Chance for 12s
- **Rank 2:** On Headshot: 40% chance for +45% Status Chance for 12s
- **Rank 3:** On Headshot: 40% chance for +60% Status Chance for 12s

### Drop Sources

Virtuos Ghost is an Arcane Enhancement for Operator Amps that grants a 40% chance to increase status chance for 12 seconds on headshots.
Effect

## Virtuos Null

### Acquisition
Can be bought from The Quills for 2,500 Standing upon reaching the rank of Mote.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Kill: +5% Amp Energy Regeneration for 4s
- **Rank 1:** On Kill: +10% Amp Energy Regeneration for 4s
- **Rank 2:** On Kill: +15% Amp Energy Regeneration for 4s
- **Rank 3:** On Kill: +20% Amp Energy Regeneration for 4s

### Drop Sources
- The Quills, Mote — Virtuos Null (100.00%)

### Wiki
Virtuos Null is an Arcane Enhancement for Operator Amps that increases Amp and Void Beam energy regeneration for 4 seconds on kills.
Effect
**Notes:**
The Amp will still need to go through it's recharge delay before the enhanced recharging will have an effect.
The standard recharge delay for Amps 2 seconds. As such, Virtuos Null has to be at least rank 2 to provide a substantial effect.
Juttni and Plaga Braces reduce recharge delay, allowing more mileage from this arcane.
One Arcane Collection can be obtained through Arcane Dissolution at the cost of Vosfor 200, which can be converted from ~17x (16.67x) Virtuos Null, and 50,000
The conversion efficiency is Vosfor 1:~208.33 Standing
**Trivia:**
Prior to Update 24.6, Virtuos Null was purchasable as a blueprint with the following requirements to build:

## Virtuos Shadow

### Acquisition
Can be bought from The Quills for 10000 Standing upon reaching the rank of Architect.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Headshot: 40% chance for +15% Critical Chance for 12s
- **Rank 1:** On Headshot: 40% chance for +30% Critical Chance for 12s
- **Rank 2:** On Headshot: 40% chance for +45% Critical Chance for 12s
- **Rank 3:** On Headshot: 40% chance for +60% Critical Chance for 12s

### Drop Sources
- The Quills, Architect — Virtuos Shadow (100.00%)

### Wiki
Virtuos Shadow is an Arcane Enhancement for Operator Amps that grants a 40% chance to increase Critical Chance for 12 seconds on headshots.
**Notes:**
The increase in critical hit chance is multiplicative. As an example, using a Raplak Prism with a Lohrin Brace and Rank 3 Virtuos Shadow will result in:
CritChance (38% + 12%) (1 + 0.6)
Effect can be triggered by Void Slinging into an Eidolon's head.
Works well with Magus Cloud
**Trivia:**
Prior to Update 24.6, Virtuos Shadow was purchasable as a blueprint with the following requirements to build:

## Virtuos Spike

### Acquisition
Can be bought from Vox Solaris for 5,000 Standing upon reaching the rank of Agent.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Hit: Converts 24% Void Damage to Puncture Damage.
- **Rank 1:** On Hit: Converts 48% Void Damage to Puncture Damage.
- **Rank 2:** On Hit: Converts 72% Void Damage to Puncture Damage.
- **Rank 3:** On Hit: Converts 98% Void Damage to Puncture Damage.

### Drop Sources
- Vox Solaris, Agent — Virtuos Spike (100.00%)

### Wiki
Virtuos Spike is an Arcane Enhancement for Operator Amps that converts Void damage to Puncture.
Effect
**Notes:**
Amps can still destroy Kuva clouds.
Rank 3 conversion percent is actually 96%, not 98% as shown in-game.
When using multiple conversion arcanes, the damage is determined by base damage of the amp multiplied by the conversion percent of the arcane divided by the sum of all the conversion percent. This value is then multiplied by the lesser of the following two values: the sum of the conversion % or 98%.
For example, using a max rank Virtuos Spike (96% conversion) with a rank 2 Virtuos Forge (72% conversion) on a Rahn Prism will result in
1000 * 96% / (96% + 72%) * 98% Puncture damage and
1000 * 72% / (96% + 72%) * 98% Heat damage.

## Virtuos Strike

### Acquisition
Can be purchased from The Quills for 10,000 Standing upon reaching the rank of Instrument.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Critical Hit: 20% chance for +20% Critical Damage for 4s
- **Rank 1:** On Critical Hit: 20% chance for +40% Critical Damage for 4s
- **Rank 2:** On Critical Hit: 20% chance for +60% Critical Damage for 4s
- **Rank 3:** On Critical Hit: 20% chance for +80% Critical Damage for 4s

### Drop Sources
- The Quills, Instrument — Virtuos Strike (100.00%)

### Wiki
Virtuos Strike is an Arcane Enhancement for the Operator Amps which grants a 20% chance of increasing critical damage for 4 seconds upon landing a critical hit.
Effect
**Notes:**
The critical damage multiplier bonus is multiplicative.
This arcane pairs very well with the Lohrin Brace/Certus Brace, Shraksun Scaffold, and Granmu Prism due to their innately high critical chance and critical damage complementing their already high base damage. The Shraksun Scaffold and Granmu Prism's area-of-effect attacks in particular allows them to hit more enemies, allowing for more chances to deal critical hits.
**Trivia:**
Prior to Update 24.6, Virtuos Strike was purchasable as a blueprint with the following requirements to build:

## Virtuos Surge

### Acquisition
Can be bought from Vox Solaris for 5,000 Standing upon reaching the rank of Agent.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Hit: Converts 24% Void Damage to Electricity Damage.
- **Rank 1:** On Hit: Converts 48% Void Damage to Electricity Damage.
- **Rank 2:** On Hit: Converts 72% Void Damage to Electricity Damage.
- **Rank 3:** On Hit: Converts 98% Void Damage to Electricity Damage.

### Drop Sources
- Vox Solaris, Agent — Virtuos Surge (100.00%)

### Wiki
Virtuos Surge is an Arcane Enhancement for Operator Amps that converts Void damage to Electricity damage.
Effect
**Notes:**
Amps can still destroy Kuva clouds.
Rank 3 conversion percent is actually 96%, not 98% as shown in-game.
When using multiple conversion arcanes, the damage is determined by base damage of the amp multiplied by the conversion percent of the arcane divided by the sum of all the conversion percent. This value is then multiplied by the lesser of the following two values: the sum of the conversion % or 98%.
For example, using a max rank Virtuos Surge (96% conversion) with a rank 2 Virtuos Trojan (72% conversion) on a Rahn Prism will result in
1000 * 96% / (96% + 72%) * 98% Electricity damage and
1000 * 72% / (96% + 72%) * 98% Viral damage.

## Virtuos Tempo

### Acquisition
Can be bought from The Quills for 5,000 Standing upon reaching the rank of Observer.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Kill: 60% chance for +15% Fire Rate for 8s
- **Rank 1:** On Kill: 60% chance for +30% Fire Rate for 8s
- **Rank 2:** On Kill: 60% chance for +45% Fire Rate for 8s
- **Rank 3:** On Kill: 60% chance for +60% Fire Rate for 8s

### Drop Sources
- The Quills, Observer — Virtuos Tempo (100.00%)

### Wiki
Virtuos Tempo is an Arcane Enhancement for Operator Amps that grants a 60% chance to increase Fire Rate for 8 seconds on kills.
Effect
**Tips:**
It is advised that one specs into Amp energy regeneration or Amp energy capacity when using this Arcane, especially if the Amp already has a very high fire rate.
This can decrease the charge time of the Pencha Scaffold.
**Trivia:**
Prior to Update 24.6, Virtuos Tempo was purchasable as a blueprint with the following requirements to build:

## Virtuos Trojan

### Acquisition
Can be bought from Vox Solaris for 7,500 Standing upon reaching the rank of Hand.

### Stats by Rank
- **Rank 0:** On Hit: Converts 24% Void Damage to Viral Damage.
- **Rank 1:** On Hit: Converts 48% Void Damage to Viral Damage.
- **Rank 2:** On Hit: Converts 72% Void Damage to Viral Damage.
- **Rank 3:** On Hit: Converts 98% Void Damage to Viral Damage.

### Drop Sources
- Vox Solaris, Hand — Virtuos Trojan (100.00%)

### Wiki
Virtuos Trojan is an Arcane Enhancement for Operator Amps that converts Void damage to Viral.
Effect
**Notes:**
Amps can still destroy Kuva clouds.
Rank 3 conversion percent is actually 96%, not 98% as shown in-game.
When using multiple conversion arcanes, the damage is determined by base damage of the amp multiplied by the conversion percent of the arcane divided by the sum of all the conversion percent. This value is then multiplied by the lesser of the following two values: the sum of the conversion % or 98%.
For example, using a max rank Virtuos Trojan (96% conversion) with a rank 2 Virtuos Surge (72% conversion) on a Rahn Prism will result in
1000 * 96% / (96% + 72%) * 98% Viral damage and
1000 * 72% / (96% + 72%) * 98% Electricity damage.
**Trivia:**
The name of this Arcane Enhancement is most likely derived from the term Trojan or Trojan Virus, a form of computer virus or malware which is disguised as legitimate software. This is appropriate with this Arcane providing Viral Damage.
